title: Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered
description: In Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered, the worlds of Peter Parker and Spider-Man collide in an original action-packed story.

title: Forza Horizon 5
description: Your Ultimate Horizon Adventure awaits! Explore the vibrant and ever-evolving open world landscapes of Mexico with limitless, fun driving action in hundreds of the world’s greatest cars.

title: God of War
description: His vengeance against the Gods of Olympus years behind him, Kratos now lives as a man in the realm of Norse Gods and monsters. It is in this harsh, unforgiving world that he must fight to survive… and teach his son to do the same.

title: Final Fantasy VII Remake
description: Cloud Strife, a former operative of Shinra's elite SOLDIER unit now turned mercenary, lends his aid to the underground resistance group AVALANCHE.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
description: In the late 13th century, the Mongol empire has laid waste to entire nations along their campaign to conquer the East. Tsushima Island is all that stands between mainland Japan and a massive Mongol invasion fleet.

title: Minecraft
description: Prepare for an adventure of limitless possibilities as you build, mine, battle mobs, and explore the ever-changing Minecraft landscape.

title: League of Legends
description: League of Legends is a team-based strategy game where two teams of five powerful champions face off to destroy the other's base.

title: Genshin Impact
description: Embark on a journey across Teyvat to find your lost sibling and seek answers from The Seven — the gods of each element.

title: Apex Legends
description: Conquer with character in Apex Legends, a free-to-play Hero shooter where legendary characters with powerful abilities team up to battle for fortune & fame on the fringes of the Frontier.

title: Dota 2
description: Every day, millions of players worldwide enter battle as one of over a hundred Dota heroes. And no matter if it's their 10th hour of play or 1,000th, there's always something new to discover.

title: Fortnite
description: The ultimate battle royale experience. Build, fight, and create in a world that is always changing. Join the fight across multiple game modes.

title: Roblox
description: Roblox is the ultimate virtual universe that lets you create, share experiences with friends, and be anything you can imagine.

title: Among Us
description: An online and local party game of teamwork and betrayal for 4-15 players... in space!

title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: Cyberpunk 2077 is an open-world, action-adventure RPG set in the megalopolis of Night City, where you play as a cyberpunk mercenary wrapped up in a do-or-die fight for survival.

title: Elden Ring
description: Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between.

title: Call of Duty: Warzone
description: A massive free-to-play combat arena which now features the brand-new map, Urzikstan.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: America, 1899. Arthur Morgan and the Van der Linde gang are outlaws on the run. With federal agents and the best bounty hunters in the nation massing on their heels, the gang must rob, steal and fight their way across the rugged heartland of America in order to survive.

title: Overwatch 2
description: Overwatch 2 is an always-on and ever-evolving free-to-play, team-based action game set in an optimistic future, where every match is the ultimate 5v5 battlefield brawl.

title: Counter-Strike 2
description: For over two decades, Counter-Strike has offered an elite competitive experience, one shaped by millions of players from across the globe. And now the next chapter in the CS saga is about to begin. This is Counter-Strike 2.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: You are Geralt of Rivia, mercenary monster slayer. Before you stands a war-torn, monster-infested continent you can explore at will. Your current contract? Tracking down Ciri — the Child of Prophecy, a living weapon that can alter the shape of the world.

title: PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS
description: PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS is a battle royale shooter that pits 100 players against each other in a struggle for survival. Gather supplies and outwit your opponents to become the last person standing.

title: VALORANT
description: A 5v5 character-based tactical shooter where precise gunplay meets unique agent abilities. Mix your style and experience on a global, competitive stage. You have 13 rounds to attack and defend your side using sharp gunplay and tactical abilities.

title: Grand Theft Auto V
description: When a young street hustler, a retired bank robber, and a terrifying psychopath find themselves entangled with some of the most frightening and deranged elements of the criminal underworld, the U.S. government, and the entertainment industry, they must pull off a series of dangerous heists to survive in a ruthless city in which they can trust nobody — least of all each other.

title: Garena Free Fire
description: Free Fire is a world-famous survival shooter game available on mobile. Each 10-minute game places you on a remote island where you are pit against 49 other players, all seeking survival. Players freely choose their starting point with their parachute, and aim to stay in the safe zone for as long as possible.

title: Battlegrounds Mobile India
description: BATTLEGROUNDS MOBILE INDIA is a new Battle Royale game where multiple players employ strategies to fight and be the last man standing on the battlegrounds. A free to play, multiplayer experience, in BATTLEGROUNDS MOBILE INDIA, players can battle it out in diverse game modes which can be squad based or solo.

title: Jump Master
description:
You can jump further if you press down on the marker.
Press and release the timing so that it doesn't fall between the footrest and the footrest!
Why don't you compete with your friends for points with the sharing function?

title: Dice Puzzle
description: Dice Puzzle is a smart, satisfying merge game where you place numbered dice on a grid to combine matches and build higher values. Plan ahead, manage limited space, and handle dice that appear solo or in pairs. Every move matters—chain merges, grow your numbers, and test your strategy in this addictive dice challenge.

title: Pixel Shoot
description: Pixel Shoot is a fast-paced arcade puzzle game. It's simple to play by just tapping the cannons. Make sure you pay attention to the color and base your strategy around it. You must also manage your capacity, and timing is key! Send your cannons in the right order, manage the flow, and maximize your score.

title: Battle Racing Stars
description: Join an epic racing adventure where you can unlock and upgrade iconic characters from beloved Halfbrick games, including Barry from Jetpack Joyride, The Ginger Ninja from Dan the Man, and the nimble ninjas from Fruit Ninja.

title: Hidden Object: Street Of Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Street of Secrets is an atmospheric hidden object game where you become the lead detective. A mysterious case awaits, and your insightful assistant is there to help, offering hints and guiding you to crucial details.

title: Savage Defenders
description: A tower defense strategy action game where you become the last hope of a tribe living at the foot of an ancient volcano. When an asteroid with an alien threat falls to the planet, you must combine magic, tactics and the strength of warriors to stop the invader who is devouring all life.

title: Grow a Garden 3D
description:
Welcome to Grow a Garden, a fun and peaceful game where you plant seeds and grow magical trees! ?
Explore different seasons, customize your character, and watch your garden grow bigger every day.
Every seed is special and every garden is unique!

title: Pixel Journey
description: The “Pixel Journey” will appeal to all fans of exploration, collecting resources in a cozy pixel world. It combines a cozy atmosphere and addictive gameplay. Reach the end and find out all the secrets! Support us by leaving a review and comment! If you have any comments or suggestions, please describe them and we will try to make improvements quickly!

title: Dragon Draw Joust
description: Prepare for a wildly creative showdown in Dragon Draw Joust, where your imagination becomes your strongest weapon! Instead of choosing gear from a menu, you must draw your own tools to defend your warrior and survive intense combat challenges. Every match feels fresh because your strategy starts with your creativity. Your creation instantly becomes part of your character, helping you block attacks or strike opponents inside the chaotic battle arena.

title: Mahjong build farm
description: A cozy blend of classic Mahjong and farm simulation! Start with a small green hill and turn it into a blooming farm by matching tiles and completing levels. The mechanics are simple and relaxing — find and match three identical picture tiles to clear the board. You'll have 90 unique levels with varying difficulty, from easy puzzles to real challenges for experienced players. If you get stuck, bonuses are always there to help.

title: Panda Dash Auto Shooting
description: Jump straight into explosive action with Panda Dash Auto Shooting! In this fast-paced side-scrolling shooting adventure, you guide a fearless panda warrior into chaotic arenas packed with endless zombie waves. Each battle throws you into intense combat where survival depends on positioning and strategy. Every round feels stronger, faster, and more thrilling than the last! Get ready, grab your gear, and dash into zombie chaos!

title: Office Knight 3D: Castle Defense
description:
Office Warrior: Wield swords and axes as skillfully as a stapler!
Action Battles: Fight various enemies in dynamic 3D environments.
Progression System: Level up, improve health and damage right in the heat of battle.
Weapon & Upgrade Shop: Collect coins to buy hero upgrades and equip yourself.
Endless Challenge: Deflect waves of enemies and prove you are the ultimate defender!

title: Battle Arena
description: Fight enemies, grow your army, and dominate the battlefield! Upgrade your camp, train your soldiers and earn tons of coins to expand your unstoppable arsenal. Ready to battle?

title: Twinkle Shooter
description: Shoot at stones of the same color to drop them. They can be cleared when three or more of the same color are matched. If a stone enters the heart, the slot spins for a fever chance! The game is over if the stones reach the bottom.

title: Bublix: Bubble Hit
description: Bublix: Bubble Hit is a fast-paced bubble shooter where precision and strategy matter. Aim, shoot, and match 3 or more bubbles to clear the board. Use clever angles, wall bounces, and combos to boost your score. With endless gameplay and rising difficulty, it’s perfect for quick, addictive sessions.

title: Revoxel 3D - Voxel RPG Shooter
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic voxel-style RPG shooter with a cyberpunk atmosphere. A dark futuristic city overrun by a tech corporation awaits you, along with endless battles with robots and monsters, character development, and constant action in the spirit of a shooter RPG.

title: Break Beat
description: Break Beat is a fast-paced and colorful brick-breaker game with a pixel art/neon aesthetic and an electronic music soundtrack.

title: Clash & Run
description: One chance, no turning back. Speed is your only ally in a world that won’t wait. Race through ever-shifting terrain where every jump could be your last. Collect coins and unlock unique looks. Precision and quick thinking will keep you in the game longer.

title: Hard Puzzle
description:
Enter a vibrant, calming world of geometry where your goal is to build perfect squares from colorful pieces. Fit the shapes together, unlock new levels, and challenge your logic and spatial skills. Need help? Use a hint to keep going!
? Easy to play, hard to master
? Relaxing visuals
? A quick, fun brain boost anytime
Start puzzling and become a geometry master!

title: World Soccer
description:
There are four objects, pull the object you want and fire it.
The object moves and pushes the other object or ball away
If you push the ball into the net before the opponent, you win!

title: Word Solitaire
description: Challenge your mind with a fresh twist on a classic with Word Solitaire! This addictive word solitaire blends clever word-building with strategic card gameplay, creating a unique solo experience. Find categories, reveal hidden words, and clear the board in increasingly challenging levels. Perfect for quick breaks or long sessions—relax, think, and master the art of words!

title: Rainbow Friends. Survival
description:
A fun and dangerous game about Rainbow Friends!
You are in a dangerous place. You need to survive 5 days and 5 nights, but the deadly obstacle will be the terrifying and bloodthirsty monsters Rainbow Friends!
Complete all the missions, move fast, perform actions carefully and run away from the monstrous monsters!

title: Math Master
description: Unleash your inner math whiz! Math Master turns numbers into art—solve fun math problems to unlock drawing tools, sketch colorful shapes, and bring numerical puzzles to life. Perfect for learners and creativity lovers alike!

title: Hidden Object Adventure
description: Are you ready to solve puzzles and uncover hidden secrets? Become a detective in Find Hidden Object Game and test your observation skills! Explore detailed scenes in schools, houses, amusement parks, and zoos. Search for cleverly hidden items, challenge your brain, and enjoy fun, relaxing gameplay. Perfect for casual players and puzzle lovers alike. Train your mind and become the ultimate detective!

title: Max Speed
description: Race shiny sports cars on thrilling 3D tracks full of jumps, stunts, and intense battles. Explore exciting locations with unique challenges, perform daring tricks, upgrade and customize your cars, and test your skills in fast-paced arcade races. Enjoy high-speed action, stunning visuals, and nonstop adrenaline right in your browser.

title: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets is an exciting hidden object game where magic and time intertwine in a thrilling adventure. Everything changed when a mysterious magical crystal activated, scattering objects across time! You'll enter a world of riddles, hidden objects, and temporal paradoxes.

title: Solitaire Klondike: Eternal Russian Classic
description:
Rediscover the captivating world of Solitaire Klondike!

This timeless card game not only entertains but also enhances logical thinking, offering hours of engaging pastime. Play your favorite solitaire anytime, anywhere.

Join the community of enthusiasts and prove your mastery in Klondike!

Keep an eye on the leaderboard and become the top player among all!

title: Papas Burger Cook
description:
Cook and travel through amazing burger restaurants, discover delicious recipes, prepare tasty meals, and serve hungry customers in the best burger shop.
This is a crazy cooking game full of fast kitchen action, burger fever, and food madness. Papas Burger Cook - fun cooking simulation game.
Become the ultimate burger chef, master every recipe, and reach the highest rank in this exciting food cooking adventure.

title: Dino Hunter King
description: Action-packed FPS games have long attracted players. Enjoy dinosaur hunting in Dino Hunter King. Enter a wild prehistoric world, become an elite hunter tracking powerful dinosaurs across open grasslands.

title: Food Tower Defense
description: ? Welcome to Food Tower Defense – The Tastiest Tower Defense Ever! ?? Prepare your appetite and sharpen your strategy because Food Tower Defense is here to serve you the most delicious tower defense experience ever!

title: Break the block there, Brainrot!
description:
Break the block there, Brainrot! — Break blocks and collect the entire Brainrot collection.
Sell Brainrots to earn points to upgrade your axe.
Find rare Brainrots in blocks. The further you go to collect the blocks, the greater the reward, but beware of the block guard.

title: Chroma Tower
description: Chroma Tower is a reverse-Tetris puzzle where you destroy instead of build! You're given a tower made of colored blocks. Drop blocks from above, match the color — and the entire connected chain disappears. Blocks fall to fill the gaps, potentially triggering new cascade reactions. Your goal is to demolish the tower completely within a limited number of moves.

title: Animal Merge Zoo Park
description:
Animal Merge Zoo Park is a fun and addictive idle zoo simulation game where you build, manage, and expand your very own wildlife empire. Start with a small zoo and grow it into a world filled with animals, wild beasts, dinosaurs, monsters, and magical creatures like unicorns. Become the ultimate zoo tycoon by merging creatures, caring for animals, producing food, managing visitors, and unlocking new zones.
Merge Animals and Discover New Species

title: Car Jam Escape
description: Car Jam Escape is a puzzle game where players clear a crowded parking lot by moving cars in the correct order. Each vehicle can only move forward in the direction it faces, so players must study the layout and plan carefully. The goal is to guide every car out without collisions or blockages. As levels progress, the puzzles become more complex, requiring logical thinking and strategy.

title: Dinosaurs vs Asteroids
description: Giant asteroids are crashing down on Earth. But the dinosaurs have a plan! They have special mounts on their backs where you can attach a variety of weapons: from miniguns and flamethrowers to alien shotguns and blasters. Additionally, there are special species of dinosaurs that can shoot powerful spikes or break asteroids with their claws.

title: Meow Block: Color Collect!
description: A burst of color, clever thinking, and adorable cats await you in Meow Block: Color Collect! This charming puzzle experience turns simple movements into brain-teasing fun, where every swipe matters and every match brings you closer to victory.

title: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator
description: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator is a 3D strategy battle game where planning is the key to victory. Build your army of Swordsmen, Spearmen, and Archers, analyze enemy formations, and lead your ninja forces to triumph across challenging levels.

title: Underwater Survival
description:
Dive Into a Mysterious and Beautiful Underwater World
Welcome to an unforgettable underwater survival adventure where exploration, discovery, and survival come together in a stunning ocean environment. Dive deep into a vibrant and mysterious sea filled with hidden secrets, breathtaking visuals, and endless possibilities.

title: EQ Test Puzzle
description: A puzzle game that tests emotional intelligence through emotion recognition and jigsaw puzzles. Match emotional icons, scenarios, and puzzle pieces to train your emotional awareness and problem-solving skills.

title: Jigsolitaire
description: Step into a peaceful world of beautiful images made from gentle, carefully crafted blocks. Jigsolitaire is a game you’ll want to return to every day: it helps you unwind, disconnect from stress, and enjoy a small moment of calm just for yourself. Each level reveals a new scene - warm landscapes, charming cottages, delicate nature details, and quiet corners you’ll love exploring piece by piece.

title: Spa empire
description:
? BUILD YOUR DREAM SPA EMPIRE

Have you ever dreamed of running the ultimate spa, offering everything from soothing massages to exciting makeovers? Step into My Spa Empire, the idle arcade game where you dye hair, create stunning hair color makeovers and manage a bustling spa filled with exciting treatments. Design, upgrade, and expand your spa into the ultimate relaxation haven for your guests.

title: Sid & Ginny Y2K Glam Clash
description: Welcome to the Y2K style fashion world! Two charismatic heroines are waiting for you, ready to try on fashion trends from the 2000s. Create spectacular makeup for them with lip gloss, shining shadows and glossy skin; choose stylish hairstyles - from smooth straight hair to playful ponytails and fashionable hairpins. Experiment with low-cut jeans, crop tops, mini skirts, shiny fabrics, and bold combinations. Complete the resulting image with iconic accessories of those years.

title: SCP 173 Escape
description: Step into the role of SCP-173 and break free from the Foundation’s control in a tense stealth experience built around a deadly rule: you can MOVE only when no one is LOOKING at you. Hide in the shadows, avoid patrols, and choose the perfect moment to dash through dark corridors where every mistake leads to capture.

title: Pyramidz2
description: PyramidZ 2 is, as the name suggests, the sequel to PyramidZ. It's a Match-3 game where you have to slide a row or column to align Egyptian symbols. This version is faster and allows for more combos.

title: Farm Animal Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to Farm Animal Sort Puzzle, a fun and relaxing casual puzzle game set on a lively farm. Your mission is simple but addictive: match the appropriate animal or vegetable to the customer's needs. Sort adorable farm animals into the correct spaces and enjoy the satisfying challenge of smart organization.

title: Animal Swipe
description: Animal Swipe is a fun and addictive puzzle game where players match adorable animal pairs on a colorful board. With easy-to-learn controls and exciting power-ups, the game offers a challenge for both casual and strategic players. Use your wits and boosts to clear levels and achieve your objectives!

title: Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo
description: Welcome to Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo, a unique and immersive game that lets you unleash your inner tattoo artist. This isn't just any game; it's your gateway to a world where art meets relaxation, and where your creativity can truly shine. Prepare to immerse yourself in the satisfying and intricate process of tattooing, all at the tip of your fingers!

title: Yoga Master
description:
Yoga is a great way to improve your quality of life. It is also a great way to entertain yourself in this game: Yoga Master.

Yoga Master is an addictive 3D running game with different levels that will challenge even the fastest reflex.

title: Sort Balls - Cones
description: Immerse yourself in a calming logic puzzle where your goal is to sort colored balls into separate tubes. Plan each move carefully so that every tube contains balls of only one color. The straightforward mechanics gradually evolve into more challenging levels that test your focus and strategic thinking.

title: i8 City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning supercar through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Wonders of Egypt Match 2
description: Wonders of Egypt Match 2 returns with a brand-new Match-3 adventure in Ancient Egypt! Travel with your loyal Sphinx through pyramids, temples, palaces, and towering obelisks. Match 3+ sparkling gems to uncover treasures, artifacts, and hidden secrets. Conquer hundreds of fresh levels, complete tricky goals, and use powerful boosters when you need a helping hand. Earn dazzling rewards and prove your skills as the mysteries of the desert unfold in every chapter! Ready to play? Step in and match!

title: World Cup 2026 Soccer Game
description:
Choose your national team and enter the excitement of the World Cup! 
Play as your favorite heroes like Cristiano Ronald, Lionel Messi or Kylian Mbappe and jump into fast-paced 1v1 soccer battles to claim the cup! 
Defend your goal, watch for the perfect opening, and strike to score!
Challenge the CPU or compete against friends, sharpen your skills, and climb your way to the top. Victory is just a goal away!

title: Home Block Story
description: Step into a world of renovation! Match blocks, clear the board and unlock new decor to design your house just the way you want. With each new challenge, show your unique style and make your dream home a reality.

title: Geometry Missile
description: Navigate your missile through challenging geometric obstacle courses! Control a triangular missile that automatically flies forward while you tap to guide it up and down. Avoid collisions with various shapes like triangles, rectangles, and spikes to reach the gate at each level's end. Test your reflexes in this fast-paced arcade adventure!

title: Slinger Block
description: Guide a red square through compact grid-based puzzles filled with sliding blocks and locked paths. Clear the way, collect every yellow key, unlock the yellow door, and reach the exit to win. Simple rules, clever layouts, and satisfying logic challenges make each level a fun brain teaser.

title: Sworded.io - Spin and Rub.
description: Test your skills in the game – an arcade simulator of sword fights! Fight waves of enemies, upgrade your character, unlock powerful weapons and magic spells. Demonstrate your tactics and reaction in dynamic battles!

title: My Arcade Center 2
description:
My Arcade Center 2 is a fast-paced arcade management tycoon game.

Build, customize, and expand your own arcade across 7 unique maps. Earn by day, upgrade by night, unlock new machines, hire staff, optimize layouts, and grow your business. Switch between centers anytime, unlock new characters and skins, complete daily missions, and boost your long-term progress with rewarding upgrades.

title: Geometry Tower Defense
description: Fast, stylish tower defense game where geometric towers blast incoming enemies along winding paths. Build on key spots, upgrade and sell towers, manage gold, and survive wave after wave. Use speed controls to handle pressure and protect your base.

title: Dead Paradise
description: Dead Paradise: Race Shooter is an apocalyptic car game where you drive, shoot enemies, and try to survive until the finish. Completing levels gives you coins to upgrade your car’s missiles, armor, engine, and fuel. You can also buy new vehicles, take missions, and complete daily tasks for extra rewards. Use your resources wisely to make your car stronger and improve your chances of survival.

title: Jumper's Quest
description:
Jump into a world full of unique obstacles that will test you both mentally and physically. Your quick thinking and reflexes will be put to the test as you decipher puzzles and navigate through each level with finesse.

Encounter a diverse array of enemies, each with their own unique challenges that you must conquer. Intuitive one-touch controls empower you to effortlessly jump through the levels in record time.

title: Hospital Inc
description: Step into the fast-paced world of Hospital Inc, an exciting management simulator. This addictive idle tycoon casual game lets you build, expand, and manage your own hospital while earning profits even when you're away.

title: Bimka Drive - Smash cars into splinters!
description: Game created in the style of racing, where you will have no restrictions. But it's not that simple. The fact is that the basis here is based on the physics of actions, because every collision of your car with any obstacle will significantly affect its both external and internal condition. The damage model is made very realistically. Your choice will be a variety of different types of car models that you can test on all kinds of racing tracks. The game is very similar to "BeamNG Drive".

title: Pim Path
description:
Reach the trophy at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem. You can't fall off the platforms; spikes and blades will be everywhere, making the levels more challenging. One wrong step and it's game over.
You'll need to stay calm, pay attention, be agile, have good reflexes, and most importantly, don't get angry.

title: Liquid Sort Deluxe
description: Liquid Sort Deluxe is a relaxing and addictive color sorting puzzle game where you sort colorful liquids into tubes until each tube contains only one color. Plan your moves carefully and challenge your brain with unlimited levels. Unlock an extra tube by watching a short reward ad to make the puzzle easier, or get unlimited time to complete tricky levels.

title: Gun Shooting Games Sniper 3D
description: Step into the battlefield and test your precision in Gun Shooting Games: Sniper 3D, an exciting fps experience packed with nonstop action. This immersive first person shooting game puts you in the role of an elite sniper armed with powerful weapons and challenging missions.

title: Obby: Tsunami Escape +1 by Car
description:
A giant tsunami is approaching - and only you can outrun it! Dodge the waves, upgrade your car, and race to the finish line. The faster you get, the further you can go.

Buy new cars - each one gives you more speed, control, and capabilities.
Upgrade your vehicles to survive the most challenging races.
Defeat brainrots - from common to rare and legendary ones.
Practice, improve your reactions, and find the perfect strategy.

title: Romantic K-Pop Transformation
description: In this game, the stars of K-pop are preparing for a romantic transformation. Create a unique images for girls, full of tenderness and brilliance of the stage. Experiment with makeup; change the hairstyles and hair color of the girls. Choose the perfect outfit: from cute dresses and stylish tops to trendy skirts and trousers. Complete the look with fashion accessories. Compare the resulting images and decide which of the heroines of the game has become the real queen of romantic K-pop style.

title: Europe at War
description:
Europe stands on the brink of the greatest conflict in history. It's 1936 - choose your nation and decide the fate of the continent.
Europe at War is a turn-based strategy with a detailed map of Europe divided into 369 regions. Manage your economy, build factories and barracks, research technologies, forge alliances or declare wars.
Three paths to victory: conquer all regions by force, unite Europe through diplomatic alliances, or build an industrial empire of 12 factories.

title: Cow Jam Farm puzzle
description: In Cow Jam Farm Puzzle, the peaceful farm turns into a tricky traffic jam that only your logic skills can solve. Cows are stuck in crowded paths, and your mission is to help every one of them escape safely.

title: Word Search Universe Easter
description: Word Search Universe: Easter is a fun and relaxing puzzle game with a happy spring theme. Enjoy colorful eggs, soft colors, and a peaceful mood while finding hidden words. Easy to play and great for all ages, it’s a perfect way to relax and enjoy the Easter season.

title: Stick Kill 3D
description: Play as a stickman armed with a pistol in this puzzle-based shooter, where precision and clever thinking are key. Find the right angle, line up your shots, and eliminate enemies in creative ways. Each level becomes more challenging, testing your accuracy and problem-solving skills.

title: Diamondz
description: DiamondZ is a special variant of Match-3. Here, the goal is not to directly manipulate jewels on the board but to insert them on the left or right side to eliminate groups and make diamonds fall into the mine carts. Help the little miner collect as much wealth as possible!

title: Brawl Stars Battle
description: Brawl Stars Battle is an exciting action shooting game where you control powerful heroes armed with guns and special abilities to defeat opponents in fast-paced combat! Select 3v3 battle mode and fight alongside your teammates. The team that kills fifteen opponents first wins. Use guns and powerful abilities in intense battles.

title: BAT!zo Runner
description: Become the cutest vampuuurrr bat! Fly, dodge, and collect mysterious red potions in BAT!zo - new addictive endless runner!

title: Two RX7 Drifters
description: Drift through 3 stunning drift tracks and show how well you can steer the wheels of a powerful rx7. Go head to head with your friend in a drift battle and see whose a better drift racer, customize your ride with stunning body colors, underglows and cool rims. Are you ready to showcase your drifting skills?

title: Slicer Duo
description: Slicer Duo is a satisfying ASMR game where precision, timing, and rhythm come together in a sharp slicing adventure. Move through level-based stages, cut through fruits and all kinds of objects, collect points, and try to keep your knife in motion for as long as possible. While the controls are simple, every section demands focus because one bad move can send your knife straight into danger.

title: Number Bubble Shooter Wild West
description: Saddle up for a Wild West number bubble shooter! Shoot and match numbers to merge them into higher values, creating bigger combos and clearing the board. Plan your shots, stack smart, and ride through dusty levels full of challenge and fun!

title: X to Y: Almost Impossible!
description: X to Y is a fast-paced precision platform skill game focused on timing, reflexes, and speed control. Guide X through dangerous obstacles, traps, and tight spaces to reach Y. Every move requires perfect acceleration and sharp reactions — one mistake and you fail. Earn up to 3 stars per level to unlock new worlds, including dark mode challenges, auto-movement stages, and physics-based puzzles.

title: Mojicon Spring Connect
description:
The 5th Mojicon game is here! Relax and enjoy the peaceful Spring season. Guided by your cheerful and cheeky Bunny companion, embark on a soothing puzzle journey to bring a barren landscape back to life. Match tactile spring tiles to clear the board and earn rewards!

Restore the Meadow: Follow a heartwarming story.
Collect Cards: Find 34 beautiful "Spring Wisdoms".
Relax: Enjoy classic tile-matching mechanics.
Achievements: Go for 100% completion!

title: Tic Tac Toe Merge
description:
Tic-Tac-Toe Merge is a revolutionary twist on the classic game! Unlike traditional tic-tac-toe, pieces have power levels from 1 to 3. Place higher-level pieces to capture your opponent's weaker ones!

MERGE TO DOMINATE
Combine two level-1 pieces to create level-2, and two level-2 to forge powerful level-3. Create chain reactions when 3+ same-level pieces align — they merge into an even stronger piece!

title: Cute Craft Lab
description: Step into the colorful world of Cute Craft Lab, a super casual game where creativity shines and every girl can become a true crafting designer. If you love relaxing gameplay mixed with adorable creativity, this cute design adventure is made just for you. In Cute Craft Lab, enter a magical workshop filled with charming tools, sparkling decorations, and endless crafting possibilities.

title: Bunnyhop and Surf Maps
description: Game that brings bunnyhop and surf from "Counter Strike" straight to your browser! The game features a variety of parkour maps, many knife skins, unique bunnyhop mechanics, the ability to accelerate with a knife, and the opportunity to compete with other players to see who can reach the finish line first.

title: Goods Sorting Shopping Master
description: In Goods Sorting Shopping Master, you organize messy goods by moving and matching them into neat groups. It’s a fun puzzle game that combines smart thinking with relaxing gameplay. In the game, you’ll face shelves filled with mixed goods such as drinks, snacks, and daily items. Match and sort three identical items to clear the space and proceed, based on the customer's needs. Manage space carefully to keep sorting.

title: Gummy merge
description: Jelly merge is an endless game in which to merge identical marmalades. The goal of the game is to reach the final marmalade.

title: Hunter Underwater Spearfishing
description: Hunter Underwater Spearfishing is an immersive simulator hunting game that takes you deep beneath the ocean for an exciting underwater adventure. Grab your spearfishing arrow, dive in, and experience the thrill of becoming a true underwater hunter!

title: Little Dentist Dash
description: Little Dental Dash is a charming clinic management where you step into the role of a friendly dentist helping kids with their dental problems. From fixing chipped teeth to carefully placing braces, each patient brings a new challenge that tests your speed and attention to detail. Treat your young patients, keep them smiling, and earn rewards for your excellent work.

title: Arrow Escape
description: Get ready for a fast-paced and strategic arrow challenge in Arrow Escape, an addictive arrows puzzle escape game built for players who love logic puzzles and intense puzzle escape moments.

title: 12-in-1 Solitaire
description:
Solitaire is one of the most popular – if not the most popular – card games in the world! Experience premium Solitaire gameplay at its best with 12 of the world's most popular Solitaire games!

Welcome to our latest & most comprehensive collection of the world's best & most popular Solitaire games! We included 12 of the most beloved Solitaire games in 1 comphrehensive collection, added helpful features appreciated by both Solitaire pros and amateurs alike.

title: Arrow Puzzle
description: Arrow Puzzle is a relaxing logic game that turns simple taps into a rewarding challenge. Your goal is straightforward: find a free path, tap arrows in the right order, and enjoy as the maze slowly turns into a clear, empty board. Follow the arrows to escape the puzzle and find a soothing flow that keeps your mind engaged and relaxed.

title: Fish Story 4
description: Fish Story 4 returns with its biggest underwater Match-3 adventure yet! Dive into over 4,500+ colorful levels packed with fun challenges, clever puzzles, and sparkling ocean treasures. Join your friend Mermaid on Daily Missions to earn coins, boosters, and special rewards every time you play. Take part in exciting Treasure Hunt events and uncover hidden pirate loot beneath the waves. Relax, match, and explore the deep blue sea!

title: Find Hidden Cats
description: Explore charming black-and-white scenes inspired by iconic European cities in this relaxing yet addictive hidden object game. Every corner is packed with clever details and playful surprises - can you spot all 20 mischievous cats hiding in plain sight? Test your observation skills, take your time, and enjoy the satisfying thrill of discovering each well-hidden feline!

title: Fury Tanks
description: Beyond the hills and forests, war waits in silence. When it starts, it’s you, your tank and the enemy in your sights. Build your armor, power up your cannon and let instinct guide your aim. When the ground shakes, make sure it’s because you fired first.

title: Dark Myth: Monkey Merge
description: Merge warriors, build your army, and fight through hordes of monsters as the Monkey King! Your master and companions have been captured — combine strategy and action to rescue them all. From Common to Legendary, every merge makes you stronger.

title: Space Craft: Ship War
description:
Explore deep space, piloting a cubic ship that can be infinitely expanded with modules. Collect new decks, melee and ranged weapons, boosters, and rare upgrades on the map, transforming your ship into a true battle station. Enemies also grow, making every encounter a dynamic battle for survival.

Complete levels, upgrade your stats, unlock new skins, and experiment with builds. Vibrant 3D graphics, rich effects, and constant progression make space battles exciting and unpredictable.

title: Age of Zombies
description:
Age of Zombies, the nostalgic and thrilling twin-stick shooter, takes you through time to save the world from the undead menace with Barry Steakfries!  Age of Zombies is delivering pure, unadulterated fun with an unforgettable cast of characters.

Experience a lighthearted, action-packed story that spans 24 levels across 8 diverse worlds. Confront 7 unique bosses, encounter a variety of zombie types, and compete in 12 Horde levels for a spot on the leaderboards.

title: Soccer Duel
description: An exciting game in the style of table football, which you can play both alone and with friends on the same device or over the network.

title: Dessert DIY
description: Step into a sweet little food studio and craft desserts for hungry customers! Follow simple step-by-step recipes, pick the right ingredients, and assemble tasty treats exactly as requested. Satisfy each guest to earn coins, then spend your rewards in the shop to unlock more items, upgrades, and delicious options. Easy to learn, relaxing to play, and full of colorful desserts!

title: Sky Assault
description: Drop from a helicopter into a hostile neon skyscraper! Sky Assault is a tactical vertical shooter where you descend through procedurally generated floors. Eliminate 30 unique enemy types, defeat massive bosses every 10 levels, and loot crates for ammo and weapons. Survival is the only option in this infinite arcade shooter.

title: Archery Master - Bow and Arrow
description:
Join archery adventure and become a bowmaster! Aim, shoot and hit the bullseye!

Pick your bow, defeat other archery masters and don’t let them take you down! Join in this fun and challenging adventure and have fun. Bow masters can really challenge your casual game skills but have no fear! If you enjoy bow and arrow games, then prepare to defeat other bow masters, earn coins, score, and become the ultimate bow master!

title: Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting
description: Ready to become the coldest, deadliest sniper in the entire city? Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting is a FPS action shooting simulator where you complete high-risk missions. Use powerful guns to eliminate dangerous mafia targets.

title: Tap-Hold
description: Tap & Hold is a fast-paced neon cyberpunk flight arcade game. Hold to fly up, release to fall down. Navigate through dangerous obstacles, collect coins, grab power-ups, and unlock unique characters. How far can you fly?

title: Color Conquest: Territory War
description:
Command one of 4 unique factions in this intense RTS war! Capture territories to expand your army and destroy enemy bases.

Factions:

Grey: High HP (Tank), slow production.

Green: Fast spawn (Swarm), low HP.

Blue & Yellow: Balanced fighters.

Capture neutral zones to increase your unit capacity. Can you dominate the map?

title: Earth Defender
description:
Earth Defender is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a spaceship orbiting around planet Earth. Deadly meteors are flying toward the planet, and it's your mission to stop them before they crash into Earth.

Your ship circles the planet. Time your moves carefully and collide with incoming meteors to destroy them

Tap to change your orbit direction and intercept as many meteors as possible. Survive the meteor storm and defend Earth for as long as you can!

title: Arcade GP
description: ARCADE GP is a retro-style top-down Formula 1 racing game with strategic tire management and pit stop mechanics. Race against AI opponents, manage tire wear, and make tactical decisions to claim victory!

title: Ayla World Princess life
description: Step into the magical world of Ayla World: Princess Life, where you can live the ultimate princess adventure! This exciting game lets you dress up your avatar, create stunning outfits, and design beautiful nails with endless styles.

title: Cars with Guns: Wasteland Showdown
description:
Accept the challenge of the post-apocalyptic wasteland. Take on contracts, earn money and reputation, and collect valuable loot.
Survival belongs to those with the fastest ride and the biggest gun.

title: Travel Mahjong Deluxe
description: Travel Mahjong Deluxe is a relaxing tile-matching puzzle where you match identical tiles and strategically clear the board. Find pairs of beautiful travel-themed tiles that are free on at least one side and remove them to complete each level. As you progress, new layouts and challenges will keep the game fresh and engaging. Use the Hint feature whenever you get stuck, or watch a reward video to gain unlimited time and continue your puzzle-solving adventure.

title: Tic Tac Toe - Match Three
description:
Rediscover the classic game of Tic-Tac-Toe (XO) like never before with "Tic Tac Toe: Match Three"! Immerse yourself in this timeless board and strategy game that's been masterfully reimagined to offer new puzzles, exciting challenges, stunning graphics, and endless fun for players of all ages. Whether you're looking for a quick game to sharpen your brain or a comprehensive puzzle game experience, our game has something for everyone.

Let the strategic battles begin!

title: Lost Things - Hidden Objects
description:
Embark on an exciting adventure where your powers of observation are your main tool!
This is a relaxing hidden object game created for those who appreciate slow-paced gameplay and enjoy exploring detailed worlds. Forget about time pressure! Here you can explore huge, colorful maps filled with hundreds of artfully hidden objects at your own pace.

title: Clash Crowd Game
description: Clash Crowd Game is an addictive arcade runner game where you tap to run, survive obstacles, and reach the destination. Control your crowd, avoid traps, and face thrilling challenges in every level. Easy controls, engaging gameplay, and colorful 3D graphics make this game perfect for quick fun. Run smart, grow your crowd, and prove your survival skills.

title: Dream Kitchen
description: Dream Kitchen is a fun and fast-paced restaurant simulation game inspired by shawarma-style cooking gameplay. Take customer orders, cook the right food, and serve every dish on time to keep customers happy. Complete levels with 3-star ratings, earn coins, upgrade your kitchen equipment, and unlock new recipes. Explore multiple themed chapters, including a Pancake Shop, Street Stall, Fast Food Restaurant, and Western Restaurant, each with unique dishes and challenges!

title: Hero Match
description:
Hero Match: Blast, Build & Save the World!
Welcome to Hero Match! Join our fearless superhero, solve match 3 puzzles, take down the villain, and restore iconic locations across the globe!

title: Seat Puzzle Cut The Rope
description: Face a wildly satisfying brain challenge in Seat Puzzle - Cut The Rope. This addictive puzzle game blends smart logic with relaxing casual gameplay, creating the perfect experience for those who love thinking fast and solving clever challenges! In each level, chairs are bound by ropes. Your task is to cut the ropes according to the passengers' colors.

title: Gang War: Strike Shooter
description:
Welcome to a fast-paced multiplayer shooter! Break out of prison and dive straight into a brutal gang war. Join the Reds or the Blues, capture banks, warehouses, factories, and other city locations. Each captured zone earns you income — spend it on new weapons and character customization!

Play with friends, compete for dominance, and survive the dangerous streets. Only strength, strategy, and loyal teammates matter here. An open world full of conflict, shootouts, and endless possibilities.

title: Safe Merge
description: A simple idle merge game, you need to merge safes with same design to make a safe more powerfull, you need to unlock all design to win the game, the design are in the right, if the game was hard you can do prestige to win more money per cicle.

title: ColorWars.io
description: ColorWars.io is a competitive multiplayer strategy game where players battle for territorial dominance. Expand your color by painting the arena, manage a real-time gold economy to deploy defensive structures, and eliminate rivals by targeting their trails. Balance aggressive expansion with tactical defense to climb the global leaderboard.

title: Shape Shift
description:
Shape Shift is a fast-paced arcade game set in colorful outer space. Pilot your spaceship through a field of moving geometric shapes and collect the correct targets to score points.

But stay sharp, the target shape or color constantly changes. One moment you must collect blue circles, the next moment it might switch to red triangles. Grab the right shapes and avoid the wrong ones as long as you can!

title: Bunny Blox
description: Help the Bunny collect as many blox as possible. Match 3 or more items. Slide left or right to move the item. Slide up to rotate and slide down to drop the item. Special rewards appear during the game. Use them wisely to destroy strategic areas.

title: Molang Match'n Munch
description:
Join Molang and Piu Piu in a heartwarming match-3 adventure! Travel the world, collect rare ingredients, and solve sweet puzzles to save the lost recipes in the Great Book of Flavors before they vanish forever!
Travel through the world's greatest real and imaginary cities, collect rare ingredients, and solve delicious match-3 puzzles to advance and save these culinary treasures!

title: Night Club Security
description:
Immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of a security guard simulator inspired by the cult game I'm Security.

Check visitors for prohibited items, decide who is worthy of entry and who is not. Your power is absolute, because you are an unlimited security guard! Use your imagination to have fun and unusual "entertainment" with visitors, leaving them without things or even with a couple of bruises. Everything that happens is in your hands.

title: GT Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 awesome cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills?

title: Pool Duel
description: Keep your focus sharp as the clock ticks down, knowing that timing and precision will lead you to victory. Master your aim and cue control, because flawless execution and smart strategy separate true champions from the rest in every challenging match.

title: Vortex Ball
description: Roll through an ever-changing, vibrant tunnel filled with deadly obstacles and tricky hurdles. Test your reflexes as you dodge, weave, and survive as long as you can in this fast-paced infinite runner. Collect gems along the way and unlock 27 unique balls from the shop. With only 2 balls to start, every gem counts. The tunnel never ends, the colors keep shifting, and the challenge only gets harder. How far can you go? Compete for the highest score and prove your skills!

title: Mahjong Triple 3D Tile Match
description: Jump into a fresh and relaxing brain challenge with Mahjong Triple 3D - Tile Match, a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game that brings the classic mahjong experience into a colorful 3D world! In this game, the tiles are stacked in beautiful 3D shapes. Your goal is simple but satisfying: tap and collect three identical tiles to clear them from the board.

title: Monster Squad Rush
description:
Assemble your squad of powerful monsters, evolve them into champions, and claim victory in the ultimate battle arena. Adventure, strategy, and competition await!

Whether you’re rushing through the course, collecting monsters, or battling for supremacy, Monster Squad Rush offers non-stop action and fun. Build your legacy as the ultimate monster trainer and conquer the arena today!

title: Gas Station - Stick Simulator
description: You start with a small gas station in the middle of the highway, where everything depends on you. Service cars, fill up with gas, earn coins, and build even bigger! Over time, your gas station will grow into a true empire: with a store, restroom, cafe, and even a hot dog delivery service. The more customers, the more profit, upgrades, and fun!

title: Traffic Tap Survival
description: Traffic Tap Survival is a fast-paced traffic puzzle game where every tap matters. Control busy intersections, avoid crashes, and guide cars through dangerous roads filled with obstacles and tight turns. With simple controls, challenging levels, and intense survival gameplay, this addictive traffic management game will test your timing and reflexes. Perfect for fans of car puzzle games, traffic control games, and casual brain challenges.

title: Obby Highest Jump Ever
description:
Obby Highest Jump Ever is a click-based jumping and climbing game where every click makes you stronger. Start from a small 10M building and push your way up to massive 2500M towers as your jump power grows step by step. Each new height feels like a new milestone, and every rooftop trophy proves you earned it.

Your goal is simple: jump higher, reach the top, and collect trophies. The higher the building, the bigger the reward.

title: Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles
description:
Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles is a relaxing jigsaw-style puzzle game where you assemble beautiful images piece by piece. Enjoy a calming experience as each picture comes to life under your fingertips!
Who It's For
Ideal for puzzle lovers, casual players, and anyone who enjoys peaceful, visually pleasing gameplay.
Start assembling now with Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles — discover a cozy world of delightful puzzles!

title: Bubble Shooter Wonders of Egypt
description: Journey into an ancient Egyptian night in Bubble Shooter Pyramid Quest! Match and pop glossy bubbles to climb rising score goals. Fill the goal bar to trigger quick celebrations, then push onward as the ceiling creeps closer. Beat your High score, earn a second chance with a rewarded continue, and watch desert backdrops shift as you progress. Easy to start, hard to master—aim, bounce, and clear your way to legend! Start in Beginner, then unlock Medium and Hard as your score surges ever higher!

title: Fun Mini Games For Kids
description: Welcome to Fun Mini Games For Kids, a casual minigame collection for kids on H5games4u. Are you a game lover? Want to enjoy diverse types of relaxing minigames all in one? Join H5games4u's best kids games. Play doctor simulation games, match shapes in avatar-making games, dress up Brainrot memes, or design room settings.

title: Puzzle Blocks
description:
Race against time in tense speed battles, employ tactical thinking in rescue missions, and unwind by creating massive structures in free-play mode. Hone your skills assembling perfect puzzles or challenge the ever-accelerating chaos.

Puzzle Blocks is more than a game; it's a curated collection of perfectly crafted puzzles for any mood. The world of puzzles awaits its hero. Can you conquer every challenge?

title: Candy Crunch: Sugar Escape
description:
Candy Crunch is a puzzle game where players move colorful block shapes to matching exits.

Each level challenges you to slide and reposition tightly packed blocks with different shapes and colors.

New obstacles appear as you progress, keeping gameplay fresh yet easy to understand. Levels are short, intuitive, and designed for quick, casual sessions.

With smooth controls and relaxing puzzles, Candy Crunch is perfect for logic and problem-solving fans.

title: Flick Shot Soccer
description: Flick Shot Soccer is a fun and addictive soccer shooting game where every goal is all about precision. Simply drag to aim and position your shot, then release to kick and send the ball flying into the net. Easy controls make it perfect for anyone to pick up and play, while smart angles and timing are needed to score consistently.

title: Bottle Logic
description: Bottle Logic is a satisfying drag-and-drop puzzle where you move and organize bottles into the correct places with smooth, intuitive controls. Enjoy 500+ handcrafted levels that steadily increase in challenge—providing the perfect daily brain cardio—plus an endless mode for non-stop play. Perfect for quick sessions or long relaxing runs, this game is designed for puzzle lovers who enjoy strategic thinking and clean, minimalist visuals.

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: A premium, modern Sliding Puzzle game featuring progressive levels, AI auto-solve, custom themes, and satisfying sound effects. Challenge yourself with 3x3, 4x4, and 5x5 grids. Arrange numbered tiles in order by sliding them into the empty space. Perfect for brain training and logic improvement!

title: Bingo Halloween
description: A Halloween-themed bingo game where you can win exciting bingos to unlock spooky candy-themed images. Enjoy multiple call speeds and progressive unlocks.

title: Clay Craft Tycoon
description: Clay Craft Tycoon is a fun factory management game where you build and grow your own clay production business. Process raw clay, craft products like pots, plates, and cups, store them in your warehouse, and sell to outside markets. Complete daily tasks, earn cash at every stage, and expand your factory with new production units to become the ultimate clay tycoon!

title: Build an Aquapark
description:
? Welcome to the craziest water park! ?

Build your own dream water slide and ride it at full speed! Buy parts, combine them however you like, and create the longest, fastest, and craziest tracks in the game.

title: Stick Hero Battle
description: Stick Hero Battle is a fast-paced and explosive action fighting game that throws you straight into intense battle arenas. The game features easy-to-learn controls with deep combat mechanics. Control a fearless stick hero and fight your way through waves of enemies using powerful attacks, smart movement, and perfect timing.

title: Mahjong connect tiles
description: Mahjong Connect Tiles is a classic tile-matching puzzle game. We have combined the authentic charm of the traditional Mahjong Solitaire with modern convenience to create the perfect game for seniors and puzzle lovers of all ages. If you are looking for a relaxing yet intellectually engaging way to spend your time, this game is designed for you.

title: Slide Block Puzzle
description: Slide Block Puzzle is an addictive puzzle game. With no timer or pressure, every move is a calming and satisfying challenge for your brain. Solve color block puzzles, arrange blocks to escape from challenging boxes, a game that provides a fun and satisfying experience.

title: Ole Bunny
description: Ole Bunny plunges you into a crazy arena where a cute bunny finds himself because of his love for roses ! Now you must show courage and skill to escape the wild bulls and collect as many fragrant roses as possible. Can you become the best bunny matador of all time?

title: Dog Merge Mania
description: Merge cute puppies! Unlock breeds & grow your own fluffy dog paradise! A Relaxing Escape: The perfect mix of chill gameplay and light strategy.

title: Relaxing cubes and campfire
description: A relaxing and peaceful game with delightful campfire sounds! You can easily learn how to play and win - just place blocks to create and remove vertical and horizontal lines. The game is suitable for all ages.

title: Word Search Universe 2
description: Word Search Universe 2 is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you find hidden words across many themed levels. Explore categories like science, history, food, nature, and more while sharpening your focus and vocabulary. Simply swipe letters to form words, complete challenges, and unlock new chapters. With clean visuals, smooth controls, and hundreds of words to discover.

title: Tsunami Brainrots Online
description: Tsunami Brainrots Online is a fast-paced survival experience inspired by meme culture and chaotic movement gameplay. Players must escape a massive tsunami wave while exploring dangerous areas, collecting valuable brainrot characters, and returning safely before time runs out. The game offers an online single-player mode where you can interact with others through chat, as well as a local 2 player option for shared-screen action.

title: Bubble Shooter Crystal Hunt
description: Bubble Shooter Crystal Hunt is an exciting endless bubble-shooting puzzle game where players must collect specific target bubbles along with rare magical crystals that appear among the bubbles. Aim carefully and match three or more bubbles of the same color to clear space while the bubble wall slowly moves toward the border line, increasing tension with every shot. Crystals are hidden within bubble clusters and must also be collected to progress and boost scores.

title: Ultimate Tower Defense
description: Ultimate Tower Defense is an exciting strategy game that perfectly blends tower defense, battle, and fast-paced action into one addictive experience. In the game, you must carefully protect defense towers and deploy powerful heroes to stop endless waves of enemies. Each tower has unique attack abilities. Select your preferred mode to begin the challenge.

title: Tap 3D Blocks
description: Layers upon layers of dice await your skillful touch. Some puzzles ask you to think. This one dares you to see the whole picture. Flip, rotate and reveal new tiles as you uncover unexpected paths. Boosters lend a hand, but the strategy is all yours.

title: FlowBall
description: Feel the adrenaline in an exciting 3D arcade game where you control a glowing ball racing through an endless tunnel! Avoid traps, chasms and obstacles, defying the laws of gravity. Your goal is to collect glowing dots to unlock new levels and set records! But be careful: falling into the abyss takes away lives, and losing them leads to defeat!

title: Pick Brainrot: 3D Battle
description: Choose one of two Brainrots, transform into them, and engage in intense battles with other players. Defeat opponents and unlock new abilities: a Brainrot morph, unique weapons, and powerful abilities. Every battle is a chance to prove yourself! At level 5, you'll unlock a protective shield, and at level 10, you'll unlock slow-motion , which will give you a huge advantage in battle. Earn titles for your victories, from "Noob" to a true "Pro"!

title: Obby Pinata Party
description: Help the Obby guy to fight those pinatas and Explore the world. Choose from wide variety of weapons, collect coins and upgrade them. Make the pinatas give you every penny they have!

title: Yarn Fever! Unravel Puzzle
description: Yarn Fever! Unravel Puzzle is a soothing thread-sorting challenge that blends creativity with logic. Organize colorful yarns across tricky boards, using boosters like the Magic Box, New Hole, or Broom when levels get tough. Customize your setup with extra slots and boxes, and enjoy calm, vibrant visuals. With progressively harder puzzles, it’s both relaxing and rewarding for sorting and puzzle fans alike.

title: That's my seat!
description: That's My Seat! is a fun and engaging logic puzzle game where you must place characters in the correct seats by analyzing clues. Each level presents a new seating challenge with unique rules and relationships between the characters. Study the hints, think carefully, and figure out where everyone belongs. Perfect for fans of logic puzzles, brain games, deduction games, and casual puzzle games that test your thinking skills.

title: Dungeon Master – Cult & Craft
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of a mysterious dungeon, where you are its keeper and master! Turn simple stickmen into devoted followers capable of mining ore and creating value for your dark empire. Develop the Cult, manage resources and expand the boundaries of your underground Universe!

title: Magic Bottles
description: Magic Bottles is a calming yet cleverly challenging color-sorting puzzle game. Pour liquids between bottles until each one contains only a single color. While the rules are simple, levels become increasingly complex, introducing new bottle types, tricky layouts, and situations that demand careful planning. Perfect for puzzle fans and players who enjoy logical challenges, Magic Bottles offers a relaxing yet engaging brain-training experience. Restore perfect order, one puzzle at a time.

title: Colossatron
description:
Take charge of a giant robotic snake and smash through cities with ease as you fight to create the most fearsome weapon of all time.
Unleash the power of Colossatron! A unique combination of Match 3 and Snake gameplay allows you to build a devastating machine by merging colored power ups to create new and more powerful weapons. With thousands of potential combinations, the key to victory lies in mastering the art of building Colossatron to take down formidable bosses.

title: Magic Bubbles
description: Quick games, satisfying pops and constant rewards — what’s not to love? Enjoy a bubble shooter built for endless play, with weekly bonuses, boosters that change the game and the Lucky Wheel for a little extra fun. There’s always something new to pop.

title: The Roman Empire Colosseum
description: The war in the colosseum has never been as epic as in this game! Arrange your units and send them into battle! This online game is a battle simulator similar to Totally Accurate Battle Simulator. Your units include warriors, riders, titans, dwarves, mages, and more.

title: Fox Adventure
description:
Is a dynamic endless runner that brings back the spirit of classic arcade games!
Run or Lose! Control a brave fox in a world where danger lurks at every step. Fiery meteors rain down from the sky, and deadly spikes cover the ground. Your reflexes are your best weapon. Jump, dodge, and survive as long as you can!
Build Your Collection Grab gold coins along the way! Visit the shop to unlock unique looks: become a futuristic Cyber-Fox, put on a Clown costume, wear the Royal robe.

title: Zindex
description:
You are in an epidemic-stricken zone. The streets are filled with hordes of hungry zombies, and the survivors have long since abandoned this place. Your only hope for rescue is to repair an abandoned radio tower and call for help.
Explore dangerous locations, scavenge houses, crates, and closets in search of valuable resources. Gather materials to craft weapons, tools, and essential items. Fight zombies in melee combat or use firearms—the choice is yours.

title: Cunning Ginger
description: Cunning Ginger is a super fun game that'll give you lots of excitement and intense emotions! The game follows the adventures of a cute red cat, Ginger, as he goes on a great journey around the world. He's catching falling food items and dodging all sorts of dangerous things along the way. Your goal in the game is to help Ginger explore the world and pick up as many goodies as possible. But beware - there are tons of dangerous obstacles that could harm your furry friend.

title: Block Sniper
description:
Pixelated sniper action game where you have to complete various missions in a blocky world. 
Game where you are a sniper who performs various missions in a block-based world.

title: Rich Choice Run
description: Rich Choice Run is a fun swipe runner where every decision shapes your final lifestyle. Slide left and right to pick the best “boyfriend” choices and grab expensive items along the way. Your choices build your value and status—choose wisely, because one bad pick can ruin your chance.

title: Axe Throw
description:
Ready to test your precision? Welcome to Axe Throw, the ultimate test of aim and timing. The rules are simple, but the challenge is endless. You have one goal: Break the target.

But be careful—the path to victory is rigged with danger. Explosive bombs are moving, and blocking your way. One wrong move, and it's game over!

title: Noob Village Tower Defense
description: Dive into the dynamic world of a 2D platformer, where you play as a noob fighting for the survival of your village! Your main goal is to protect the village from endless waves of monsters appearing from an ominous portal. Control the tower manually: select shells, adjust the trajectory and shoot enemies one by one. Only your accuracy and tactics will help you survive the onslaught!

title: Stack Tower Pro
description: Test your precision in this addictive 3D block stacking game! Build the tallest skyscraper, unlock stunning themes, and master the art of balance. Can you reach the stars?

title: 2048 Merge World
description: The numbers are multiplying and the board is filling up. It's up to you to manage the chaos! Think quickly, act strategically and merge numbers to create bigger and better values. Be smart, but don’t forget to trust your intuition when making moves on the board.

title: 2048 Mayhem.io
description: Welcome to 2048 Mayhem.io! Combine the classic 2048 puzzle mechanics with thrilling .io snake survival gameplay. Collect cubes to grow your tail, merge identical numbers, and hunt down smaller players to become the biggest 2048 cube in the arena. Use your dash ability to escape danger or catch your prey. Can you reach 2048 and dominate the leaderboard?

title: My Cake Shop: Bake & Serve
description: Run your own sweet bakery in My Cake Shop! Bake and stack colorful donuts, clean messy floors, and serve hungry customers. Expand across the world by unlocking new bakery locations and upgrading machines. Manage crowds, grow your patisserie empire, and become the ultimate idle arcade tycoon!

title: Wacky Strike
description:
This time you will choose who are you actually. Well, no. Who is the strongest! Girls, or boys! So, just build a lot of towers, and buy your cool enemy! Fight like the real hero and you will cope with it, just try it!

Are you a good fighter? Then this game is for you! Just pick a side, setup your troops, and fight against your mortal enemy, do you think that it is so easy?! Then march from your castle to the enemy castle claiming ground in between.

title: The Flowers: Merge and Sell Bouquets
description: Combine flowers in the relaxing atmosphere of a summer garden and earn coins! Sell your bouquets to customers and clear your garden of unwanted flowers with your pruning shears! Earn more coins than other players to take a place on the leaderboard!

title: Thread Sort
description: Thread Sort is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game where you organize colorful threads on spools and turn them into beautiful cross-stitched pictures. Sort mixed threads by color, clear the pegs, and watch as neatly arranged strands automatically stitch a charming image on the canvas. With cozy visuals, smooth animations, and simple controls, Thread Sort is perfect for fans of sorting puzzles, knitting games, and calming casual challenges.

title: Cool SuperCars Stunts PvP
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning supercar through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Small Wardrobe
description: Small Wardrobe is a casual game designed specifically for cotton dolls. Collect and create beautiful and cute dresses for your cotton dolls, and experience heartwarming and fun stories. The game offers a variety of adorable doll clothes, shoes, and accessories. Let's happily organize and tidy up the doll's wardrobe together!

title: Goo Goo Gaga Clicker
description: Goo Goo Gaga Clicker is a fast, satisfying idle clicker built around one of the internet’s newest chaotic obsessions: the “Goo Goo Gaga” meme. Goo Goo Gaga Clicker takes the addictive, dopamine-fueled mechanics of Brainrot Clicker and gives them a surreal makeover.  What starts as a simple tap session quickly turns into a full-on collection grind where every click pushes you closer to the next weird, iconic form!

title: Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll
description:
Ready to destroy and earn? In this sandbox clicker, it's simple: choose your weapon, attack characters, and get paid for the damage you deal. The stronger your attacks, the bigger the reward!  

Use different tactics, unlock new gear, and upgrade your firepower. The further you go, the more powerful the weapons and the greater the possibilities. Ready to become the strongest fighter? Then tap, destroy, and earn!

title: Metal Bay Top Blade Power
description:
Metal Bay Top Blade Power is a top-down action game inspired by spinning blade battles.

Control a powerful metal top blade and fight against enemies in the Metal Bay arena, using real-time physics-based collisions and spin power mechanics.

Master speed, impact force, and rotation control to understand when to attack, collide, or evade.

title: 2 Player Games Kids Kitchen
description: Do you want to run your own restaurant? Want to experience the blend of collaboration and cooking fun? Join H5games4u's best restaurant tycoon game and enjoy cooking fun. You will engage in different gaming modes. The best part is that you can work together with your friends in the virtual restaurant!

title: Russian Treasure Hunter
description: You're a prospector in a big mining town: grab your device, head to a location, and search for hidden items. As your device's signal grows, you're near a treasure trove; dig up a find and take it back to town to sell. The game combines tactical exploration, economics, and collecting: clever backpack management, purchasing upgrades, and choosing the right moment to return to town determine whether you'll make a profit or leave empty-handed.

title: Desert Rover Survival
description: Desert Rover Survival is an idle survival adventure set in a harsh desert world. Begin with a simple setup and slowly build your own desert rover, upgrading parts and improving technology to push farther into the wasteland.

title: Bento Match
description:
Slide the blocks to line them up straight and clear them!
If there’s space, you can move multiple blocks at once.
You can also move blocks without clearing them, but you’ll lose 1 life.
Earn coins based on your score and use them to collect new blocks!
Collected blocks will appear randomly in the game—rare blocks give higher scores!

title: Color Jam 3D
description:
Color Jam 3D is a fun and relaxing match-and-merge puzzle game! Combine crayons of the same colors  to fill the picture and bring stunning images to life with vibrant colors.
With engaging gameplay and satisfying color-filling mechanics, Color Jam 3D offers a unique blend of puzzle-solving and artistic expression.

title: Energy Factory Idle
description: Energy Factory Idle is a relaxing idle factory game where you build and upgrade your own energy production system. Start with a small generator and turn it into a powerful factory by hiring workers, improving speed and output, and unlocking new generators. Your factory keeps working even while offline, letting you collect rewards and grow step by step. Simple controls, smooth progression, and a calm idle tycoon experience—perfect for short or long play sessions.

title: Reflect Beam: Laser Logic
description:
Logic game where every move changes the beam’s path. 

5 modes - 5 types of challenges.
Tunnel: rotate shapes and guide the beam through narrow passages.
Labyrinth: draw a safe path to the exit.
Same Colors: remove blocks of the right color to open the route.
Obstacles: move elements and clear the way for the beam.
Time is limeted: solve faster and more accurately before time runs out.

title: Maido
description: Welcome to the Maido Shop! Pull items from the box and merge them together. The more you merge, the better the items become. Do you have what it takes to unlock the final item? Set the right price to sell your goods! If it's too cheap, you lose profit. If it's too expensive, you gain nothing. Start managing your shop now!

title: Animal Racing Idle Park
description: Animal Racing: Idle Park is an addictive racing animal transform game that will keep you playing for hours. In this game, you’ll train multiple animal racers such as lions, eagles, orangutans, dolphins, and more!

title: Bubble classic
description: The goal of the game is not to lose as early as possible and to score as many points as possible. Improve your accuracy thanks to very competent rolling of balls. The more blocks with balls you destroy, the more points you accumulate. Check your results in the world rankings, maybe you are already number 1.

title: Dart Hero
description: Do you have the reflexes of a Hero? Step up to the line in Dart Hero, the fast-paced arcade game where timing is everything. Forget about complex aiming—just wait for the perfect moment and Tap to Shoot!

title: Obby Parkour Racing
description:
Welcome to Obby Parkour Racing – the game where speed, agility, and style collide to create the ultimate racing challenge!

Jump, grind, and dodge through dynamic obstacle courses on your snowboard! Prove your mastery in a world where parkour isn't just on foot
it's on a board. Every race is a new test, and only the fastest and most agile champions will claim victory.

title: Tower Stack 2026
description:
​Tap the screen or click the mouse to drop the block. The goal is to stack blocks perfectly and build the highest tower possible. It requires timing and precision.
Stack the blocks as high as you can! Test your precision and timing in this addictive arcade game.

title: Otu
description:
In OTU, you control a nimble triangle bound to a circular orbit. Your mission is simple: stay alive as long as possible. But the universe is against you! Spheres close in from the void, shrinking bars attempt to crush you, and lethal rotating lasers force you to keep moving.

Think you’ve mastered the rhythm? Every 10 seconds, the game throws a Random Debuff at you. From screen-shaking earthquakes and inverted controls to pixelated vision and orbit shifts—no two runs are ever the same!

title: Draw One Part Brain Puzzle
description: Ready to test your creativity and logic? Draw One Part: Brain Puzzle is a fun and clever brain teaser puzzle game that combines thinking with drawing. Each level shows an incomplete picture, and your task is to draw the missing part to solve the puzzle.

title: Number Place Travel
description:
Fill the grid with numbers 1–9 so that no same number appears in any row, column, or 3×3 block!
Tap a cell and choose a number to place it.
You can make up to 3 mistakes. Fill in everything correctly to clear the puzzle!

title: Soda Block Jam
description:
Slide soda crates, collect bottles, and deliver to the right
exits. A smooth, colorful puzzler that blends motion and
color-matching

title: Bloom Within: A life simulator
description:
The simulator of a pregnant mother allows you to fully experience the whole process of pregnancy.
In this anime game you have to play the role of a girl who has a loving husband and a child under her heart, who is waiting for her birth. Take care of yourself, give birth, take care of your baby and raise a healthy baby.

title: Pool Merge
description:
This is an arcade puzzle with billiard physics and 2048 merge mechanics. Shoot balls, combine identical ones and score points!
Game modes:
Classic: plan your moves, avoid overflowing the field. With each new open ball level, the limit of allowed balls on the playing field increases.
Arcade: play for time, do not let the balls fall into the holes. Merging balls adds time to the timer, balls that fall into the holes take time away.

title: Arrow Tap Puzzle
description: Arrows fill the board like traffic at a silent crossing. Some lanes are open, others blocked. Remove arrows one by one, avoid blocked paths and keep your daily streak alive. Solve the arrangement in front of you, then step into another.

title: Tank Stars
