description: Are you ready for an action-packed 2D tank warfare? Welcome to the Tank Stars, one of the best battle tank games that you can play with friends online & offline. Find the right shooting angle and unleash your iron force against your foe's war machines! Make the right shot quickly or you'll lose!

title: Sophie's Farm
description:
Plot: After a divorce, Sophie is left alone with a child. She starts from scratch, hoping to turn her life around.
Gameplay: Fulfill customer orders by matching items on the playing field. Spend your earnings to restore the farm and other locations. Each task reveals more of the story and brings you closer to the finale.

title: Guns vs Magic
description: Step into the shoes of Silvius, a courageous student of magic, as you fight to save the world from the dark powers unleashed by your former mentor, Lucius. Once a wise and benevolent wizard, Lucius has succumbed to the sinister influence of a cursed crystal, turning him into an evil sorcerer intent on dominating the world. Now, it's up to you to confront Lucius and his army of enchanted creatures in a battle of wits, power, and courage.

title: Slingshot Chicken
description: Launch your fearless chicken from a slingshot and smash through unstable pig-filled towers in an endlessly fun physics adventure! With infinite levels and constantly evolving challenges, no two runs are ever the same. Perfect your aim, trigger explosive TNT chain reactions, and watch satisfying collapses unfold as you clear every pig before your shots run out. The fun never stops — how far can you go?

title: Cake Merge
description: Cake Merge is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you build whole cakes from colorful slices. Clear the tray, trigger satisfying chain reactions, and unlock new desserts as you play. With smooth animations, cute visuals, and easy-to-learn gameplay, Cake Merge is perfect for fans of casual merge, sorting, and matching games. Earn points, level up, and enjoy the sweetest merges!

title: M5 City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: No Pain No Gain - Ragdoll Sandbox
description: A ragdoll sandbox physics game where you place traps, cause pain, and earn coins for every hit. The more it hurts, the more you get.

title: Scala 40
description:
Scala 40 is an Italian card game played with two French decks and jokers.

Players form sets and runs to reach at least 40 points and lay down their first combinations.

Each turn, players draw and discard, trying to optimize their hand and use their own or opponents’ combinations.

The first player to run out of cards wins, while the others add up the points of their remaining cards.

title: TapKO
description: One-tap fighter game. From the creators of Fruit Ninja and Jetpack Joyride, get ready to rumble with TapKO - the knockout idle game that packs a punch! Jab, bob, and weave your way to the top, and train your fighter to become the ultimate boxer.

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Arrow Escape: Puzzle
description:
“Arrow Escape: Puzzle” is a logic puzzle where arrows block each other, and your goal is to untangle routes and clear the level by choosing the correct move order.

- Short levels you can play in a minute.  
- Focus on logic and move order, not speed.  
- Simple controls: one tap — one move.

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is a creative and exciting puzzle game that combines drawing and rescue gameplay into one addictive experience. You become a bridge designer, using your finger to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Enter the car mode, draw a strong bridge to help a motor cross gaps, broken roads, and dangerous obstacles to reach the goal.

title: Cubica
description:
Get lost in a tranquil atmosphere with Cubica, a fun puzzle game designed to relax with a simple brain teaser. It's very simple! Blast blocks of identical colored cubes to make them disappear, making room for new ones. No rush, no complicated rules, just enjoy the game.
Immerse yourself in soft colors, pleasant sounds, and smooth gameplay that will allow you to forget about the hustle and bustle.

title: Key Quest
description: Golden Key is a challenging escape game where you must solve a series of puzzles to escape mysterious rooms. Use logic and memory to find useful items, uncover secrets, and solve clever riddles until you discover the Golden Key.

title: Grenade Simulator
description: Begin the most explosive simulator experience ever. Grenade Simulator is an adrenaline-pumping explosion simulator where you can freely throw grenades, drop mines, and trigger massive blasts. This isn’t just a casual game.

title: School simulator: My school
description:
Welcome to School Simulator: My School! In this game you need to manage your school, open new classrooms, toilets, canteen, hire staff and help students to learn.
The more classes, the more schoolchildren. The more schoolchildren, the more money. The more money, the more opportunities to develop the school.

title: Forest Match 4
description: Forest Match 4 is back with the highly anticipated fourth chapter of the beloved Match 3 series! Return to the enchanting forest to collect juicy fruits, uncover hidden coin chests, and discover sparkling gems across 4,620+ exciting levels. Follow your fairy guide back to the charming village and journey along a beautifully crafted saga map. Can you complete level goals with limited moves? Use powerful boosters when you need an extra push.

title: Beat The Zombies
description: Beat the Zombies is a vertical action RPG blending strategy and adventure. Explore a dangerous plant-zombie world, fight through stages, and defeat all plant zombies in your way!

title: Wood Screw Puzzle
description: Wood Screw Puzzle is a satisfying logic game where you untangle wood screws, nuts, and bolts from clever wooden structures. Each level challenges your spatial thinking as you analyze, plan, and carefully unscrew fasteners in the right order. Beautiful visuals and tactile mechanics make every puzzle feel rewarding and immersive.

title: Pyramidz
description: Unleash the power of the gods in PyramidZ, a twist on the classic Match-3 genre where you slide entire rows and columns to align sacred hieroglyphs and trigger ancient magic.

title: Zombies Weapon Merge 4
description: Zombies are swarming. Are you ready to fight back? Zombies 4 – Weapon Merge is an exciting shooting and strategy game where every decision matters. Match and merge weapons to create powerful guns, then aim and shoot endless waves of zombies. Combine identical weapons, upgrade your firepower, and place them smartly to survive tougher enemies.

title: Xytrian Runner
description: Xytrian is an endless flight runner where you pilot a spaceship through a dangerous course. Dodge obstacles, score points, and survive as long as you can! Click to control your shuttle and hit the timing perfectly! Only precise altitude changes will let you overcome the obstacles ahead.

title: Obby Yard Sale
description:
Open your own trade right in the yard of your house! Order boxes with mysterious goods, unpack them and put them up for sale to passers-by. Each item can be common or rare and legendary, which makes every purchase special.
Keep an eye on your yard: buyers not only buy goods, but also try to steal them. Your task is to stop the thief in time and collect a collection of all types of items, turning simple yard trading into an exciting adventure.

title: Fish Love Pins
description: Fish Love Pins is a physics-based game that requires players to actively use their brains to figure out how to complete each level. The game is very easy to play, but as you progress through the levels, the difficulty gradually increases.

title: Arrow Slide Puzzle
description:
Arrow Slide Puzzle — Logic Puzzle Game
Arrow Slide Puzzle is a clean and engaging logic puzzle game where you slide arrows across the board to clear the field and reveal a hidden picture. Simple rules turn into deep challenges that test your logic, planning, and spatial thinking. Perfect for fans of arrow puzzles, sliding logic games, and relaxing brain teasers.

? Download now and start solving today!

title: Escape School Duel
description: Escape School Duel is a fast, funny, and tense escape challenge set inside a school that does not want to let you leave. Play solo to chase your best time, or go 2 player and turn every hallway into a race for freedom. One moment you are dodging traps, the next you are trying to slip past the principal in a long corridor or outsmart a teacher waiting near the classroom. Every section has its own danger, so learning the school layout is part of the strategy.

title: Slinky Color Sort
description: Slinky Color Sort Puzzle is a relaxing color-therapy game where you sort bright slinky rings into matching stacks. Easy to play yet surprisingly challenging, it’s perfect for calming down while keeping your brain active. Enjoy smooth gameplay, colorful levels, and satisfying logic puzzles.

title: Farm Blast
description: Farm Blast is a colorful level-based blast puzzle game set on a vibrant farm. Complete exciting objectives, overcome tricky obstacles, and unlock powerful boosters as you progress through hundreds of engaging levels. With bright visuals, satisfying chain reactions, and strategic gameplay, this addictive casual puzzle game is perfect for fans of match-3 games, farm games, and relaxing yet challenging brain teasers.

title: Racing Ball Adventure
description:
Race down massive slopes at high speed through stunning green plains, cliffs, and canyons!
In this thrilling arcade adventure, collect the mystical Crystal to save the world from an impending disaster.
Grab your sphere and start your journey — an epic low-poly adventure awaits!

title: Fruit Sort Logic
description: Fruit Sort Logic is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you sort colorful fruit juices on shelves. Move the juices around and match three of the same kind to clear a shelf. Space is limited, so each move matters. Clear all shelves to finish the level and unlock new ones. With smooth controls, bright visuals, and endless levels, the game is easy to play and satisfying to master. Perfect for a calm but clever puzzle experience.

title: Avenger Guard
description: Dark forces have destroyed your homeland—rise as the Avenger Guard! Merge heroes to unlock power, fortify defenses, and take vengeance. Lead your legendary squad to repel waves of enemies, upgrade through fusion, and reclaim what’s yours. Will you be the last line of defense?

title: Accurate 2D
Italian Brainrot Drag Merge Puzzle
description: A Revolutionary Jigsaw Experience. Each level, one image is randomly selected and split into 3×3, 4×4, 5×5, or 6×6 pieces, then completely shuffled. Your goal is simple: restore the picture by placing every piece in its correct position. But this is no ordinary jigsaw. When two neighboring pieces are placed correctly next to each other, they merge into a single movable cluster. Instead of slow, one-by-one placement, you can drag any piece or merged group onto another to instantly swap positions.

title: Bowmasters
description: Bowmasters is a fun and action-packed game that combines creative physics with exciting Archery gameplay. Use different types of bows and weapons. Draw your weapon, judge the angle, and fire arrows to hit all enemies. The game shines with its physics-based mechanics, where timing, distance, and trajectory matter. You’ll need real skill and smart thinking to solve each shooting puzzle and land accurate hits. Every match feels different thanks to unique characters and varied weapons.

title: 2048 Block Fusion
description:
"2048 Block Fusion" is not just 2048. This is a new generation of numerical puzzles where blocks fall, merge, increase their values and unlock unexpected possibilities!

Choose one of the three modes:
Adventures — complete levels, unlock special blocks and solve problems with a limited number of moves.
Advanced — endless mode with bonuses and special blocks for those who love freedom and strategy.
Classic — familiar mechanics without unnecessary elements, for the pure pleasure of merging.

title: Word Cross
description:
Word Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind.
Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday!

Word Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges.

► Features:
     ◆ 6000+ challenging levels.
     ◆ Well designed grass & wooden theme.
     ◆ Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary!
     ◆ Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers.
     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.

title: Neon Dash: Cyber Run
description:
Neon Dash: Cyber Run is a high-speed endless runner set in a glowing cyber world.
Jump over deadly spikes, pass through portals to shift themes, and survive as
the game speed increases over time.

The game is designed for short, replayable sessions with instant restarts.
Perfect for both desktop and mobile players.

title: Brainrot World Hole.io
description: Brainrot World Hole.io is a hilarious casual hole game packed with chaotic brainrot energy and funny Italian meme vibes. Control a growing hole and dive into a crazy world where swallowing everything in sight is the key to victory. Move around the map and collect objects smaller than your hole.

title: Nubik: Create Your Place
description:
Nubik: Create Your Place – a game about Nubiks. In this game, you can create your own 'place' – meaning your own game. Choose the game type, build a level from blocks, set Nubik spawn points, and play.

You can play the game solo or with a friend. However, you can also create a 'place' (game) and simply watch how Nubiks (bots) play it.

The game features many skins for Nubiks, achievements, a leaderboard, and chat.

title: Stardom Alt-Girls Fashion Duel
description: Welcome to the world of daring alternative glamour! Meet two star heroines - Sydney and Sabrina. Help them go beyond the usual and try on the most daring alternative images: from a gentle soft-grunge princess to a gloomy rock diva. In the game, you can make bright makeup with arrows and sparkles; create unusual hairstyles; collect memorable outfits from tops, corsets, mini skirts and oversized jackets. Create your own collection of stunning Alt-girl looks!

title: Shadowman Runner
description:
Shadowman Runner is a dark, atmospheric endless runner inspired by the minimalist silhouette style of Limbo and the fast-paced arcade spirit of games like Soul Knight and Alto’s Adventure. Set in a mysterious black-and-shadow world, the game challenges your reflexes, timing, and focus.
You play as a lone runner sprinting through a dangerous jungle landscape. Your goal is simple yet addictive: run as far as you can, collect potions to score points, and survive.

title: Rainbow Friends Hide And Seek
description: Rainbow Friends Hide And Seek is an exciting and fast-paced hide-and-seek adventure game set in a colorful yet dangerous rainbow world. Step into this thrilling role-playing experience, choose your role, and get ready for an unforgettable adventure.

title: Blockibo: Color Blocks
description:
Blockibo: Color Blocks is a fun and thoughtful puzzle game where every move matters.
Move colorful blocks, unlock gates, overcome obstacles and use boosters to clear the board.

title: Color Wood Animal Jam
description: Begin a charming logic puzzle match game in Color Wood Animal Jam. Drag the colorful wooden animal pieces into their correct spots. Complete each delightful jam puzzle. One wrong move can make the color block jam even trickier.

title: Stand on the Right Color, Robby!
description: “Stand on the Right Color, Robby!” is a fast arcade race on shifting colored tiles. React to color changes, jump from tile to tile, and stay on the right color to avoid falling. Beat rivals to the finish, earn currency, and unlock fun Robby skins, items, and effects as you climb the leaderboard!

title: Find the Vampire
description: Looking for an exciting vampire game? This is a casual 3D game where you act as a hunter to put an end to the vampire uprising. Your task is to identify the bloodsuckers among us, destroy them and free the city from the threat.

title: Idle PinBall - Merge Clicker
description: Welcome to an exciting mobile game for those who love to combine elements and enjoy simple but addictive gameplay. Minimalistic 3D graphics, dynamic combinations and the ability to play for free, even without an Internet connection are waiting for you.

title: Obby vs Zombies
description: Obby vs Zombies is an innovative, fun-filled action game that captivated the gaming world. It challenges players to create mazes of different characters to fend off hordes of incoming zombies. The wide variety of options for attack and defense make this a highly strategic game with lots of replay value.

title: Valentines Hidden Alphawords
description: Valentines Hidden Alphawords is a charming and relaxing Valentine’s Day–themed puzzle game where love meets word discovery. Explore beautifully designed romantic scenes filled with hidden letters waiting to be found. Each completed level reveals a sweet and heartwarming caption that perfectly matches the image. With 30 engaging levels, increasing challenges, and a ticking clock with useful hints, the game keeps players entertained while celebrating the spirit of love.

title: Snow Rider Obby Parkour
description:
Snow Rider Obby Parkour is a fast-paced snowboard adventure where reflexes, timing, and control matter. Play solo or with a friend in split-screen mode and experience different snow challenges across multiple game modes. Whether you want to beat distance records, explore a massive open world, or race down dangerous mountains, this game offers a complete snowboarding experience.

Master your snowboard, perform double jumps, and unlock amazing gear to customize your character!

title: Police Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 awesome police cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Luxury Highway Cars!

title: Thread Match 2
description:
Thread Match 2 is a satisfying logic puzzle game that combines color matching, layered challenges, and calming embroidery visuals.

Solve clever thread puzzles by planning the correct order of moves and dismantling complex constructions. Each level challenges your brain with blocked and unlocked elements, where strategy and attention matter more than speed.

title: Gas Station: Junkyard Tycoon
description: Build Your Dream Gas Station and Garage Tycoon Empire! Take charge in Gas Station Simulator Inc., the ultimate game for oil tycoon enthusiasts, idle games managers, and aspiring entrepreneurs! Manage, rebuild, and expand the gas station simulator, clean up your junkyard, and fix cars in this immersive and rewarding gas station simulator.

title: Valentines Love Link
description: Valentines Love Link is a cute and relaxing matching puzzle game full of hearts, roses, chocolates, and love symbols. Connect matching Valentines items with straight lines, allowing up to two turns. Beat the clock across 48 levels by collecting all tiles and enjoy a sweet romantic theme.

title: Jewels Blitz Legends
description: Embark on a dazzling adventure in Jewels Blitz Legends, the epic sequel to the beloved Match 3 hit! Travel through ancient Inca temples, uncover mystical secrets, and match colorful gems to unlock treasures. Explore Machu Picchu, complete hundreds of challenging levels, and take on exciting daily missions and weekly events. Collect gold, magical artifacts, and experience stunning visuals in this addictive journey through the heart of ancient legend!

title: Daily Match
description: Connect tiles with a great number of pictures in pairs within the limited time. As you crush all the tiles on the board, you can win the level! Become a tile master level by level! Play faster and faster to train your brain and exercise the link technology!

title: Penguin Farm - Ice Merge
description:
Explore a world of frozen islands where penguins run their own farm. Collect resources, merge wood, build and upgrade buildings to open up new territories. Develop your settlement step by step, expand your glaciers, and watch your income grow.
Train your penguins, improve production, and head to the ocean for rewards—there drift chests filled with valuable treasures. Upgrade each building, manage your resources, and turn your small island into a thriving icy farm.

title: Cute cat's adventures
description: An adventure game for girls about a cat, with whom you have to go in search of kittens. Colorful levels await you, filled with traps, obstacles and secrets, as well as dangerous enemies who will try to prevent you from completing your main goal.

title: VR World
description:
If you seen VR games on TikTok where you can manipulate little people like puppets, and you like it, then this is the game for you.

- In the game, you can fight with little people and drag and manipulate them like in a VR game.
- The game runs without any special VR equipment. All you need is a computer or smartphone. It's all in the browser, no downloads required!
- The game offers various jobs, such as police officer and ambulance driver!

title: Nautilus Spaceship Escape
description: There is an eerie silence on the Nautilus, an intergalactic spaceship. You have just been asleep when the power goes out for a moment. An uneasy feeling creeps over you - something is wrong here. Could there have been an attack? Get up, explore the surroundings and find out what has happened!

title: Italian Animals: Create Your Own Brainrot!
description: Create your own crazy Brainrot! Mix bodies, heads, and legs to create absurd Italian creatures, listen to their "passports" and keep your masterpieces as keepsakes. Creative chaos is in your hands!

title: Superheroes and the Wand
description: You will play as a Wand character who had a strange dream about a sorcerer. Soon, in reality, the sorcerer from Stickman dream appears in the city and begins to do evil. Wand, together with the Superheroes, decide to teach the sorcerer a lesson. But not everything is so easy to do. The following superheroes are waiting for you: Blushing, Green Man, Bobo, Cudgel, Bruise, Flyer, Captain Captain and others. Among the enemies will be the Wizard, Anrik, the Clown and others.

title: Super Brain
description: In the game, you'll control a character sprinting down a track, but your path is blocked by a series of "Gates of Knowledge." Each gate presents an interesting question, and you must choose the lane corresponding to the correct answer in a short amount of time to pass through. A wrong choice ends the run! As you get faster, the questions become trickier. This game tests not only your knowledge but also your on-the-spot reaction skills. Come join this dual challenge of brain and speed!

title: Italian Animal Alchemy - Brainrot
description:
Dive into a world of crazy Italian creatures, where logic meets memes! Combine animals and objects to create the strangest and funniest Italian mutants!
A true meme zoo awaits you here, where creativity knows no bounds! Experiment, discover rare mutants, and share your results with friends to prove you have the most epic brainrot.

title: Taylor Dress Studio Preppy & Wild West & Glam
description: Welcome to the dress-up game, in which the pop diva tries on three completely different fashionable looks: a youthful preppy bow, a cowboy outfit and a glamorous stage look. In addition, you can experiment with hairstyles and change the makeup of the heroine. Complete the images with accessories: glasses, hats and jewelry. Choose clothes and combine elements from different sets to create delicate, daring or superstar bows. Turn Taylor into an icon of any style!

title: Fruit Jam Master
description: Enter the juiciest and most addictive puzzle adventure ever. Enjoy a fun logic puzzle game in Fruit Jam Master. You need to help all the animals leave the grassland to win. Pay attention to the color of the food. Animals can only pass through when the food matches their own color.

title: Besties Chinese New Year Celebration
description: Besties Chinese New Year Celebration invites you into a joyful world of color, tradition, and friendship as you help best friends prepare for the Lunar New Year. Dress them up in beautiful traditional outfits, elegant modern looks, and festive accessories inspired by Chinese New Year celebrations.

title: Summon Tribe
description: Summon Tribe is a simple merge-and-defense game where you combine identical units to create stronger ones to stop enemies. It’s easy, mostly for passing time, and it also supports idle play.

title: Obby Prison Run
description: Obby Prison Run is an intense obstacle course game where escape is the only option—and survival is everything. Sprint, leap, and dodge through deadly traps and twisted takes on classic childhood games. Outsmart your rivals and stay ahead in the race for freedom, where every second counts and only the sharpest make it out alive.

title: Prison Master: Escape Journey
description: Prison Master Escape Journey is a thrilling prison escape simulator that challenges your brain and strategic thinking! Trapped inside a high-security prison, you must plan every move carefully and begin an intense adventure toward freedom.

title: Remove The Blocks
description: Challenging 3D puzzle game where you strategically clear the blocks from complex formations. Click blocks to slide them out in their facing direction, but choose wisely - each move affects the entire structure. With increasingly difficult levels, time-based scoring, and smooth 3D graphics, test your spatial reasoning skills!

title: Steal Brainrot Original 3D
description: Buy rare animals—from the entry-level Nubini Pitzanini to Tralalelo Tralal and Los Tralaleritos. Place them in your base, create ideal conditions, and start earning! Each animal generates income ? and opens the door to new opportunities. Grow your collection, improve your infrastructure, experiment with your team composition, and increase your profits. Want more income? Buy new, rarer animals and build your financial empire.

title: Hook Pin Jam
description: Hook Jam is an addictive puzzle game where you untangle and release hooks to clear the board and earn rewards. Each level challenges your logic and planning with increasingly complex layouts. Solve puzzles efficiently, unlock new stages, and test your problem-solving skills in this clever, satisfying brain game.

title: Color Nuts
description:
Color Nuts is a relaxing and addictive color-matching puzzle game where you place colorful nuts on the board and connect three or more of the same color to clear them.

Plan your moves carefully, complete level objectives, and keep the board from filling up. Easy to learn and hard to master, Color Nuts is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of match-3, block puzzles, and logic games.

title: Crazy Bar Brawl
description: Crazy Bar Brawl ?? throws you straight into the most chaotic, hilarious, and action-packed bar battles ever! If you’ve ever wondered what would happen if you walked into a bar full of drunk troublemakers ?, flying bottles ?, wobbling chairs ?, and wild characters who can barely stand… well, now you can experience it ALL—safely, virtually, and with maximum comedy!

title: K-Pop Hunters Valentine Style
description: K-Pop Hunters Valentine Style brings romance, fashion, and K-pop glamour together in one stylish dress-up experience. Help your favorite K-pop hunters transform their looks for Valentine’s Day with stunning outfits, flawless makeup, and charming accessories.

title: Two Stunt Supercars
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning supercar through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Hot & Cold Winter Style
description: Princesses Eliza and Milana are going on winter vacation, but for each of the girls, winter vacation will be special. Eliza lives in snowy regions and loves fluffy fur coats, warm scarves and winter dresses. Milana celebrates her holidays under palm trees and chooses swimsuits, light capes and bright accessories. Players will have to create stylish images, combining the cold shine of snow and the warm glow of the tropics. Help Eliza and Milana become the most fashionable princesses of winter!

title: Sudoku Brain Blocks
description: Sudoku Brain Blocks is a relaxing yet addictive online puzzle game that blends classic Sudoku logic with block-fitting challenges (Tetris style). Drag and drop various shaped blocks onto a 9×9 grid to complete full rows, columns, or 3×3 squares to clear the board and earn high scores. Use strategy and planning to avoid running out of space and test your brain with every move!

title: Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly
description: This is a first-person psychological horror game where you work night shifts in a small street kiosk. What seems like a normal job quickly turns into a nightmare: customers grow increasingly strange, and reality itself begins to warp. Some people just want to eat — others are only pretending to be human.

title: Mojo Emoji
description: Moji Emoji is a fun and clever word/emoji puzzle game where each level challenges you to guess the hidden word or phrase from a set of expressive emojis. Think fast, connect the clues, and test your emoji decoding skills across hundreds of creative puzzles.

title: Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac
description:
Unwind and challenge your mind with Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac, a timeless puzzle game that blends strategy, focus, and relaxation. 
Match beautifully designed tiles, clear the board, and enjoy a calming gameplay experience anytime, anywhere.
Perfect for both beginners and seasoned players, Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac offers intuitive controls, elegant visuals, and satisfying puzzles that keep you coming back for more.

title: Cookie monster
description: What more could you ask for?! Puzzle, brain teaser, monsters, snacks...wait what? That's right MONSTERS and SNACKS! Feed the hungry monsters snacks to pass the level! You have to make sure all the snacks get into the monster's mouth though or you will see a sad face! Let's keep these monsters happy! If you like the game, leave us a review! That will help us continue to bring you many more challenging levels, new monsters, maybe some new twizzler lines.

title: Jixora – Jigsaw Solitaire Puzzle
description: Jixora is a relaxing jigsaw solitaire puzzle game where you piece together beautiful artwork. Journey through 100 unique levels with increasing difficulty, or unlock Free Play mode to replay your favorites with custom grid sizes. Race against the clock to earn stars, use strategic power-ups like Hints and Time Freezes, and immerse yourself in a cinematic atmosphere with soothing music.

title: Fashion Stylist Salon Makeover
description: Do you want to create your own fashion styles? Join our best hair salon simulator game and enjoy the utmost fun. You will act as a fashion stylist who does haircuts, hairstyling, and skin care. Welcome customers with different requirements and use your hairstyling skills to make them satisfied and happy!

title: Russian Derby Crash
description:
Russian Derby Crash is a thrilling game that immerses you in the atmosphere of spectacular car racing with elements of destruction. You'll control one of five Russian cars or a tank. Destroy cars on the training ground and unlock new ones!
This game has a unique twist: in addition to cars, there's a tank on the training ground, from which you can shoot at other participants!

title: Tiny Farm
description:
Tiny Farm is a small, cozy farming game where everything grows at your pace.

Harvest crops, collect goods from animals, and slowly upgrade your farm into something wonderful. Each upgrade brings visible progress, and each world unlocks exciting new possibilities.

Sit back, relax, and watch your tiny farm flourish.

title: FreeCell
description: Unlike other card games that rely on luck, almost every game of FreeCell is solvable—if you have the skill. Use the four open "free cells" as temporary holders to juggle your cards and organize the chaotic tableau. Plan your moves carefully, stack cards by alternating colors, and clear the board. Whether you want a relaxing break or a serious brain workout, this is the perfect puzzle for you.

title: Super Football Fever
description: We bring you an unprecedentedly realistic soccer experience with smooth motion-captured animations and lifelike 3D graphics that make you feel like you're on a top-tier league field. Build your dream team, sign superstars, and win matches with precise tactical arrangements. Whether it's quick short passes or stunning long-range goals, you can do it all with ease at your fingertips.

title: Maze Escape Challenge
description: Maze Escape Challenge is a fast-paced maze game where you must reach the exit as quickly as possible. Each level features a unique labyrinth with increasing difficulty, traps, and surprises. Some levels include Dark Mode, where you can see only a small light around the player. Earn stars by finishing mazes fast (1–3 stars), unlock new levels, beat your best times, and try to master every maze.

title: People Playground: Ragdoll Battle
description:
Welcome to People Playground: Ragdoll Battle!
Carefully control your character to strike the right spots on your opponent’s body. Attack strategically to destroy and crush your enemies. Earn gold coins to unlock new characters and upgrade your skills.
Have fun and dominate the arena!

title: Screw Color Sorting Master
description: Screw Color Sorting Master is a relaxing yet addictive puzzle game! Sort vibrant colored screws onto poles by moving them strategically—same colors must stack together. With simple controls, hundreds of challenging levels, and satisfying visuals, sharpen your brain and become the ultimate sorting master!

title: Pickle Ball Clash
description: Step into the fast-paced world of Pickle Ball Clash — a thrilling sports game where every match is a battle of skill, speed, and strategy. Customize your character, unlock powerful paddles, and climb the competitive ranks from backyard brawls to pro-level leagues. Whether you're smashing winners or pulling off trick shots, the court is yours to conquer. Are you ready to clash?

title: Happy Jump
description: Bounce into blissful heights with Happy Jump! Guide the cute chicken on its springy pogo to leap skyward amid lush trees and fun obstacles. Smash your personal best, snag stars, and chase trophies in this addictive, one-tap thrill. Endless jumps, soaring scores—pure joy awaits!

title: Human Leap Evolution
description: Want a wild evolution adventure from caveman to futuristic super warrior? Human Leap: Evolution is a high-energy action evolution puzzle game where every jump you make shapes your destiny. Choose wisely, evolve rapidly, and battle your enemies with unstoppable power!

title: Flag Master: World Flags Quiz
description: Flag Master is the ultimate test of your flag knowledge and geography skills! Paint and recreate flags, solve jigsaw puzzles, guess capitals, match neighboring countries, and take on a variety of engaging challenges in a fun, fast-paced experience.

title: Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!
description: Get ready for unbridled automotive chaos in Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!– a game where the three elements of extreme driving merge: devastating crash tests, masterful drifting, and frantic racing!

title: Little Bugs
description: you are the guardian of a group of lost beetles. At each stage, the beetles approach two pictures. One is a safe path forward, but the other is a trapdoor into the abyss. Your mission is to decipher the hint—a piece of a vegetable or an animal—to figure out which path is safe. If you misunderstand the clue, you won't be able to reach the finish line. Every choice matters in this charming world of clever puzzles. Are you ready to lead your little bugs to safety?

title: Cozy Kitchen Merge
description: This is an addictive cooking-themed merge game you won't be able to put down. Here, you'll become a kitchen master by merging identical ingredients and dishes to create new, more delicious cuisine. From simple vegetables to exotic feasts, continuously unlock tasty recipes from around the world. Fulfill customer orders to earn coins, and use them to upgrade and decorate your kitchen, transforming it from a humble diner into a dream culinary paradise.

title: Obby Football Soccer 3D
description:
Online football / soccer and real sport — play with friends or random opponents.
Penalties and matches — score amazing goals, save shots, and become your team’s hero.
Obby challenges — train your reaction and speed while passing football obstacles.
Colorful 3D graphics and the atmosphere of a real stadium.

Go from rookie to champion. Prove that you are the best player in the world of football and sport.

title: Tap It Away 3D
description: Tap It Away 3D is a fun and relaxing 3D block puzzle game. Tap the arrows to move and clear blocks, solve brain-teasing puzzles, and plan your moves carefully as blocks can block each other. Enjoy smooth, stress-free gameplay with no time limits. Play this free online puzzle game to relax, sharpen your logic, and train your brain anytime.

title: Bouncy Bomb Buddies
description: Bouncy Bomb Buddies is a high-energy, sugary-sweet 1v1 artillery platformer where cute characters battle it out in vibrant, candy-colored arenas. Your goal? Bounce around platforms, grab falling bombs, and launch them at your opponent to be the last buddy standing! It combines fast-paced movement with tactical throwing physics and a best-of-5 rounds system to crown the supreme champion.

title: Transform Car Battle
description: you'll control a futuristic vehicle that can transform in an instant, speeding down tracks filled with obstacles and enemies. You'll need to swipe flexibly to dodge deadly lasers and traps while collecting energy cubes. At critical moments, tap the screen to transform into battle mode to smash through barriers, or switch forms to pass through special gates. Constantly challenge your reflexes, unlock more cool cars with unique transformation abilities, and set new running records!

title: Goods Triple Match 3D
description: Begin a super satisfying match 3 puzzle challenge. Goods Triple Match 3D is a colorful and addictive casual logic game where all items appear in beautiful and realistic 3D. Your table is filled with tons of cute 3D drinks.

title: Food Jam
description: Food Jam is a fun and satisfying puzzle game where you sort fruits, veggies, and drinks into the right takeout carts. With over 500 juicy levels, unlock delicious new themes like desserts and juices! Use unique power-ups to clear tricky jams and keep your customers happy.

title: Monster Slayers
description: Monster Slayers is a single‑player mobile roguelike RPG where you must survive endless waves of monsters all by yourself. Every run is a new chance to build the perfect hero, outplay growing hordes, and prove that one warrior can stand against an entire army.

title: Xeno Defense Protocol
description: Xeno Online combines high-octane top-down shooting with strategic tower defense and deep RPG progression. Your mission is simple: Establish a base, defend it against endless waves of insectoid horrors, and extract with your life.

title: School Escape: Obbie Run!
description:
Run Obbie! The teacher will catch up with you and take you straight to the principal! 
You will play as a schoolboy Obbie. After a conflict with the teacher, you need to escape from school. 
The teacher will try to catch up with you at school, you can't let this happen. 
Collect all the keys and escape from school.

title: Goo Slime Jump
description: Goo Slime Jump is a fun and relaxing casual game, tap to make the slime jump and make sure it reaches the finish line, the relaxing music and calm gameplay make you addicted.

title: Marshmallow Rush
description: Marshmallow Rush is a one-button runner where you tap at the right moment to stack fluffy marshmallows, weave through cute obstacles, and dash to the finish. Build the tallest, sweetest tower you can, snag boosters for extra points, and master the timing to clear tricky layouts. Simple to play, satisfying to perfect—how far can your marshmallow tower go?

title: Clicker Hero
description: Click on the screen to defeat the monsters and earn gold in Clicker Hero. Spend your gold to buy and upgrade heroes that deal damage automatically. Then advance to fight tougher monsters that drop more gold. This game keeps going, even when you're offline, so come back later to earn and spend even more!

title: 99 Balls
description: 99 Balls 3D is an endless arcade game that mixes brick breaker and bubble shooter action in full 3D. Launch balls to smash numbered cylinders before they reach the bottom. Collect stars to unlock fun ball skins like sports balls, gems, or fruit. Simple to play, endlessly challenging, and highly addictive!

title: Falling Dummy
description:
Push the dummy off the roof of the tallest building on the construction site and watch it break all its bones. Control the body of the little man as he falls and break as many limbs as possible!

Do you want to relax after a hard day? Then this game is made for you! In this anti-stress game, your main goal is to make the dummy break as many limbs as possible when falling from tall buildings!

title: Polygon Space
description: Polygon Space is an intense shooting challenge. Fly a laser cannon in space, battle attacking sci-fi shapes, keep firing, upgrade weapons with resources, destroy them all, and stay safe.

title: Mojicon Love Connect
description: 2Million Games presents Mojicon Love Connect: the biggest Mojicon game to date! Match sweets, beat challenging levels and discover sweet moments in the animal kingdom!

title: Dinosaur Rampage
description: When the rampage ends, you’ll compete against other dinosaurs in the same arena and get ranked based on your destruction performance. Unlock many different dinosaur types, collect cool skins in the shop, and prove you’re the ultimate king of chaos. Fast, satisfying, and perfect for stress relief—just stomp, smash, and climb the leaderboard!

title: Sausage Man Shooting Adventure
description: Dive into a hilarious and action-packed adventure. Sausage Man Shooting Adventure is a fast-paced side-scrolling shooting game where you control a crazy, energetic sausage hero and blast through waves of enemies. Run forward, dodge traps, jump platforms, and shoot enemies with nonstop excitement! Collect airdrops to increase your damage.

title: Color Block Blast 3
description:
Drag and drop the correct block into the grid. Match 3 or more tiles of the same colour to eliminate them.

Score beautiful combos while earning bonus points and watching beautiful animations take shape.

How high can you score in this endless match 3 game?

title: Sweet Dessert Hole
description: Ready to make cute and tasty desserts? In Sweet Dessert Hole, you control a hole that sucks up various sweet toppings. Move the hole around to collect chocolate, cream, fruits, cookies, dan many more. Collect everything on the base before time runs out. Use your coins to upgrade the hole and make the gameplay faster and easier. After making one or more cakes, you can arrange them neatly on a tray. This game is simple, relaxing, and very satisfying to play.

title: Knit Rescue
description:
Knit Rescue is an engaging and original puzzle game where you untangle a knitted dragon to save a frightened kitten.

But it’s not enough to simply tap the right spools. You must unlock the correct spools and move them in the right direction to stop the dragon in time.

Plan your moves, follow the arrows, and solve each level using logic and strategy. Knit Rescue is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of brain games, logic puzzles, and strategy games.

title: Cupid’s Story: Love Archer Bow
description: In Cupid's Story: Love Archer Bow, you play as a love archer armed with a trusty bow. Your mission is to shoot love arrows that connect hearts and spark romance. Aim carefully and watch as sparks fly and love blooms in the most unexpected places. Mix and match hearts to create unique and charming couples, from quirky characters to unlikely pairings. The possibilities are endless in this one-of-a-kind game.

title: Challenger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Tripeaks Solitaire Escapes
description: Play Solitaire TriPeaks Escapes, a relaxing card game with a warm summer vibe. Explore hundreds of unique solitaire levels featuring stunning graphics and vibrant beach landscapes. Master challenging card puzzles using powerful boosters, train your brain and sharpen your strategy. Dive into this colorful TriPeaks world and enjoy a soothing, slow-paced adventure. Escape the daily grind and find your zen in every hand you play!

title: Wood Block Puzzle 3
description: Wood Block Puzzle 3 is a polished, relaxing 10×10 wooden block game featuring a fresh UI, smart boosters, and satisfying break animations. Drag shapes from the right tray, complete rows or columns to score, and chase your best record. Use boosters at the bottom—watch rewarded ads to earn coins and unlock boosters when needed. Simple to learn and hard to master, it’s perfect for quick breaks or long zen sessions.

title: Water Sort - Collections
description: Sort, pour, and relax! Complete each level by filling bottles and unlock beautiful collectible images. Test your logic, calm your mind, and build your own gallery as you master the art of sorting water!

title: Dance On Hotsteps Mobile
description: Welcome to Dance On - Hotsteps Mobile, a modern dance game that you can play for free on H5games4u. Dress up your superstar in beautiful suits and dresses, follow the beats of the music, make perfect dance moves, and surprise the crowd in the dancing show!

title: Sakura Branch
description:
The "Sakura Branch" is an interesting and beautiful puzzle game.

In the game you have pieces of a dry branch of a beautiful tree.
Turn them around and put them together.
If you combine all the pieces, life will return to the branch and it will delight you with beautiful flowers!
If you are new, you can play on a very small field on which there will be very little branches.
But if you feel strong enough, you can collect a whole tree on a huge field!

title: Escape Again
description: Together with the main character of the new online game Escape Again, you will go on a journey through the painted world in search of treasures and adventures. The location in which your hero will be will be visible on the screen in front of you. By controlling his actions you will have to move around the area. Overcoming various obstacles and traps, you will have to help the hero find special magic pins. With their help, he will be able to activate the portal leading to the next level.

title: Sudoku
description: Sudoku is a relaxing yet challenging number puzzle game made for Jio feature phones. Fill the 9×9 grid with numbers 1 to 9 without repeating any in a row, column, or 3×3 box. Choose from different difficulty levels and test your logic skills. The game works offline, saves your progress automatically, and offers smooth performance with clean visuals for KaiOS devices.

title: Tetro Merge
description:
Tetro Merge is a physics-based merge puzzle game where Tetromino blocks come to life.
You’ll drop Tetrominoes of all shapes—classic, extended, and brand-new originals. When two matching pieces touch, they merge into a bigger, more complex block.
Master the bounce, plan your stacks, and build powerful combos as the board slowly fills up.
Will you manage your space wisely… or let the blocks overflow?
A perfect blend of strategy, physics, and classic Tetris nostalgia.

title: Paint Pop 3D
description:
Paint Pop 3D is an one-tap hyper casual shooting game that will keep you hooked for hours!

Tap to paint. Hold for more fun!
Stay away from obstacles and paint all slices on the ring.

Features:
- More than 1000+ levels to experience game play.
- A lot challenging missions.
- Various characters & themes.
- Beautiful graphic.

title: Kaboom Miner
description:
A fast-paced logical arcade inspired by classic Boulder Dash, but taken to the next level with massive chain explosions.
Your goal is simple—but dangerous: destroy all 50 explosive crates. Use falling stones, carefully placed bombs, and clever terrain manipulation to trigger devastating chain reactions. Every move matters. Push stones, move crates, build bridges from bricks, and even trap the Ghost before finishing it off.

title: Aim Ninja
description:
Aim Ninja is a fast-paced skill game that tests your timing and reflexes. 
Stop the moving needle at the perfect moment to score points and improve your accuracy. 
Simple to play but hard to master, Aim Ninja delivers quick, satisfying gameplay sessions 
for players of all ages.

title: Move Emoji
description: Move Emoji Match Puzzle is a fun and colorful brain game where you slide emoji boxes to match and clear them. Each level gives you a limited number of moves, so smart planning is key. Cute emojis, simple controls, and tricky puzzles make it perfect for quick, satisfying challenges.

title: Mission Santa: Deliver the Gifts
description:
Santa must deliver gifts to children in time! There are many kids and only one Santa, so everything has to be done on the fly! Fly in a sleigh on Christmas night and throw gifts down chimneys to make children happy. 

The game helps you feel the atmosphere of the approaching holiday and prepare for the most magical time of the year!

title: Anomaly Content Record
description: Welcome to Anomaly Content Record, a terrifying horror adventure where your only goal is to escape and survive. You’re a field investigator sent to explore a restricted research facility that went silent overnight.

title: Magic Forest - Merge the Secrets
description:
The Magic Forest is full of amazing little places!
Do you want to take a walk here?
Then hurry and start your journey!
And to make it even more fun, you’ll have company - Masha, a young girl who loves discovering new and mysterious things.
Even if it sometimes means sneaking away from Grandma and missing lunch.

title: Racing Master 3D
description: Racing Master 3D is a 3D racing driving simulation game that'll get your adrenaline pumping in seconds! Here, you'll drive ultra-cool cars at full throttle. Race through the fully immersive 3D tracks. Enjoy the realistic car driving simulation. Hit the nitro button and blast past every rival in seconds.

title: Toy Rumble 3d
description: Begin an explosive toy adventure in Toy Rumble 3D. A 3D running and racing arcade game packed with action, speed, and strategy. Move your tank through chaotic obstacle courses, collect parts, assemble your cannon, and shoot your way to victory.

title: Fruit Block Tetra Puzzle
description: Fruit Block Tetra Puzzle is a fast and fun block puzzle game where you place fruit-shaped blocks to clear lines and collect target fruits before time runs out. Complete each fruit goal to level up and unlock new challenges. Easy to play, satisfying to master, and perfect for quick, brain-boosting fun!

title: Dreams
description: In the realm of slumber, dreams manifest as delicate tiles, each holding a fragment of imagination, memory, or longing. As a Dream Collector, your mission is to weave these ephemeral pieces together, creating a tapestry of wonder. Only by assembling the perfect dream can you unlock hidden secrets and awaken the Dream Oracle.

title: Math Block
description: Math Block is a brain-teasing puzzle game where you slide numbered blocks and operators on a grid to form valid math equations. Match the target value using addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division to earn stars and progress through 500 challenging levels!

title: Rough Ball
description: Bounce wildly in Rough Ball! Control your cute purple ball across wall-to-wall platforms, dodging spikes, skulls, and deadly drops. Collect shiny coins, unlock free burger skins, and conquer chaotic levels. Don't fall down—jump, roll, and thrive in pixel-perfect adventure!

title: Brainrot Bridge Race 3D
description: This is not just a simple running and racing game. It’s a brainrot-style 3D battle where speed and strategy collide! Your goal is to collect as many bananas as possible while sprinting through hilarious obstacle courses. Collect more bananas to evolve your form.

title: Shell Strikers
description:
Shell Strikers is an exciting turn-based artillery combat game where strategy meets action. Lead your team of soldiers in intense battles across diverse battlefields including war-torn cities, scorching deserts, and peaceful meadows.

Each turn, you must carefully aim your shots, account for wind conditions, and choose the right weapon from your arsenal. Available weapons include rockets, bombs, laser guns, airstrikes, and dynamite - each with unique properties and limited ammo.

title: Capybara Block Blast
description: Capybara Block Blast is a cozy puzzle game where you blast blocks alongside the world’s chillest animal, the capybara! Match colorful block shapes, clear lines, and rack up points while enjoying adorable animations and relaxing vibes. Whether you’re chasing a high score or just unwinding, this game offers the perfect mix of challenge and comfort.

title: ARROW OUT AND LINKER
description:
ARROW OUT AND LINKER is a smart, direction-based puzzle game where every move counts. Your mission is to guide the arrow through intricate mazes and lead it to the exit.

Rotate tiles, shift paths, and think several steps ahead to build the perfect route. Each decision shapes the outcome, rewarding careful planning and shap logic.

title: Dear Island
description:
Collect two blocks that match the color of the Match Slot to clear them!
Clear them all to finish the stage!
Blocks of different colors can be placed in the Stock.
If the Stock gets full, it’s game over!

title: Basket Swap
description: Slide into the gray blocks to help you position the ball and grid correctly. If you're stuck, click on the arrow in the bottom left corner to undo your last move, or press R to restart the level.

title: Coin Color Sort
description: Dive into the colorful world of Coin Color Sort, an addictive online puzzle game that puts your sorting skills to the test. Arrange and match coins by color to create perfect stacks and clear each level. With its relaxing yet challenging gameplay, this free game offers endless fun and mental exercise. Play anytime on your computer or phone and see how far your logic can take you!

title: Fruit Goals Match
description: Fruit Goals Match is a fun and strategic fruit-matching  puzzle game where you collect specific fruits to complete each mission within limited moves. Every level brings a new challenge, rewards smart planning, and keeps the gameplay endless. Earn extra moves through reward ads and see how far you can progress.

title: Luxury Highway Cars
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning luxury cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Luxury Highway Cars!

title: Tap Away Block Puzzle 3D
description: Challenge your mind with Tap Away Block Puzzle 3D! This relaxing logic game offers a satisfying brain teaser. Your mission: tap blocks to clear the screen. It's tricky blocks only move one way! Swipe to rotate the puzzle, find the right order, and watch them fly away. Puzzles get tougher as you go, perfect for training your brain. This free-to-play 3D puzzle is your ideal mental escape. Ready for the challenge? Start tapping now!

title: Melon Drop: Fruit Merge Master
description: Dive deep into the vibrant and enthralling world of fruit-matching with our exciting game, Fruit Merge: Juicy Drop Game! ??? When the same fruits collide, they merge into a larger fruit. Your mission is to smartly pair the same types of fruits to make the biggest possible fruits without letting them overflow from the container. However, as the fruits grow in size, space becomes a premium - managing it effectively is your key challenge. Can you strategize and solve this fruity puzzle?

title: Zombie Survival Shooter
description: Ready for an all-out apocalypse escape? Zombie Survival Shooter throws you straight into a world overrun by zombies. Zombies attack from every direction. Keep moving, dodge smartly, and never stop running. Shoot the digital doors to gain more helpers or boost your attack speed, etc. Use your strategy to choose which digital door to go through.

title: Obby Toilet Line
description:
Obby Toilet Line starts in the most chaotic place imaginable: a gas station restroom line. Around 30 different characters are already waiting, and the queue stretches all the way past the store entrance. Your goal is simple, but the situation is not: earn money while you wait, move up the line, and reach the mysterious toilet at the end.

This is not just a “stand still” queue. The game uses an idle-style progression system: the position you’re standing in determines how much you earn.

title: Champions FC
description: Champions FC is a fast-paced, bite-size soccer match where you dribble, pass, and time your kicks to break through defenders and score. Play two quick halves, react to turnovers, and keep the ball in bounds. Nail the perfect moment, hear the whistle, and become Champion.

title: Crazy Tunnel
description: Crazy Tunnel is a fast-paced, first-person arcade game. Navigate through the tunnel at breakneck speeds and aim for the longest distance possible.

title: Ice Cream Inc.
description:
Ice Cream Simulator is a satisfying casual game where you step into the shoes of a master ice cream artist. Your goal is to run the most popular shop in town by creating the ice cream of your dreams!

From classic Vanilla and Dark Chocolate to fruity Mango and Juicy Strawberry, you have all the ingredients needed to create the perfect frozen treat. Whether your customers want a soft-serve cone, ice cream rolls, frozen yogurt, or traditional Gelato, it’s up to you to serve them with a smile.

title: VegaMix Da Vinci Puzzles
description: "VegaMix Da Vinci Puzzles" is a match-3 adventure with quests and an interactive story. After a time-machine failure, Alice, Vika, and Lesha end up in Renaissance Italy and meet Leonardo da Vinci. To return home, they must help him finish his inventions, recover lost blueprints, and uncover secrets hidden in his workshop while exploring the art-filled cities and palaces of 15th-century Italy.

title: Sweet Triple Mahjong
description: Sweet Triple Mahjong is a relaxing yet challenging tile-matching puzzle game with a delicious candy theme. Match three identical tiles that are free on the left or right to collect them and clear the board. Each level introduces new tile layouts that test your observation and strategy skills. Easy to learn but hard to master, Sweet Triple Mahjong offers smooth gameplay, colorful visuals, and satisfying progression across multiple levels.

title: Fishing Bear
description:
Tap to reel in your fishing line and catch as many fish as you can!
But stay alert—mischievous creatures in the sea will try to get in your way.
And when you pick up a mysterious Treasure Shell… something exciting might happen!
Enjoy a simple and addictive fishing experience!

title: Winter Maze
description:
Step into a frosty puzzle adventure with Winter Maze! Explore icy, snow-covered mazes and guide your ball through slippery, twisty paths that fill up with every move. Each level challenges you to think ahead, plan your route and clear the entire field to unlock the next stage.
Simply swipe to roll the ball in any direction and watch the maze come to life beneath you. Your goal is clear: cover every tile and leave no space untouched.

title: Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training
description:
Challenge your memory, speed and attention in "Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training". Watch boxes appear, remember the count, then submit your guess faster and more accurate each round wins.

Enjoy single-player focus mode or competitive rounds vs local friend or multiplayer. Simple tap controls, short rounds, addictive replayability perfect for quick brain workouts on desktop and mobile.

Train memory, logic, agility and reaction time now!

title: Funny Doctor Emergency
description: Do you want to be a doctor? In Funny Doctor Emergency, you treat patients in cute and funny emergencies. Patients come in many ages and situations. Every patient needs a different treatment. Choose the correct tool from the options to treat each problem. Follow simple steps to help patients recover and smile again. Watch them feel better after treatment. This game is playful and easy to enjoy.

title: Going Balls 3D
description: Going Balls 3D is a relaxing 3D rolling game where smooth control and calm focus are the key to winning. Swipe to steer the wooden platform and guide the ball forward—no need to rush, just keep it steady and reach the finish line without falling.

title: Avatar World Secrets
description: Dive into various cute items, design the room setting, dress up your avatar family, and make up a life story as you like. Enjoy the fun interaction with items and characters online.

title: English Checkers
description: Immerse yourself in the exciting world of Checkers English, where every game is a test of your tactics and foresight! Also this game is known by name Draughts

title: Arrows Puzzle Escape
description: Arrows – Puzzle Escape is an addictive puzzle game that combines deep logic challenges and a thrilling escape experience. Every level throws you into a jam-packed arrow maze where only smart planning can set you free. Arrows point in different directions, blocking each other and creating tricky jam situations.

title: Classic Mahjong
description:
"Mahjong Classic" is a classic mahjong solitaire with a unique algorithm for generating levels - a random layout of chips always has a solution! Each playthrough becomes unique, allowing you to play your favorite fields an unlimited amount of times!
In the game you will find popular fields: Turtle, Fort, Crab, Spider, Cat, Dragon and many others.
Play solitaire at your own pace, there is no time limit!

title: Heroic Knight
description: Guide the noble knight through peril and claim the treasure! In this exciting puzzle game, you'll shift barriers to clear a path to victory. Help the knight defeat enemies, avoid traps, and uncover hidden riches. Plan your moves carefully, as one wrong decision could cost you the treasure!

title: Forest Survivor Rougelike
description: Forest Survivor Roguelike is an addictive simulator adventure game that throws you into a dangerous forest. Only the strongest survivor can survive. From the very first moment, you must fight, explore, and adapt to stay alive in this intense roguelike world. Every step in the forest is a new challenge.

title: Bolts and Nuts - Sorting
description: Bolts and Nuts - Sorting is a captivating casual game where each level challenges your logic and attentiveness! Unscrew bolts, collect nuts, and solve puzzles to progress. Simple controls and intuitive gameplay make the game accessible to everyone, while gradually increasing difficulty keeps it exciting.

title: K-Wedding Dream
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of Korean love with the heroes of this dressup-game. Become a part of a magical story where bright K-Pop stars are preparing for the most important day of their lives - Wedding day! Combine tradition and modern fashion by creating wedding looks for lovers. Choose the perfect makeup, hairstyle and jewelry to highlight their unique style and charm. Let each of your choices reflect the emotions and dreams of the characters, turning this day into a real fairy tale!

title: Free Hoops
description: Welcome to Free Hoops, the ultimate puzzle game that combines creativity, humor, and strategic problem-solving! Dive into a world of quirky challenges where your goal is to skillfully adjust iron bars and guide elastic bands into predetermined boxes. Once the bands are in place, use them to tie around objects and destroy them to advance to the next level.

title: Bus Color Jam
description: Welcome to Bus Color Jam, a lively and colorful online game that challenges your coordination and quick thinking. Guide passengers to the right buses by matching their colors and keeping the station running smoothly. Every level brings new challenges that test your timing and attention. It’s a fun mix of strategy and reflexes — easy to learn, satisfying to master, and completely free to play on both your phone and computer.

title: Bubble Shooter: Spinner Pop
description:
Take the classic bubble shooter to a new level! Bubble Shooter: Spinner Pop features a rotating puzzle core that rewards smart aiming and chain reactions. 
Clear all bubbles to complete each level and earn up to 3 stars (10 pts per direct match, 20 pts for freed bubbles).
Beware the deadly Magma Vortex, and avoid fouls that add extra bubbles for missed matches!

title: Obby & Dead River
description: Dive into an exciting first-person 3D adventure in the style of Roblox! Your mission is to go through a dangerous path along the legendary river of death, connecting many large castles. Playing as a warrior, you will have to overcome thousands of kilometers, fight monsters and pirates, defeat dragons and get to the final boss.

title: Coin Stack Up
description:
Coin Stack Up is a colorful and satisfying puzzle game where strategy meets stacking fun!
Connect and stack coins of the same color to create powerful combinations and clear the board.
To make a valid move, you must connect at least 3 coins of the same color. The bigger the stack, the better the results! Each level comes with specific goals shown at the top of the screen - plan your moves carefully to complete them before you run out of moves.

title: Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills
description:
Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills is a tense survival horror where you roam a fog-covered forest to steal brainrot pages while being hunted by the relentless Sahur entity.
No weapons, no escape-only rising whispers, shifting woods, and the race to survive before the echoes of “TUNG TUNG TUNG SAHUR” close in.

title: Gear Wars
description: Do you have the strategic skill to build a flawless factory, producing Brutes, Archers, and Grunts? Manage your budget wisely, crush every enemy, and claim victory! Get those gears spinning... it's time to WIN!

title: HOTGEAR
description:
Join HOTGEAR, a brand-new racing game where the thrill of the chase is just beginning. The pursuit is on, and it's time to put your skills to the test! The game offers a wide range of customization options, allowing you to create the car of your dreams and make every chase even more thrilling.
So, what are you waiting for, racer? The pursuit has begun, and you're wanted! Time to get in the driver's seat, customize your car, and take on the streets!

title: Idle Trade Routes
description: Command a growing fleet of merchant ships across a shimmering ocean in Idle Trade Routes. Link bustling islands, auto‑dock at busy ports, and optimize trade lines to keep goods flowing. Unlock new ships, hire captains, and chase bigger contracts as your profits grow even while you’re away.

title: Mojicon Fruit Connect
description:
Match. Collect. Get Inspired! Dive into Mojicon Fruit Connect, the vibrant puzzle game where every match brings you closer to a new discovery. Connect colorful emoji tiles to clear the board, but watch out for shifting gravity and frozen that tiles will keep you on your toes!

Complete levels to fill your Album with cute characters. Reveal meaningful quotes and daily inspiration with every unlock. Return to your Fruit Farm later to claim a basket full of free rewards. 

Play anywhere you like!

title: Stickman Zombie vs Stickman Hero
description:
Stickman Zombie vs Stickman Hero is a stick war game about zombies, stickman, noob and pro who stole lucky block. The zombie boss is chasing them to bring the lucky block back to the roblox world, but the stickman hero escapes, resurrecting his allies along the way/

Game Features:
- You run away from the zombie boss and then play as him against the animator
- Various zombie, baldi and stickman animations
- The game is similar in style to minecraft, stick war, roblox and noob vs p

title: Pet Doctor Business Tycoon-Pet care game
description: Step into the world of animal care with Pet Doctor – Animal Hospital Simulator! Become a kind and skilled veterinarian as you treat adorable pets including cats, dogs, rabbits, and more. Use realistic medical tools to diagnose, clean wounds, check heartbeats, and perform surgeries. Each level brings new challenges where you must care for sick, injured, or pregnant animals in a friendly hospital environment.

title: Hide Me
description: Do you love the thrill of cat and mouse games? Are you ready to outsmart your pursuers and claim victory? Dive into "Hide Me", the latest hide-and-seek adventure that will put your wits and reflexes to the test!

title: My Happy farm
description: Welcome to farm land game – the ultimate farming adventure that brings the beauty of rural life, the challenge of resource management, and the excitement of running your very own farm straight to your browser. The game is not just about clicking and waiting; it’s about strategy, timing, and smart decisions. Do you invest in farms first or focus on crops? Should you expand your land or upgrade your equipment? Every choice matters.

title: Dino Idle Park
description: Dino Idle Park is a relaxing leisure real estate tycoon where you create and develop a dinosaur amusement park. Expand plots, release and display dinosaurs, optimize queues and parks, hire staff, and upgrade investments to increase funds and income. Balance safety, visitor happiness, and research to keep the park thriving even when youre away.

title: MergeDuel.io
description: Merge Duel is a fast-paced 1v1 battle game where strategy and quick decisions lead to victory. Merge and upgrade your cannons to summon powerful units and counter your opponent in real time. Every match challenges your tactical skills as you adapt to new enemies and situations. Climb the ranks, dominate the leaderboard, and enjoy vibrant visuals, smooth controls, and intense duels from start to finish.

title: Steal Brainrot Eggs
description: Steal Brainrot Eggs is a competitive action game playable in both 1 Player and 2 Player modes. Players buy eggs from a central conveyor, carry them to their Base, and hatch random Brainrot characters based on egg rarity. Characters generate coins over time, allowing access to higher-tier eggs. Defend your Base from thieves or steal eggs and characters from rivals, customize your character, raise evolving pets, and take part in timed events across the map.

title: Connect Puzzle Image
description: Step into the delightful world of Connect Puzzle Image, a game designed to tease your brain and sharpen your observation skills. Match and connect a variety of funny characters, tasty foods, and interesting objects as you progress through colorful levels. Easy to play yet delightfully challenging, this free online puzzle game offers hours of relaxing entertainment on both mobile and desktop devices.

title: Steal Brainrot Arena
description: Steal Brainrot Arena is a fast-paced collection and heist game where every match turns into a battle of wallets, wits, and sneaky steals. Play solo in 1 Player mode or team up and compete in 2 Player mode as you build the ultimate Brainrot lineup. With over 45+ brainrot characters to discover, your goal is simple: buy better Brainrots, earn more, and create the most stacked collection in the arena.

title: Jump Dash
description:
Leap, soar, and survive in this fast-paced rhythm platformer!
Step into the intense world of Jump Dash, where every move must be perfectly timed. Test your reflexes as you jump, glide, and flip through treacherous levels packed with spikes, traps, and relentless obstacles.

title: Anna's Story: Dress Up DIY
description:
Style Anna’s outfits and bring her fairy tale story to life!

Anna's Story: Dress Up DIY takes you into a magical world of creativity and fashion! In this charming paper doll game, you’ll help Anna dress up for a variety of occasions, from costume parties and romantic dates to festive holidays like Halloween and Christmas.

title: Color Water Puzzle
description:
Color Water Puzzle is a fun and addictive puzzle game! The goal is simple yet challenging: try to sort the colored water in the glasses until all colors are in the same glass.

It’s not just a game; it's a great way to relieve stress and exercise your logic. With vibrant colors and smooth pouring effects, this is the best choice to kill time and relax your mind.

Are you smart enough to solve all the levels? Download now and find out!

title: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival
description: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival is a one-tap action adventure where you battle and survive in the wild. Wield your axe to fend off wolves, chop wood, and build shelter as you explore for resources and hidden chests. Level up, choose upgrades, and outlast growing dangers while managing hunger and health in this engaging forest challenge.

title: Ice Cube
description: Ice Cubes is a Blast (or Collapse) type Match-3 game. Don't be fooled by its cool appearance... this game requires nerves of steel to achieve the best score in just 1 minute and 30 seconds.

title: Hidden Object: Emily's Case
description:
A detective adventure set in Victorian London.

Search for hidden objects, uncover clues, and investigate the disappearance of a young girl. Solve puzzles, play mini-games, and step by step reveal the secrets of the old city.

title: Running In Foam
description: Welcome to the wonderful world of "Running In Foam"! Everything here is made of soft, colorful foam. You'll play as a cute character, racing through foam-filled tracks. You need to nimbly jump over giant foam obstacles, slide down slippery foam slides, and collect shiny gems to unlock new characters and power-ups. The game is fast-paced with fresh, adorable graphics, and every run is full of surprises and fun. Be careful not to get lost in the foam!

title: Idle Money Factory
description: Money Factory is a fast-paced clicker game with strategic elements where you build and expand your financial empire by optimizing money production lines. Start with a simple setup and gradually grow by upgrading equipment, unlocking new production areas, and enhancing efficiency to skyrocket your profits.

title: Cosmos 404
description: Explore the galaxy in Cosmos 404! Run across procedurally generated tiny planets, collect coins, and dodge hostile aliens. Use power-ups like Speed Boost and Magnet to survive longer. How far can you go in this addictive low-poly space adventure?

title: Chicken Jump : A Tap Challenge
description: This is simple but addictive chicken jump game. You'll have lots of levels and you have to save your chicken but swiping on screen from bottom to up to make chicken jump so that it can avoid hurdles.

title: Perfect Tidy
description: Welcome to Perfect Tidy, a simple and relaxing cleaning simulator game that you can play for free. Are you good at cleaning work? Searching for something that is stress-relieving? Join Perfect Tidy, where you can dive into multiple cleaning tasks: Car washing, skin care, teeth fixing, pet care, and more. Unlike cleaning in real life, all you have to do in the game is click, drag, and enjoy the present moment.

title: Craft of Wars
description: The war between the Reds and the Blues has never been more epic than in Craft of Wars! In this cubic game, you'll fight for strategic points on the map using a classic combat system similar to the one found in older versions of Minecraft. Prepare for intense sword and bow duels, TNT explosions, tactical use of potions, and the legendary golden apples that will help you survive the fiercest battles.

title: 3D Maze Control
description: 3D Maze Control is a casual and fun puzzle physics game. Your goal is to rotate the board to let the ball reach its goal. The ball always falls down due to gravity and beware of scary aliens on the way.

title: Void Orbit
description: Void Orbit is an addictive space arcade game where you orbit a central core and dodge incoming enemies. Tap to reverse direction and survive as long as possible! Unlock cool skins, dynamic themes, enjoy challenging modes like Echo Mirage and Tower Build. Multi-language support for global players. Free to play, endless fun!

title: Grass Defense
description: Grass Defense is a strategic tower defense where you must protect the wilderness from waves of fierce creatures.
