Build and upgrade powerful towers, manage resources, and adapt your tactics as enemies grow stronger. With dynamic environments, diverse foes, and challenging levels, you’ll test your strategy and skill to survive the untamed wilds and uncover hidden mysteries.

title: Animal Blocks
description: Enter the colorful and cheerful world of Animal Blocks, where adorable creatures bring classic block puzzles to life. Match three or more of the same animal blocks to clear the board, earn points, and climb to higher scores. Simple to play yet full of fun challenges, this free online game is perfect for both mobile and desktop players who enjoy relaxing, strategic gameplay and charming visuals.

title: Parking Driver
description: Ever struggled to find a parking spot? In "Parking Driver," you'll face tricky parking challenges! From tight parallel parking to complex reverse maneuvers, you need precise control to avoid obstacles and park perfectly in the shortest time. The game features a realistic physics engine and diverse level designs, each testing your patience and skill. Come prove your driving prowess, unlock cool new cars, and conquer every parking lot!

title: Gold Miner Classic
description: Jump into the most classic gold mining adventure ever! Gold Miner Classic brings you all the excitement of being a real gold miner. Feel into the perfect casual relaxation experience. Your mission is simple but incredibly satisfying.

title: Stick Master Teleport
description:
Jump onto walls, throw knives, and teleport to your enemies ⚔️ to defeat them with a single strike.
Prove your ninja reputation by eliminating bad guys before they even notice.
Walk the tough path of a ninja to become a true ninja assassin!

title: Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle
description: Dive into the relaxing world of Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle! Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the flasks until each flask contains only one color. With over 1000 levels and unique modes like Color Fusion, Mystery, and Time Trial, this puzzle game will test your logic and patience. Unlock new themes and achievements as you play!

title: Fruit Catcher
description:
Catch as many fruits as you can before they fall! ?
Move your basket left and right to collect fresh fruits and avoid rotten ones. Each fruit gives you points — how high can your score go?
This fun and colorful game tests your reflexes and speed. Perfect for kids and casual players who love simple but addictive gameplay!

title: Memory Lane
description:
Your goal in each level is to reach the Goal Platform. Levels are played in two phases.
A. Reveal Phase:
Duration: Short preview at the start of each level
•	All platforms become visible.
•	Study the layout, paths, traps, and pickups.
Your task: Remember what you see

B. Action Phase:
•	All memory phase platforms become invisible unless they are marked to stay visible.
•	Touching platforms reveals them permanently.
Your task: Reach the goal using your memory and reflexes.

title: The Zombie House
description:
Protect your home from endless waves of zombies!
Defeat zombies to collect coins and ability drops.
Use coins to upgrade both your player and your house.
Each level makes the zombies stronger.
How long can you survive?

title: 3D Kid Sliding Puzzle
description: We've taken the classic sliding puzzle into a whole new 3D world. Kids will need to slide the scrambled blocks to rearrange them and complete adorable cartoon pictures, such as little animals, vehicles, and fairy-tale characters. The game features vibrant colors and lively 3D models that will immediately capture a child's attention. Not only does it provide hours of fun, but it also helps develop a child's logical thinking, spatial awareness, and problem-solving skills.

title: Color Sort: Impostor Edition
description: Color Sort Impostor Edition is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that challenges your logic and focus. Sort the colorful characters into the correct tubes so that each tube contains only one color. The rules are simple, but the puzzles quickly become more challenging as new colors and obstacles appear. Plan your moves carefully, avoid mistakes, and enjoy a smooth, satisfying sorting experience designed for players of all ages.

title: Draw To Smash Zombie
description: Draw To Smash Zombie is an exciting drawing logic puzzle game where your creativity becomes the ultimate weapon against waves of silly zombies.

title: Snake Masters
description:
Control a small worm and get ready to reach the other side of the screen. Enjoy a puzzle inspired by the classic Snake, where you must guide the worm to the other side of the apple and escape safely. Will you be smart enough to beat all thirty levels?

Game Features
- Special crawling mechanics.
- Challenge your brain.
- Tons of interesting puzzles.
- Easy controls.

title: Card Solitaire: Word Game
description:
Train your brain in a fun new way with Card Solitaire: Word Game — a clever blend of card sorting, word puzzles, and logic challenges!
Explore the exciting world of word solitaire, packed with clever associations, tricky word sort levels, and fun topic sort puzzles.

title: Block Blast Jewel Puzzle
description: Block Blast: Jewel Puzzle is a vibrant block-stacking game that mixes calm strategy with thrilling speed. Fit jewel blocks to clear lines in Classic, Timer, or Level modes. Easy to start, tough to master, and super satisfying—compete worldwide and climb the leaderboard!

title: Crab Guards
description: Fight through waves of relentless crab-masked enforcers using a deep arsenal—from AKs and SMGs to sniper rifles, shotguns, pistols, flamethrowers, and melee. Master recoil, ADS zoom, and reload timing, earn cash, unlock new gear, and survive through the Crab Guards.

title: Coffee Color Blocks
description: Coffee Color Blocks is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you move colored shapes around the board and guide them to gates of the matching color. Each correct connection fills the cups inside the shape — your goal is to fill the entire figure without blocking the path.

title: Survive The Night
description: Are you ready for the most terrifying night of your life? Survive The Night is an intense horror survival game where you’re trapped in a dark, creepy room with something lurking in the shadows. Choose between Normal Mode or Horror Mode to challenge yourself. In Normal Mode, you'll receive more hints, fewer rooms, and standard monsters.

title: Merge Smith
description:
If you combine the same items, a higher level of items will be created.
Make legendary items and become the best blacksmith.

title: Fish Master: Go Fish
description:
You’d think that a game called Go Fish would be based on the classic card game, but you’d be wrong. Fish Master – Go Fish is all about taking your ship to the middle of the sea and fishing until your boat can’t hold any more fish!

There are dozens of different fish types in the sea, and it’s your job to reel them all in! As you catch fish, your library of fish types will fill up, so you’ll always know what’s left to catch.

title: Popcat Clicker
description:
Popcat Clicker is a fun idle clicker game where you tap a cute cat to earn coins, unlock upgrades, boost your income, and progress through different levels. 
The more you tap, the faster your cat grows and the more rewards you earn.
Simple, addictive and perfect for all ages!

title: Treasure Champion - Chest Capture
description: Dive into the exciting world of stickmen in this exciting team game! Your task is to capture the chest in the center of the field and deliver it to the base together with your team, avoiding traps and tricky moves of your opponents. Each successfully delivered chest brings points, and the dynamics of the game keep you in suspense until the last second.

title: Elementz
description: ElementZ is a Match-3 game similar to Bejeweled or Candy Crush. Its particularity lies in giving each color its elemental power, allowing you to trigger different powers of fire (red), water (blue), earth (brown), plants (green), and electricity (yellow).

title: Pinball VS Zombie
description: Dive into Pinball Zombie Defense, the ultimate fusion of pinball chaos and zombie tower defense! Plant defensive flora to create a ricocheting battlefield where high-speed pinballs smash into plants, unleashing bullet barrages on undead waves. Auto-collect sunlight to grow stronger defenses and hold the line—don't let a single zombie reach your house!

title: Dalgona Game2
description:
There's a cute shape on the dalgona, a snack from the past.
Be careful not to break the shape.
It's complete if you take it out nicely in a pretty way to go!

title: Frost Defense
description:
❄️ Embark on a thrilling journey through a frozen wilderness in Frost Defense, a strategic tower defense game that puts your tactical skills to the test! ??

In this action-packed adventure, you'll take on the role of a lone survivor ?‍♂️ battling against the relentless onslaught of arctic creatures ??‍❄️?.
The enemy is merciless — only your ingenuity and strategic prowess can keep you alive in this harsh frozen world. ⚔️?️

title: Catch a Fish Obby
description: Catch a Fish Obby is a chaotic collector raider set in a bright obby world full of Fish and Brainrot Fish characters. Build a money making base with your favorite sea creatures, sneak into rival bases to steal their fish, and protect your own tank from greedy bots and other players.

title: Eat And Grow Fish
description: Welcome to Eat and Grow Fish, where survival is all about eating or being eaten! Start as a tiny fish and munch your way to the top of the food chain. Explore the levels in Story Mode, or challenge your friends in Duel Mode for two-player fun. Easy to play, fun to master! Are you ready to rule the sea?

title: One Line Drawing
description: Welcome to One Line Drawing, a game that brings together a variety of line drawing gameplays. You can relax through relaxing line drawing gameplay, or challenge yourself through puzzle-type line drawing gameplay.

title: Skillful Finger
description: Touch the screen and slide your finger along the glowing line without lifting it. Avoid barriers, stay clear of the edges, and react quickly as the speed increases. Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

title: Capybara Jump
description: Bounce into a cute stacking challenge with Capybara Jump! Time your taps to leap as wooden blocks slide in from both sides, building a towering platform under your capybara. Land perfectly to chain combos, trigger sparkles, and push your score higher before a mistimed jump sends you tumbling down.

title: Capybara Mukbang ASMR
description: Welcome to Capybara Mukbang ASMR, a casual cooking ASMR game that you can play for free. Dive into a delicious world where you cook hamburger, pizza, and ice cream recipes. Dress up and taste your dishes one by one. Share your food with the audience by eating and drinking in the Mukbang livestream, and see how many likes you can receive.

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Survival On Raft Multiplayer
description: Begin an exciting survival adventure in Survival On Raft: Multiplayer. Have an addictive survival-adventure simulation on an island. Here, you'll be gathering various foods, stones, and other items. Collect ocean resources like wood, leaves and rare items. Sharks in the sea will attack your raft at any moment.

title: Neon Gravity
description:
Defy gravity in this intense neon-soaked arcade runner! In Neon Gravity, your goal is to survive as long as possible by switching gravity to avoid deadly spikes, saws, and mines.

Master the timing to pass safely between rotating gears and trigger the "Perfect" bonus for massive points. As your score increases, the game speeds up, testing your reflexes to the limit. Can you unlock all 10 unique skins, including the Ninja and the Eye?

title: Pyramid Jewels
description:
A fun and colorful puzzle game set in Ancient Egypt. Aim and shoot magical gems to match the same colors and make them disappear. 
Tests your aim and thinking as you clear the board and uncover the secrets of the pyramids.

title: Mind Games: Math Crosswords
description:
Mind Games: Math Crosswords is a game to improve your math skills. It is a great way to spend your time. 
The player's mission is to save the planet from extinction. The aliens have destroyed all the plants on the planet. However, humans have found a solution. Engineers have built ships that convert brain activity into life-giving energy to grow plants. By solving mathematical problems, you are contributing to the restoration of plants and the regeneration of our planet.

title: Sokoban Push The Box
description: Challenge your brain in Sokoban - Push The Box. This is a timeless classic puzzle game. Enter a clever maze full of crates, tight corners, and tricky layouts. Your task is simple but challenging. Push every box to the correct spot. Each level will test your logic, patience, and planning skills. One wrong move could block your path, so think carefully before every push. But keep an eye on your move count.

title: Robbie: Stand on the Right Color!
description:
Welcome to the vibrant world of speed and reaction!
You are about to be tested on your attentiveness and lightning-fast decisions. Your task is simple but tricky: step on the right color before the floor disappears beneath your feet!
Suitable for anyone who loves fast, simple, and addictive games.
Are you ready to help Robbie stand his ground?

title: Pixel Destroyer
description:
Pixel Destroyer is an exciting physics-based arcade puzzle game where your goal is to destroy colorful pixel shapes using bouncing balls.

Dive into a world of pixel destruction! In this game, you’ll need to use your wits and precision. Each level features a unique shape made of pixel blocks. Your objective is to destroy them all using a limited number of shots. The balls follow the laws of physics, bouncing off walls and obstacles, allowing you to reach even the most hard-to-access blocks.

title: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game
description: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game is a chaotic puzzle hunt where you track a target brainrot through surreal, meme-soaked worlds. Each level pushes you to spot the same creature across dense, absurd scenes packed with icons like 67, Strawberry Elephant, Dragon Cannelloni, Spaghetti Tualetti, and La Supreme Combinasion. Fast-paced scanning, wild details, and pure internet nonsense create a frantic, high-energy experience for fans of intense spotting and brainrot chaos.

title: С21A
description:
The endless card game "C21A" is an exciting combination of classic blackjack and addictive strategy. In this game, your goal is to collect cards to score 21 points. But be careful not to overdo it or you will lose! The game offers endless opportunities to develop and improve your skills.
The game "C21A" is a great way to pass your time and test your skills in card games.

title: Winter Tetrix Trails
description:
Winter Tetrix Trails is a relaxing shape-filling puzzle game set in a snowy world.
Drag and place colorful Tetris-style blocks to complete each unique silhouette — think carefully, fit perfectly, and enjoy the magic of winter puzzles!

title: Impostor among us: Escape from prison
description:
The traitor ended up in a space prison. But the impostor does not plan to stay there for long. You play as an impostor who must go through all the traps, solve puzzles and kill all the enemies on the level. Once the imposter has neutralized all the amogus, he will be able to break out of prison. But the evil among will not let you go into space so easily.

- 100+ varied and colorful levels.
- To kill the enemy you need to approach him.
- Logic tasks and puzzles!
- Boss battles!

title: Pixel Number - DIY Coloring
description: Unleash your creativity with Pixel Number – DIY Coloring! Choose from a huge collection of pixel art images – from cute animals to cool patterns – and bring them to life with color.

title: Winter Hexa Stack
description: Winter Hexa Stack is a cozy and addictive winter-themed puzzle game where you clear the board by stacking three matching hex tiles. Tap a tile to place it in an empty spot or on top of a similar tile. When you match three identical tiles, they disappear and free up valuable space. Be careful—if your holding slots fill up or the timer runs out, the level ends. Plan your moves, stay organized, and enjoy a relaxing winter atmosphere.

title: Crazy Bike Stunts PvP
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning muscle car through 2 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Crazy Bike Stunts PvP!

title: Plant Merge: Zombie War
description: In the chaotic world of Merge Plant Zombie War, arm your garden with strategic merges to fend off relentless zombie hordes! Master upgrades, deploy special abilities, and outsmart waves of undead foes in this addictive merge-tower defense adventure. Will your botanical army prevail in the ultimate war for survival? Dive in and merge your way to victory!

title: 1945 Air Force Space Shooter
description: Prepare for nonstop action in 1945 Air Force: Space Shooter! Inspired by the classic shooter era, this game combines vintage visuals with thrilling bulletstorm gameplay that will test your reflexes and precision.Fly through endless waves of enemy aircraft. Avoid storms of bullets and unleash devastating firepower from your Force fighter.

title: Exo Observation
description: Exo Observation is a space exploration incremental game where you uncover alien worlds and study mysterious lifeforms. You’ll collect resources, build advanced orbital science facilities, and manage them efficiently to progress. Each discovery pushes you closer to unlocking warp gates, letting you expand across the galaxy, and continue your quest for knowledge among distant stars.

title: Crowd Evolution!
description: you start as a single person and grow your team by running through the city and gathering people of the same color. Your goal is to build a massive army that no one can stop! Chase down and absorb smaller crowds, but be careful, as larger crowds will try to absorb you. Use strategy and quick reflexes to become the biggest crowd on the map before time runs out!

title: Love Colors
description: Dive into Love Colors, the ultimate relaxing coloring app! Transform this elegant Art Nouveau portrait of a graceful woman—adorned with swirling leaves and blooms—using lush reds, pinks, and light pinks. Effortless tools: zoom, undo, redo, and instant download. Unleash creativity, melt stress away!

title: Floof My Pet House
description: Welcome to Floof - My Pet House, a casual pet simulation game for kids online. If you love playing with cats and dogs, or are looking for lovely and relaxing games online, do not hesitate to join H5games4u's best animal care game. You will take care of a puppy or a cute cat, feed them, dress them up, and play minigames with them. Earn enough coins to upgrade your pet house and buy more furniture.

title: Hill Racing - Egg drop!
description:
Press down to accelerate your car. Go as fast as you can carrying an egg while collection coins. 

Upgrade your cars and levels with coins.

title: Happy Monsters
description:
The collection of fun games is designed for children of any age and will not leave anyone indifferent.
Monsters play different games in which you need to collect fruits. Help them collect as much as possible to earn postcards with animals. Collect the whole collection of postcards!

title: Gothic Knife
description: Test your skills in this classic knife-throwing arcade game. Your goal is to stick all knives into the rotating target without hitting the ones already there. The target spins faster and more unpredictably with each level. Every 3 levels, a unique boss battle awaits you! Master the combo system to get high scores and enjoy Gothic

title: Brainrot Mob Clash 3D
description: Welcome to the wild and chaotic world of Brainrot Mob Clash 3D. It’s a full-blown racing and fighting adventure. Dash through 3D obstacle courses, avoid deadly traps like spikes and spinning saws. Match and merge your stickman army. Crush enemy mobs in exciting action-packed battles. As you run, collect brainrot characters to increase your numbers and merge them to form powerful units.

title: Animal Bus Traffic Jam
description: All aboard for the cutest puzzle ride ever in Animal Bus Traffic Jam. This clever match-3 sort puzzle and casual logic game challenges you to help adorable animal passengers find their correct buses. Each level is a traffic jam of colorful buses filled with cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Your mission is to sort the animals by type or color, match them into the right buses, and clear the jam with smart moves.

title: Association - Connect Word
description: Dive into the world of word puzzles and associations! In this game, you need to find hidden connections between words and group them logically. Each level offers new themes, new words, and increasingly challenging tasks. The game develops thinking, expands vocabulary, and trains attention. Intuition and logic will help you complete dozens of levels, from easy to hard, and become a true master of associations. Play at your own pace without time limits and use hints if needed.

title: Bubble Pop Fairyland
description:
Bubble Pop Fairyland is an exciting bubble shooter game that’s very highly addictive!
Aim, shoot & pop all the color bubbles using epic blasters to clear the board and win coins!

Bubble Pop Fairyland is a fun and relaxing puzzle game designed to keep your mind sharp at any age.
It also is a perfect brain training and fast solution making game
You will have hours of fun shooting & matching the same colored bubbles!

title: Bubble Shooter Aura
description:
Bubble Shooter Aura brings a fresh, glowing twist to the classic bubble-shooting experience.
Enter a world of soft colors, smooth animations, and relaxing “aura” effects as you match and pop bubbles to clear levels and reach high scores.

Perfect for both casual players and bubble shooter fans, this game offers intuitive controls, satisfying gameplay, and a modern look that feels calm, fun, and addictive.

title: Fly and shoot 1. Italian Bosses
description: Nostalgia for 8-bit games. A classic arcade shooter with leveling elements and character selection. Fly and shoot, take down enemies, and blow up and destroy everything in your path. Defeat the boss at the end of each level. Save Laba and earn bonuses for doing so. Each difficulty level is slightly different. Enemies become more aggressive, and the speed increases.

title: Celebrities Get Ready For Christmas
description: Step into the world of ‘Celebrities Get Ready for Christmas’! Join your favorite stars as they prepare for the festive season. Explore dazzling holiday outfits, glamorous decorations, and witness the magic of Christmas through the eyes of celebrities. Get ready for a star-studded holiday celebration! Play and have fun!

title: Toytopia
description: Toytopia is a cozy merge-and-repair adventure where you combine art items to craft materials and restore broken toys. Every toy has its own look and challenge, so you’ll keep unlocking new fixes and surprises. Relaxing, creative, and gently strategic.

title: Color Sand Puzzle
description: Welcome to Color Sand Puzzle! Relax and unwind with Color Sand Puzzle, a refreshing take on the classic block puzzle game! Your mission is simple yet fun—fill the grid with matching colors of sand to clear and control the lines. As colorful sand blocks fall from the top, you’ll need to strategically arrange them to form complete horizontal rows. When the sand lines up from left to right, they disappear, and you earn points!

title: Cut In Half
description:
Cut obstacles in the way with knives or characters.
If you touch a red block or fall into a valley, it's a game over.
Collect the goods as much as you cut the obstacles to unlock new characters!

title: Popping Candies
description: Match and crush candies to achieve goals in this addictive puzzle game! Swap adjacent candies to form rows of three or more and clear the board. Create special candies like striped, wrapped, or color bombs to enhance your progress. Overcome obstacles like chocolate and blockers while completing each level's unique objectives. Be mindful of your limited moves! Use boosters for extra assistance and advance through challenging levels to unlock new stages.

title: Knock and Run. 100 Doors Escape
description: Become the fastest and most daring stickman in this fun arcade game! Your goal is to race through the corridors of the hotel, ring the doors, knock and slam them, arranging epic pranks. The main thing is not to get caught! Residents' reactions are unpredictable, and danger can lurk around every corner.

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning supercars with crazy speed limits and drive them through 4 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Crazy Traffic Racer!

title: NinjaRoof
description: NinjaRoof is a fast-paced and addictive arcade game where players control a nimble character jumping from rooftop to rooftop while avoiding deadly obstacles and aiming for the highest score. Test your timing, precision, and reflexes in this endless jumping adventure built with smooth physics and clean visuals.

title: Barry Prison Christmas Adventure
description: Want the craziest Christmas escape adventure ever? Barry Prison Christmas Adventure is an exciting role-playing simulator. Enter chase mode or evade mode. Here, you will play the role of either the hider or the seeker. Select your preferred scenario to begin the challenge. Find a hidden spot to start hiding and evade your pursuers.

title: Mahjong Tile Club
description: Step into the relaxing world of Mahjong Tile Club, where timeless tile-matching meets innovative gameplay! This solitaire-style mahjong game is perfect for anyone looking for a calm yet engaging puzzle experience. With simple rules and soothing gameplay, it’s easy to pick up and hard to put down. Match identical tiles, clear the board, and enjoy a satisfying sense of accomplishment.

title: Drunk But Not Wasted Knight
description: Stumble into a moonlit alley and befriend a tipsy yet oddly wise knight in this comedic medieval visual novel. Banter, make choices, and nudge affection as you chase stories, dodge trouble, and unlock quirky endings.

title: Wave Dash : Geometry Arrow
description: Ride the wave in Wave Dash, a rhythm platformer where each tap steers your arrow through tight corridors. Read patterns in waves, time jumps to music, and beat brutal stages. Build routes with the level editor, share creations, unlock icons, chase ranks, and perfect speed runs. Simple controls, fast restarts—pure focus and flow. Inspired by classic geometry platformers, tuned for dash mastery.

title: Monster School 2
description: Monsters from minecraft are trained at the monster school by Herobrin's teacher. Take the tests, find out who is a Noob and who is a real pro in Bottle Flip challenge, parkour and roller coaster!

title: Lingo Dreams
description:
Learn English while playing
Lingo Dreams is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that helps you memorize English words through matching exercises. Find the correct pairs between your native language and English to complete each level.

Perfect for beginners, kids, or anyone who wants to expand their vocabulary while having fun.

title: Obby Rainbow Tower
description: Obby Rainbow Tower is a fast, winter-themed tower race where every second and every jump matters. Each floor is packed with moving platforms, icy tiles, spinning lava bars, surprise snowstorms and snowball portals that try to knock you into the void.  You can replay the tower as many times as you like, trying to beat your own best time or racing a friend side by side in 2 player mode.

title: Paper Wars: Battles and Upgrades
description: Real battle on a sheet of paper! Choose your troops, aim, and destroy the enemy. Play with a friend or against AI. Unlock new fighters and upgrade your attacks!

title: Christmas Blind Box‌
description: This is a Christmas toy blind box opening game! Click the "Open" button to test your luck—can you beat the high score for the number of Christmas toys collected?

title: My Arcade Center
description: My Arcade Center is a fast-paced management game where you build and expand your own arcade. Earn tokens by day, upgrade machines by night, hire staff, use coin bots, and handle freeloaders and vandals. Unlock new machines, optimize layouts, manage customer behavior, and progress through 9 handcrafted maps for long-term growth.

title: Magic Beauty Makeup
description: Welcome to Magic Beauty Makeup, a casual and relaxing girl makeover game on H5games4u. The girl is in trouble with her appearance. Help her return to her original beauty with skin care and makeup methods. You will act as a makeover artist who does skin care, applies facial makeup, and designs a perfect look in the virtual fashion salon. And the best part? All the makeup procedures are done just by clicking and dragging.

title: Screw Masters 3D Puzzle
description:
Collect screws, take apart complex objects piece by piece, and test your puzzle-solving skills! Work your way through exciting levels, dismantle items down to the tiniest parts, and earn amazing rewards along the way. Use powerful bonuses to advance faster, beat challenging stages, and reach new heights.
Play, win, and share your best results with friends!

title: Fashionista Christmas Eve Party
description: Indulge in the Fashionista Christmas Eve Party extravaganza! Discover glamorous holiday ensembles, festive accessories, and the perfect blend of chic for a stylish celebration. Join the fashion-forward festivities and elevate your Christmas Eve style to new heights. Unwrap the magic of the season with Fashionista, where every outfit is a statement and every moment is a fashion triumph. Let the glamour of Christmas Eve unfold.

title: Connect Clues - The Missing Professor
description:
A tangled detective story is about to unfold.

Inspector Hale and Detective Crane are on the trail of a mysteriously vanished professor of history and archaeology — who also happens to be Crane’s old friend.
Professor Eldridge was always a touch eccentric, but disappearing without a word and leaving his office turned upside down was never part of his habits. He’s clearly in trouble — and in need of help.

title: Save little red hood
description:
Match-3 puzzles combined with physics-based gameplay: eliminate blocks to make stones fall and become Little Red Riding Hood's weapons, which she then uses to attack the wolf.
Plan your elimination route carefully, utilizing gravity to make the stones fall and become weapons—that's the ultimate goal. Various power-ups can also help you.

title: Brainrot Cleaning
description: Welcome to Brainrot Cleaning, the weirdly satisfying cleaning simulation that turns chaos into calm. In this fun and quirky casual game, your job is to scrub away the mess caused by the wild world of brainrot characters and their hilarious antics! In the Cleaning Italian Brainrot or the Underwater mode, you will finish various cleaning tasks.

title: Flower Fairy Adventure Story
description: Welcome to Flower Fairy Adventure Story, a casual puzzle game that you can play for free. Flower Fairy lost her wings! Embark on an adventure where you solve each tiny jigsaw, dress up your girl in pretty clothes, and pave the way for the Flower Fairy. Practice your observation, logical thinking, and hands-on ability while enjoying the relaxing and captivating puzzle game.

title: Cupid Unchained
description:
Take aim, shoot true, and break the chains of fate!
Rescue trapped souls using your trusty bow as you solve clever physics puzzles, shatter chains, and free everyone before time runs out!

title: C.A.P.
description:
Take to the skies and protect the carrier in this shooter inspired by WW2 dogfights. 
Dodge enemy fighters, protect your aircraft carrier, and blast through waves of incoming planes. 
Remember to come back to the carrier to refuel!
With crisp pixel-art 3D visuals and one-touch controls, this shooter delivers satisfying action perfect for short play.

title: Ocean Pop
description: Ocean Pop is a lively underwater puzzle game where real 2D bubbles float, bounce, and cluster with natural physics. Pop matching bubbles, trigger chain reactions, and enjoy dynamic, ever-shifting puzzles. Its colorful ocean setting, smooth mechanics, and playful movement create a relaxing yet engaging experience that’s easy to learn and satisfying to master.

title: Prism Match 3D
description:
Enter a dazzling 3D world of colorful prism cubes and test your mind like never before. 
 Immersive 3D Graphics – Rotate, zoom, and explore beautifully crafted levels full of hidden tiles.
 Addictive & Relaxing – Easy to learn, hard to master. Balance logic, timing, and focus to win.
 Endless Challenges – Progress through creative stages that keep the fun fresh and engaging.
 Think & Unwind – Relax your mind while sharpening memory, observation, and problem-solving skills.

title: Dig out of Prison
description:
You are a prisoner determined to break free. Dig tunnels with a spoon, shovel, or anything you can find. Discover valuables, trade with fellow inmates and even the guards, and earn the prison’s top currency — toilet paper.

Upgrade your digging and trading skills, unlock better tools, and speed up your escape. But be careful — plan your moves and avoid drawing attention, because freedom is the prize only for the most cunning.

title: Associations
description:
Find Associations between words!

There are many different levels waiting for you with no time limit. No rush, just an exciting game that will help you relax and unwind.

This game is suitable for those who want to test their wits in this interesting puzzle game!

The game will definitely interest you if you like "Wordle", "Mahjong", "Guess the words", "2048", "Nonograms", "Crosswords", "Filwords", "Three in a row", "Puzzles", "Reagents".

Have a nice game!

title: What a walk
description: Whatawalk! silly walking with wobbly legsWhatawalk! is a highly addictive classical game. Even if you've never heard of it before, play it just once and you'll be hooked.

title: Conquer.io
description: Expand your zone and assert your dominance over every territory on the map. Plan your moves to outmaneuver opponents and gain as much space as possible. But beware, your rivals will stop at nothing to thwart your plans. Are you ready to claim your space?

title: Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve
description: Celebrate the magic of the holiday season with Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve, a delightful game where players join Ellie and Ben as they prepare for the most wonderful night of the year. From decorating the tree to picking the perfect outfits, this game brings the charm of Christmas to life in a fun and interactive way.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Get ready to dive into the timeless classic Spider Solitaire, reimagined for mobile with sleek design and intuitive gameplay! Perfect for players of all skill levels, this game offers a relaxing yet challenging card puzzle experience anytime, anywhere.

title: Red Stickman vs Monster School
description:
Red Stickman vs Monster School - stickman game where you need to pick up different weapons and clear levels from mobs from the school of monsters. The game contains

- 60 levels
- 10 bosses
- Many types of different weapons!

Did you like the game "Red Stickman vs Monster School "? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Cube Drop Puzzle
description:
Colorful bears are waiting to splash water!

Welcome to Cube Drop Puzzle!

Are you ready to start puzzle solving? Play Cube Drop Puzzle now and make a splash!

title: Butterfly Sort Puzzle
description:
Various kinds of butterflies sitting on leaves.
Shy butterflies can only fly next to friends of the same kind.
Bring its friends to one leaf and fly them together~

title: 2 Player Battle
description: Seeking an exciting way to spend time with friends and family is most significant. Look no further than Party Battle, the ultimate 2-4 player game! With 30 different games, this exciting collection has something for everyone.

title: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3
description: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3 is a free New Year's match-3 game where you'll complete vibrant levels, create combinations of three or more, earn bonuses, and help the heroes decorate the festive town. Solve match-3 puzzles, combine elements, use power-ups, explosions, and super combos to complete tasks faster and advance the story.

title: Teacher Simulator Christmas Exam
description: Welcome to the funniest and busiest Christmas classroom ever! Teacher Simulator: Christmas Exam is a charming and playful teacher class simulator where you act as a holiday teacher. Manage orders, hand out exam papers, grade tests, etc. Different classes are scheduled on different days of the week, such as art class, geography class, math class, and so on.

title: Pool Master
description: From a rookie with a cue to a legend of the table, journey through 100 challenging levels with closed pockets, special balls to clear and more. Unlock custom gear, gain special boosts and rule the table with precision and power.

title: Urus City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning sports SUV through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Kiss O Neck
description:
Kiss O Neck: Stretch, Kiss, and Laugh Out Loud
Each level brings a new, funny, and totally unexpected situation.
You never know what’s going to happen when you stretch that neck a little further

title: Wild West Match 3
description: Saddle up for a Wild West adventure in Bubble Shooter Wild West! Join Sheriff Bonnie as you pop colorful bubbles to defend your frontier town. Travel through dusty deserts, lively saloons, and scenic canyons while enjoying toe-tapping country tunes. Track your progress with detailed stats showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With its vibrant Western visuals and exciting challenges, this bubble shooter brings cowboy spirit to every pop!

title: Kings and Queens Match 3
description: Step into Kings and Queens Match 3, the enchanting third chapter of the royal Match-3 adventure! Match jewels, crowns, and other royal artifacts to progress through exciting levels. Use powerful boosters like bombs, hammers, and royal blasts to clear challenging boards. Unlock new parts of the kingdom as you enjoy stunning visuals and a charming soundtrack. Join the royal quest and discover treasure, challenge, and endless fun!

title: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow
description: Geometry Vibes X Arrow is the newest evolution of the Geometry Vibes series, offering the most refined, competitive and customizable arrow experience so far. The goal is simple but demanding: guide your arrow through dangerous geometric paths, survive increasingly difficult patterns and reach the portal at the end of each route without touching anything.

title: My Garden Journey
description:
Grow your dream garden, raise animals, and enjoy peaceful farm life!

Welcome to My Garden Journey! ?? Start your peaceful farming adventure in My Garden Journey, the ultimate relaxing farming simulator!

title: Merge Tower Hero
description: Dive into Merge Tower Hero, an exhilarating online puzzle - Merge game that sharpens your mathematical thinking while exhilaratingly combining action, strategy, and combat. Assemble your team and tackle challenging battles that require not only strength but clever gameplay strategies to prevail!

title: Merge Christmas
description: Merge Christmas is a festive puzzle game where you combine matching snowballs to create new character / bigger snowballs, and unlock a cozy Christmas world. Relax and merge Christmas-themed snowballs in a cheerful winter atmosphere perfect for the holiday season.

title: Rescue Sharp Turn
description: Rescue Puzzle 3D is a lightweight 3D fun puzzle game. You need to click on the correct objects in the small three-dimensional scene to trigger mechanisms, remove obstacles or form a chain reaction to meet the level conditions and rescue the injured character. The levels are short but full of ingenuity: turn off the power switch, move rocks, release water to extinguish fire, synthesize props...

title: Steal Brainrot Monsters!
description:
Step into a world of fun, charm, and Italian flair with Buy Cute and Funny Animals! From the tiny and delightful Nubini Pizzanini to the rare and majestic Tralalelo Tralala and the playful Los Tralalelitos, there’s no shortage of adorable creatures to collect.

Build your very own cozy base, place your animals in it, and make them feel right at home. In return, they’ll reward you with coins, which you can use to unlock even more animals and exciting upgrades.

title: Ball Craze Sort
description:
Ball Craze Sort is a fun, relaxing, and addictive puzzle game where your goal is to sort colorful balls into the correct order. What starts as a simple task quickly turns into a brain-teasing challenge as more colors and tubes are introduced.
Ball Craze Sort is the perfect game to unwind or mentally recharge. Whether you’re looking to relax for a few minutes or challenge your logic skills for hours, this game offers the ideal balance between fun and focus.

title: Sand Blast
description:
Sand Blast – A Satisfying Flowing-Sand Puzzle Experience, a relaxing yet strategic puzzle game built on soft, flowing sand physics!
Every block is made of loose, unstable sand — place it, and it instantly crumbles and shifts with gravity. These pieces won’t stay still, so you’ll need to think ahead and plan every move carefully.

title: Nine Cards Of Winter
description:
Get into the holiday spirit with Nine Cards of Winter, a fun and relaxing tile-matching game!
Pick up to 9 Christmas tiles and match 3 of the same to clear them. Watch out — if your stack fills up, the game is over!
Use smart moves to uncover hidden tiles, solve tricky puzzles, and enjoy cute holiday designs.It’s easy to play, relaxing to enjoy, and full of winter charm!

title: Darts Jam
description:
This is a casual game of shooting balloons with darts.

When all the darts are pulled out, the board will also fall. When all the boards fall, the game is won.

The game is easy and simple to play, and the difficulty is getting stronger and stronger, which is challenging

title: CUBE KING
description:
Show them who's the real King here!

New cubes appear from the portals at the bottom. Your task is to connect cubes with the same numbers by moving them from one stack to another!

You get coins for every merge. Use them wisely:
Upgrade a selected cube!
Unlock new portals with cubes!
Increase the starting level of cubes!
Extinguish burning cubes or instantly shatter the ice on all frozen cubes!

But be careful: if a stack overflows, the game ends!

title: Magic Sort
description:
Welcome to Magic Sort! — a relaxing and satisfying color-sorting puzzle with a cute cat café twist!
Your job is to organize colorful water layers inside multiple bottles. Each bottle contains mixed colors, and you must pour them carefully to sort every color correctly. Remember:
You can only pour when the top layers are the same color.
Once a bottle is perfectly sorted and filled with a single color, it magically transforms into a finished drink for your adorable cat customers!

title: Roller Coaster 3D
description:
Go through this roller coaster, pick up more passengers along the way and have more fun!
Can you pass all the obstacles and enjoy all the crazy loops?
Enjoy the ride!
Unlocks all the different mechanics and many levels!

title: Blast Cubes
description: Blast Cubes is an addictive puzzle game where players strategically place cubes on a grid. When cubes align in horizontal or vertical rows, they explode, triggering an exciting chain reaction! After the explosion, characters of the same color as the exploded cube emerge and move towards vehicles of the same color waiting at the top. Once the vehicles are filled, new ones appear, continuing the cycle.

title: Stickman Weapon Master
description:
Fight as a lone brave stickman against the tyranny and Evil
Fight as a lone brave stickman against the tyranny and evil Lord in the land of Stickman Weapon Master.

title: Furry Wedding Proposal
description: Hi, young stylist! You will find a very unusual couple in love - a brutal fox and a feminine bunny - who are preparing for their future wedding. They dream of looking stunning on this holiday and you will become their main assistant in this exciting adventure! You have to dress the characters in beautiful wedding dresses, choose stylish hairstyles for them and apply light makeup. Create, fantasize and create a fairy tale!

title: Bloon Pop
description:
Bloon Pop is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you rotate the frame to pop colorful balloons using a spinning saw!
Use gravity and timing to guide all the balloons toward the blades and watch them burst into vibrant splashes of color.
With bright visuals and relaxing gameplay, Bloon Pop offers satisfying fun for players of all ages. Can you pop them all?

title: Marble Blast
description: Ready to match, blast, and conquer? This vibrant marble shooter game offers endless fun and challenges that test your skills and strategy. Clear colorful marbles, unlock powerful boosters, and prove you’re the master of marble puzzles! Whether you’re a casual gamer or a puzzle enthusiast, this game delivers excitement like no other.

title: Road Of Fury 4
description: Road Of Fury 4 is a scroller shooter game set in a world of post-apocalypse. Team-up with other nomads, upgrade cars, guns and super-powers and use your skills to fight through 30 levels and 3 bosses.

title: Stick vs Monster School 2
description:
Stick vs Monster School 2 is now fighting zombies!

He's in for fights and epic battles in the world during the zombie apocalypse!

Game features:
- Make cool shot
- Buy guns
- Fight zombies and bosses!

Did you like the game "Stick vs Monster School 2"? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Word Clash
description: Words are the key to progress. With a massive number of levels to explore, you will improve your vocabulary. Use hints when needed and stay hooked for hours. Keep solving, keep learning and see how many challenges you can conquer along the way.

title: Nuwpy's Adventure
description:
Nuwpy’s Adventure is a classic pixel-art platformer inspired by retro arcade games!
Help Nuwpy explore colorful worlds, collect coins, jump over enemies, and avoid traps.
Each level offers new challenges, hidden secrets, and a fast-paced journey full of charm and nostalgia.
Dive into the pixel world and enjoy simple yet addictive gameplay!

title: Bubble Shooter Wild West
description: Saddle up for a Wild West adventure in Bubble Shooter Wild West! Join Sheriff Bonnie as you pop colorful bubbles to defend your frontier town. Travel through dusty deserts, lively saloons, and scenic canyons while enjoying toe-tapping country tunes. Track your progress with detailed stats showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With its vibrant Western visuals and exciting challenges, this bubble shooter brings cowboy spirit to every pop!

title: Hexa Stack Christmas
description: Get into the holiday spirit with Hexa Stack Christmas: a festive twist on the classic hexagon-stacking puzzle game. Place the Christmas-themed hexagon tiles stacks onto the board and sort the same color tiles to collect them. The game combines a light puzzle that requires attention and logic — perfect for relaxing while stimulating your brain. 2 game modes, infinite levels, a user-friendly interface, and save support let you play anytime without losing progress.

title: Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary
description: Welcome to Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary – the place where your style dreams come to life! Step into the shoes of a talented fashion designer, build your own boutique, and create stunning outfits that dazzle the world. From fabric to final look, you’re in charge of every stitch!

title: Pet Me Maze
description:
Welcome to Pet Me Maze, the most hilarious and addictive maze puzzle game that combines humor, challenge, and adorable pets
Are you ready to test your wits and reflexes in a maze full of surprises, traps, and funny moments

title: Epic Stunts PvP 3D
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning muscle car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Hexa Tap Away
description: Hexa Tap Away is a sleek one-direction hex puzzle. Drag tiles to move them in the only direction they can travel, create space, and clear the board. Each level adds trickier layouts, blockers, and tight corridors that demand planning ahead. Short, snackable stages, smooth controls, and a clean look make it easy to start and hard to stop. Stuck? Try a hint or rethink your route and there’s always a smarter move!

title: Card Quest: 10 Minute Adventure
description: Embark on an exhilarating journey with Card Quest: 10 Minute Adventure, where quick thinking and strategy collide in an exciting online card challenge. Build your deck, make smart moves, and face thrilling encounters that test your skills and timing. Designed for both desktop and mobile players, this free-to-play adventure delivers fast, tactical gameplay and endless replayability. Every decision shapes your path — can you conquer the quest in just ten minutes?

title: Matching Puzzle
description:
Paintings blocks fall from the sky.
When you touch the ground, the pictures are covered, remember that picture and guess the same picture.
If you match the picture quickly, you can get additional points as a combo.

title: Radical Rappelling
description:
Feel the rush and hold on tight as Radical Rappelling is back!

Join Rip and Roxy as you rappel down mountains at breakneck speed using your rapid reflexes.

Pull off death-defying tricks by ricocheting between launch pads, riding rainbows and rocketing over obstacles in the most redonkulous adventure ever.

Rack up coins and complete rockin’ missions to unlock sweet new gear for Rip and Roxy, the most fearless risk-takers on the planet.

title: Cinema Business - Idle Games
description:
Build and manage your own cinema empire! 
Unlock movie rooms, snack and burger corners to attract more customers.
Hire staff, upgrade facilities, and keep your theater running smoothly.
Earn cash even while you’re offline and grow your business.
Become the ultimate cinema tycoon in this fun idle arcade game!

title: Epic Racing - Descent on Cars
description:
To tear yourself and your neighbor to shreds, but to reach the finish line first is an "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars"!

Epic collisions, a serious fight to the finish line and a million ways to bend and twist metal - that's what awaits you in the game "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars".

Burn rubber and tear metal - the game begins!

title: Chain Puzzle
description: Chain Puzzle is a relaxing logic game where you carefully untangle intricate chained constructions. Each construction is a single system of two same-colored balls connected by a chain. Every move changes the shape of the structure: the chain can automatically shorten, opening new ways to solve the puzzle. Observe, adjust positions, and find the right sequence of actions to completely unravel the knot.

title: Sort Game Toy Sort
description: Enjoy some adorable sorting fun in Sort Game: Toy Sort. This delightful match 3 puzzle and casual sort game challenges you to organize colorful dolls and toys. Match and eliminate all dolls within the limited time. When you encounter difficulties, use items to help you quickly clear the level. Such as Convert, Eliminate, Refresh or Break.

title: Royal Garden Match 2
description: Royal Garden Match 2 is here! Join Aria as she tends the kingdom’s most prestigious Royal Garden. Restore it to its former glory by completing fun match-3 puzzles! Match royal flowers, fruits, and plants across hundreds of levels packed with daily missions and challenges. Enjoy a magical journey full of beauty, strategy, and rewards. Play Royal Garden Match 2 now and bring the Royal Garden back to life!

title: Mojicon Winter Connect
description:
The Mojicon series returns for the holidays! Match festive tiles, break the new Ice Sheet blockers, and enjoy a relaxing winter puzzle adventure. ❄️
Mojicon Winter Connect takes the classic Onet matching fun you love and covers it in a layer of fresh snow. Immerse yourself in a cozy holiday atmosphere, connecting festive icons like reindeer, gingerbread men, and happy snowmen.
Fast, satisfying, and full of seasonal charm – it’s the perfect winter puzzle for all ages. ✨✨✨

title: Word Connect Puzzle
description: Word Connect Puzzle is a relaxing yet brain-boosting word game. Swipe letters to form hidden words, unlock new packs, and watch the difficulty rise as your vocabulary grows. Earn stars, complete daily challenges, and use hints when you’re stuck. Play offline anytime, enjoy clean visuals and smooth controls, and chase streak bonuses for higher scores. Perfect for quick sessions or long puzzle runs—smart, simple, and satisfying for all ages.

title: Bubble Trouble 2: Rebubbled
description:
A classic arcade bubble shooter where you play as a devil in a trench coat, armed with a harpoon gun to tackle dangerous bouncing bubbles. Each bubble you shoot splits into smaller ones until they're completely destroyed. Navigate through levels with platforms and power-ups while avoiding contact with any bubble.

How to play:
- Clear all bubbles from each level to progress
- Avoid getting touched by bubbles - or lose a life
- Features single-player and cooperative multiplayer modes

title: Duo Family Santa
description: Steve and Alex need to race against each other. The one who holds the Lucky Block wins the game. Hold onto the Lucky Block until the time runs out to win the game. You can earn money by collecting socks and you can also earn money by defeating your friend. You must be very careful; steal the Lucky Block from your friend and keep it until the time is up.

title: Ping Pong Air
description: Table tennis, also known as ping pong, is an easy and enjoyable arcade game in which you control the bat as simply as in life: with the mouse or the movement of your finger. Several modes await you to suit every taste. In classic mode, you go through worlds, earn cups and unlock new opportunities. In Halloween mode, you have to banish spirits for a while, improving your reaction. In Career mode, you move up the tournament ladder, taking part in games against increasingly stronger opponents.

title: Coe Snake
description: Coe Snake brings the classic snake game with new challenges! Collect fruits, dodge meteors, walls, bombs, and balls that move like ping pong. Multiple modes, scenarios, and fruits to choose from. Fast-paced, colorful, and addictive — how far can you go?

title: Gift Merge Santa World Tour
description:
Gift Merge: Santa World Tour

Help Santa spread Christmas joy across the globe!
Tap to generate gifts, merge identical items to craft new toys, and fulfill children’s wishes to raise each country’s happiness. Travel from snowy towns to sunny beaches, unlocking new festive destinations. Merge, match, and make magic — the more joy you spread, the closer Santa gets to completing his world tour!

title: Pipe Connect
description: Pipe Connect is a brilliant puzzle solver with an acute attention to detail and a sharp mind. Their function is to join dispersed pipe segments on a grid to provide a continuous water flow path from beginning to end. They must rotate and position pipes of different shapes, such as straight lines, elbows, and T-junctions, within a set amount of time or space as the puzzles get harder. Obstacles such as various sources, restricted routes, or challenging layouts are specific to each level.

title: Rocket Fest
description: Control the rocket to collect energy or other useful props along the way, and bomb the target at the end! This is a casual stress relief game.

title: Barbee Black Friday Fashion
description: Get ready for a fashion-filled shopping day with Barbee Black Friday Fashion, the ultimate dress-up experience for style lovers! Barbee is hitting the mall for the biggest sale of the year, and she needs your expert fashion sense to shine. Explore chic winterwear, cozy sweaters, stylish boots, and dazzling accessories.

title: Car Out Jam
description:
Car Parking. A puzzle game with cars and passengers.
Complete interesting levels with various mechanics!
The game will be interesting for both who want to relax leisurely and for those who like to unravel complex moves.
Easy levels are combined with more difficult ones. And some will be a real challenge for your brain!

title: THE KULKA
description:
THE KULKA is a one-button bullet-heaven arcade game where your single shot evolves into chaos. Inspired by Flappy Birds, Vampire Survivor and Pattern Survivors: Bullet Hell. 

MUTATE YOUR BULLET. FLAP, EVOLVE, SURVIVE.

title: Burger Empire
description:
Welcome to Burger & Beans Cafe, the ultimate restaurant-management game where you cook juicy burgers, brew the perfect coffee, and build the eatery of your dreams!

• Serve Delicious Orders: Flip patties and pour lattes for hungry customers—fast!
• Earn & Upgrade: Collect coins to unlock chic new tables, comfy booths, and vibrant dining areas.
• Customize Your Space: Choose décor, layout, and special menu items to keep guests coming back.

title: CS: Upgrade Gun
description: The weapon is alive and ready to go hunting! In this fast-paced launcher, you control a cannon that runs itself and shoots at targets. Collect boosters, improve their performance and last as long as possible. The further you go, the more action and explosions!

title: Hidden objects: Lost Island 2
description: Discover an immersive adventure on a lost island full of secrets, mysteries, and ancient artifacts. Together with a charismatic explorer, you’ll find yourself deep in tropical jungles where a forgotten temple of an ancient civilization lies hidden beneath overgrown vines and trees. Every location is a handcrafted scene packed with hidden objects, puzzles, and clues about the mysterious past.

title: Celebrity Thanksgiving Prep
description: It’s Thanksgiving, and the celebrities are getting ready for the big day! In Celebrity Thanksgiving Prep, you’ll help your favorite stars get glammed up for the holiday dinner. Start by creating stunning makeup looks, styling hair, and choosing the perfect fall outfit. Then, join them in the kitchen for some festive cooking fun! From cozy sweaters to chic party dresses, show off your fashion taste and creativity in this delightful seasonal makeover game.

title: Money Maker
description: Money Maker is an addictive strategy and idle game that lets you build your fortune from the ground up. Combine smart investments with clever upgrades to grow your virtual empire. Merge pins, upgrade your Money Machine, and watch your income skyrocket as you master the art of wealth creation. With its vibrant visuals and satisfying progression system, Money Maker turns every click into profit!

title: 2248 Blast
description: Are you ready to train your brain while having fun? 2248 Blast is a highly addictive number-connecting puzzle game designed to relax your mind and sharpen your logic skills! With simple swipe controls and engaging gameplay, this game is perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages.

title: Inspector Cat
description:
Inspector Cat is a competitive hidden object game where you play as a sharp-eyed cat inspector racing against other feline players!
Each round challenges you to find specific items on a crowded board full of objects. Be faster and more accurate than the other cats to earn points and climb the ranking.
Stay focused, react quickly, and prove you’re the best inspector in the pack!

title: Chiron City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning sports car through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Capybara Xmas Merge
description:
Capybara Xmas Merge is a cute and cozy holiday game where you combine adorable Christmas capybaras!
Drop festive capybaras into the box, watch them roll and bump into each other, and merge into bigger, funnier holiday characters.
Create giant capybaras, score points, and enjoy the warm winter atmosphere.

title: Mega Shark
description: One shark and a sea full of delicious fish. How hungry are you? You’ve got 60 seconds to prove it! Feed nonstop, survive the deepest waters and rely on your shark’s speed, strength and invincibility to complete each hunt. Collect coins and trophies to unlock and explore new stages.

title: Snake Puzzle: Slither to Eat!
description: Snake Puzzle: Slither to Eat is an exciting and relaxing puzzle game that will test your strategic thinking and planning skills!

title: Puppy Treat Sorting
description: Puppy Treat Sorting is a Sorting game where you must grab and sort identical bones to create a new and bigger one. Puppies will fall automatically into the arena; what you must do is drag the puppies around and choose them into identical ones.

title: Basketball Stars 2026
description: Basketball Stars is a cool 2 player basketball game by MadPuffers. Prepared for the 2025 basketball season. Choose your team and enter a challenging tournament. Control your player to perform awesome dunks and 3-pointers to win the game. Feel free to block and slap your opponent to knock him out and get the ball, and pay attention to the supershot bar on the top of the screen. Once fully loaded, you can use the hot special dunk from wherever you stand; it never fails. Be the best player!

title: Blox Fruits
description: Embark on an epic adventure across the seas in Blox Fruits, a Roblox MMORPG inspired by the world of One Piece. Choose your path as a Pirate or Marine, master powerful abilities granted by mystical Blox Fruits, and strive to become the strongest player in the game

title: Car Crash Test: Abandoned City
description: Car Crash Test: Abandoned City throws you into a thrilling sandbox of chaos and destruction. Explore a vast, deserted city where every street is your testing ground. Drive, crash, and experiment with powerful vehicles while mastering realistic physics and dynamic crash effects. Whether you’re speeding down empty highways or performing daring stunts, this game lets you push every car — and your reflexes — to the limit.

title: Noob: Skyblock Survival
description:
Welcome to the game Noob: Skyblock Survival!

Noob: Skyblock Survival is a sandbox survival game on an island in the style of Minecraft, where you need to dig blocks.

Features of the game:
- Dig blocks
- Plant trees and wheat
- Survive on a cube island
- Expand your island, and then fight zombies!

Remember, you are a cool cube digger and you must survive!

If you liked our game "Noob: Skyblock Survival", then rate it and write a review, and also play our other games about Noob.

title: Murder Stone Age
description: Test your instincts in Murder Stone Age, a suspenseful tap-based thriller. Watch your back as mysterious figures follow you. One of them may mean harm. Tap to glance behind just in time: guess wrong and it's over. Can you outwit the stalker and survive?

title: Steal Car Duel
description:
Step into a high-energy world of engines, rivalry, and fast reflexes. Steal Car Duel is a competitive action game that evolves the idea of Steal a Brainrot into a car-based experience filled with duels, rare collectibles, and endless upgrades!

Race, collide, and steal your way to the top. Build your own garage, earn coins and tickets, and outsmart rivals to prove who rules the arena. Each match combines skill, timing, and strategy as you fight for dominance in Solo or 2 Player mode.

title: Gomu Goman
description: With simple tap-and-drag gameplay, Gomu Goman offers hundreds of challenging and laugh-out-loud levels. Each level is a unique puzzle that demands creativity—and a certain degree of spicy humor from you.

title: Sorting Xmas Balls
description:
Sorting Xmas Balls is a cozy winter puzzle game where you sort colorful Christmas ornaments into their correct tubes. Move the balls, group matching colors together, and enjoy calm, festive gameplay.

As you progress, the puzzles become more challenging with more tubes and more colors to organize. Bright graphics and a cheerful holiday theme make every level relaxing and satisfying to complete.

title: Winter Solitaire TriPeaks
description:
Take a break from the holiday bustle and unwind with Winter Solitaire TriPeaks!
Play over 500 frosty levels and clear shimmering, ice-covered tableaus. Escape into a peaceful winter wonderland filled with enchanting scenes that evolve as you build magical locations throughout the game. From a cozy cottage to a snow-dusted palace, every setting is a feast for the eyes.

Discover the most heart-warming Solitaire experience of the season — and let the snowflakes guide your cards to victory!

title: Christmas Blocks Sort
description: Blocks Sort Christmas Edition brings a cozy holiday twist to the classic sorting puzzle. All the blocks have turned into festive Christmas colors like bright red, pine green, frosty blue, and warm gold. They start mixed together in different columns, and your job is to sort them so each column ends up with just one color. The rules are simple, but the challenge is still satisfying. Think ahead, plan your moves, and slowly bring order to the holiday chaos.

title: We Are In A Simulation Simulator
description: We Are In A Simulation Simulator challenges you to question nothing and mimic everything. Blend in by copying the actions of others to survive in a strange digital world where free will doesn’t exist. Stay alert, follow the crowd, and don’t get caught acting out of sync. Play for free online on mobile or desktop and test your ability to conform in this mysterious simulation!

title: Worm: Apple Quest
description:
Get Ready for Challenging Puzzles in Worm: Apple Quest!

In this captivating puzzle platformer, guide your worm to the legendary Golden Apple while navigating devious obstacles and perilous chasms. The secret to success? Mastering your worm's growing length.

Every apple you collect makes your worm longer, unlocking new paths - but beware! With greater length comes tougher control. One wrong turn and you might get stuck, ending your run.

title: Blue Hedgehog Hill Dash Ride
description: Join a daring blue hedgehog on an epic uphill racing adventure! Race through challenging terrains—from rugged lands to moon hills—using simple controls to speed, jump, and perform stunts. With smooth physics and exciting levels, you’ll climb impossible hills and chase victory. Perfect for fans of racing, stunts, and adventure!

title: Latutu Holiday Gift Hunt
description: Latutu’s Holiday Gift Hunt is a cheerful matching game where you search through a pile of cute holiday toys and gifts to find three identical items. Drag each match into your slots to create a trio and clear space for more. With its cozy holiday theme, adorable Latutu characters, and satisfying match-and-clear gameplay, this game offers a relaxing yet exciting experience for all ages. Perfect for short sessions or high-score chasing during the festive season.

title: Mega Jump
description: Mega Jump is a fast-paced vertical arcade game where you leap from platform to platform, collect coins, and dodge hazards as you climb higher. Power-ups, shifting coins, and colorful boost stars keep every ascent exciting. With vibrant visuals and responsive movement, the challenge grows as you push for your highest score without missing a single platform.

title: Quiz 10 Seconds Math
description: Quiz 10 Seconds Math is a fun, fast-paced educational game that challenges your mental math skills! Race against the clock to solve addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division problems—each level gets harder as you progress. With only 10 seconds per question, every decision counts. Track your best score, compete with yourself, and boost your brainpower anytime, anywhere. Perfect for students, teachers, and math lovers who want to learn while playing! , no distractions

title: Tile Hexa Sort
description:
Dive into a world of colorful hexagons where every move requires careful planning. Your goal is to stack identical pieces into tall towers without mixing colors. The higher the tower, the more attention and strategic thinking is needed.

With each new level, more colors and towers appear, making move planning even more important. Think ahead to avoid mistakes and maintain order in the colorful chaos.

title: Acox Runner
description: Acox Runner is a casual game that tests your agility, running, jumping and sliding to avoid obstacles, beautiful music and relaxing but challenging levels make you addicted

title: Dolphin Dash
description: Launch your dolphin out of the water and smash through obstacles in this fast-paced underwater adventure. Collect coins, defeat bosses, and explore colorful ocean worlds full of surprises!

title: Vibe Colouring
description: Relax with your favorite color by number game! Paint hundreds of pictures — from funny memes to calm landscapes. Every drawing is a little story that comes to life with your colors. Over 100 levels already in the game, and the library keeps growing. All pictures are open and free — no limits or waiting. Hints will show you where uncolored areas are hiding. Check the leaderboard to see who colored the most areas.

title: Winter Wonderland Mahjong
description: Escape into a cozy Winter Wonderland filled with snowflakes, penguins, and festive cheer! Relax with calming music as you match beautifully crafted tiles in this soothing Mahjong puzzle game. Unlock charming new backgrounds and unique tile designs as you progress, each adding warmth and wonder to your journey. Perfect for unwinding, celebrating the holidays, and discovering the magic of winter—one match at a time.

title: Screw Match
description: Screw Match is a colorful puzzle game that tests your logic and coordination. Match screws of different colors to their corresponding glass nut boxes. The rules are simple, but the challenge grows with every level.

title: Pop Star
description: Ready to relax, think, and have fun all at once? In Star Pop Mania, the rules are simple, but the satisfaction is endless. Tap two or more matching blocks to pop them and clear the board. The bigger the combo, the higher the score—and the more rewarding it feels!

title: Brain Draw Line
description:
Brain Draw Line is a minimalist puzzle game where you must complete shapes using a single, continuous line. There are no timers or unnecessary distractions — the focus is purely on precision and planning. Each level presents a unique figure that you must finish without lifting your finger or mouse and without crossing the line twice.
The experience is calm, strategic, and rewarding — ideal for players who enjoy logic-based challenges.

title: Help Me: Tricky Brain Puzzles
description:
Put your mind to the test in this fun and challenging brain puzzle game! ?
Solve tricky riddles, make tough decisions, and uncover mysteries in each level. From saving lives to solving absurd situations, every case challenges your logic and creativity.

title: Santa Go
description:
Santa Go is a cozy Christmas puzzle game where you help Santa reach his sleigh!
Draw a line for Santa to slide along and watch him glide under a cheerful holiday melody.
Be careful — with each level, more obstacles appear, and they can easily knock Santa down.
Your goal is to guide him into the sleigh and keep him there for 3 seconds to complete the level!

title: Paint Rush
description: White houses are boring. Bring the colors in and paint everything in seconds. Complete every level painting all white spaces. Swipe left, right, up and down and fill all the empty spots on Paint Rush

title: Sushi Puzzle
description: Welcome to a tasty brain teaser where every move counts! But be careful—space is limited ?️, so you’ll need to calculate each tap and plan your moves wisely.

title: Super Hero Tycoon
description: Build your superhero empire and dominate the battlefield! In Super Hero Tycoon, choose from iconic heroes like Iron Man, Spider-Man, or The Hulk, and construct your base to generate income, unlock powerful gear, and engage in thrilling PvP combat. With over 2 billion visits, this game offers an immersive experience for fans of superheroes and tycoon-style gameplay.

title: Football Duel
description: Step into the arena in Football Duel! Take turns shooting and goalkeeping in this thrilling 3D penalty showdown. Swipe to score or defend — the first to 5 goals claims victory!

title: Athena Match 2
description: Athena Match 2 - the epic sequel returns! Join the goddess Athena on a new mythical journey through ancient Greece. Match 3 or more legendary artifacts to restore temples and unlock the secrets of the gods. Enjoy stunning visuals, immersive sound, and hundreds of new levels packed with daily missions and challenges. Step into the world of Greek mythology and prove your match-3 skills in this divine adventure!

title: Geometry Rush
description: Geometry Rush will take you to a world of challenging and treacherous platforming. Are you ready to run through trap-filled passages, jump and dodge death? Learn from your mistakes, perfect your reflexes, master the path without a single slip and advance to the next level.

title: Noob archer vs Stickman Zombie: zombie shooter
description: A fun shooting game in the world of minecraft with stickmen "Nubik and Zombie Stickmen" will allow you to play the role of a real archery pro! Nubik was quietly resting at home, lazily lying on the bed as usual, when suddenly Stickmen began to make noise, have fun and dance around with loud music. This needs to be dealt with. Fight zombies, help Nubik become a real pro in this challenge.

title: Stack Up
description: Stack Up is a vibrant puzzle game where strategy meets fun. Connect stacks of the same color to form long chains, reach level goals, and climb through increasingly challenging puzzles. With colorful visuals, smooth gameplay, and intuitive controls, Stack Up offers an addictive experience for players of all ages.

title: Stick War Saga
description: Prepare for an epic clash in Stick War: Saga, an exciting blend of fighting, action, strategy, and tower defense. Take command of your stickman army and lead them through nervous war campaigns. Mine resources, build your army, and unleash your strategic power to conquer enemy lands.

title: About a Frog
description: Jump into the world of About a Frog, a fun and free online game where you play as a brave little frog. Explore colorful levels, dodge obstacles, and enjoy the adventure on your phone or computer. It’s a light and exciting challenge for players who love quick reflexes and cute characters.

title: Xmas Hexa Sort
description:
Xmas Hexa Sort is a festive twist on the classic hexagon puzzle!
Move and place colorful stacks of blocks on the board to create perfect combinations and clear space. Relax, think ahead, and enjoy the cozy holiday atmosphere as you solve each cheerful puzzle!

title: Moto Traffic Rider
description: Throttle the roaring engines of 6 awesome superbikes with insane speed limits and ride them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can ride and control these bikes and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Upgrade your bikes with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the rides. Are you ready to show your bike riding skills? Prove yourself in Moto Traffic Rider

title: Tiny Baker Rainbow Buttercream Cake
description: Whip up layers of color and sweetness in Tiny Baker Rainbow Buttercream Cake! Mix, bake, and frost your way to the perfect rainbow treat, then finish with cute decorations that make your cake sparkle with charm.

title: Snow Ball Racing Mutliplayer
description:
Roll. Race. Win!

Build the biggest snowball you can — then launch it down the slope and watch it fly! The farther it rolls, the more wins you earn. Use wins to unlock new zones, collect pets, and climb the leaderboard.

Fast, satisfying, and endlessly replayable. Snowball Racing is perfect for players who love speed, upgrades, and competition.

title: Daily Solitaire Mahjong Classic
description: Daily Solitaire Mahjong Classic is a relaxing tile-matching puzzle game where you clear the board by pairing identical tiles. Play a new puzzle every day, unlock missed days with ads, and keep your weekly streak for exciting rewards! Track your progress in the Weekly Record, where you can challenge yourself to beat your All-Time Best Score. Enjoy smooth gameplay, balanced difficulty from easy to hard, and use helpful boosters like Hint, Shuffle, and Undo to master every layout.

title: Happy Bubbles
description: Boom! Hear that pop? The bubbles are calling! This classic bubble shooter blends quick reflexes with clever strategy. Spin the Lucky Wheel for extra rewards, claim weekly bonus and dive into a bright, cute world that never runs out of fun.

title: Burger Day
description: Burger Day is a fun and fast-paced arcade game that puts you in charge of a busy burger kitchen. Stack ingredients to serve up tasty orders as quickly as possible. Your speed and decision-making skills are tested as customer demands increase. Satisfy hungry customers to unlock fresh challenges and advance through exciting levels.
