title: Hidden Object - Girl and Cat
description:
You play as a sweet girl walking through the forest with her cat, Lassie.
Our girl was walking and everything was wonderful: the birds were singing, the flowers were a delight to the eye, and suddenly the cat meowed and ran off into the depths of the forest.
Our girl searched for her cat in the forest for a long time and didn't notice how night had fallen. Wandering through the forest, the girl came across an old house. What if our cat ran in there?

title: Super Tank Wrestle
description: Welcome to the world of tank battles, where you can control tanks to fight with other enemies on different maps. There are also a wealth of tanks for you to choose from!

title: Ball Sort: Color Puzzle
description: An exciting and engaging puzzle game. Move the balls into the flasks to sort them and advance to the next level. The game has many levels, each more challenging than the last! Can you reach the end?

title: Pesky Moles
description:
An ordinary farmer lived a quiet life and grew vegetables, but at some point, moles began to attack his garden and eat the entire crop.
After the next harvest, he decides to take everything into his own hands and protect his garden.
In Pesky Moles, you have to protect your garden from moles for a certain amount of time. The more pests you manage to neutralize and the more crops you save, the more coins you get. With the coins you earn, you can buy traps that will help you protect your garden.

title: Car Collision Master
description: Rev up for Car Collision Master Jagged canyons frame your blue jeep versus orange-black rivals on a looping desert track. Smoke trails and starry arches amp the chaos—customize your rig, battle friends, and dominate leaderboards in this wheel-warping thrill ride. Feel the V8 roar; claim victory in dust and daring!

title: Tricky Life
description:
Welcome to Tricky Life, the funniest brain test puzzle game ever made!
Here, logic meets laughter every level is designed to make you giggle, think twice, and smile when you finally find the answer.

title: Hoard Master Online
description: This is an upgrade and construction simulation game in which Empty is the protagonist. Use it to devour everything you want in exchange for money. Build and upgrade your black holes and territories!

title: Block Puzzle King
description: Smart Puzzle Block is a classic elimination game. Its adorable graphics prevent eye strain, and varied level difficulties keep it engaging. The game maintains freshness while offering abundant props for players to strategically use.

title: BBQ Sort Puzzle
description:
This is an interesting elimination puzzle game!

You need to put three identical items into the same grill to complete the grilling.

The difficulty of the game increases step by step.

title: Basketball Fever
description:
Get ready for endless basketball fun! Basketball Fever features four exciting basketball challenges anyone can enjoy. 

Sharpen your aim, beat your high score, or just enjoy quick bursts of arcade-style fun, Basketball Fever delivers nonstop action that’s easy to pick up and hard to put down. It’s the ultimate way to test your reflexes, timing, and accuracy.

Simple controls, smooth gameplay, and satisfying physics make every shot feel rewarding.

title: Claw & Merge: Labubu Drop
description:
"Claw & Merge: Labubu Drop" – A Charming Puzzle Game About Merging Jelly Dolls!

In this addictive game, you'll drop adorable Labubu dolls, match identical ones, and create new characters! When two matching Labubus collide, they transform into the next doll in your collection. Earn coins for every merge, then spend them to operate the claw machine – fish out exactly the Labubu you need to complete each level!

Can you collect all the Labubus?

title: Emoji Sort – Fun Puzzle Game
description:
Emoji Sort is a fun and addictive sorting puzzle game where you match and organize cute emojis into the right tubes! Test your logic, plan your moves carefully, and enjoy hundreds of relaxing levels. Simple to play yet hard to master — perfect for puzzle lovers and casual gamers alike.

Play now and see if you can complete every emoji challenge!

Features: smooth animations, colorful visuals, satisfying gameplay, and brain-teasing fun made for everyone!

title: Strawberry Hero
description: Stick your fork and climb to the top! Hold down to keep sticking the fork continuously. If your fork hits a hero or an obstacle, it’s game over! Stick the fork just above the falling hero’s feet to trigger a Super Jump and earn a high score!

title: Counter Craft Sniper
description: Counter Craft Sniper is a first-person shooter where you step into the boots of an elite sniper sent to protect a city invaded by Minecraft mobs. Creepers, skeletons, and zombies have appeared in the middle of downtown, and only your precision and quick reflexes can stop them before the chaos spreads. Armed with your trusty sniper rifle, you must take position on rooftops and high vantage points to eliminate every hostile target that threatens the civilians below.

title: Matrix Typer
description: Type like a hacker, train like a pro. Dodge incoming code, out-type digital attacks, and prove you can survive inside the system. Every word you type is a bullet dodged; every mistake, a strike you take.

title: Block Cut Cleaner
description: An original block puzzle where the field is filled with triangle blocks! Pull out your shapes and place them on the field to clear at 100%. But be careful: each piece you place can create new blocks! Use smart boosters to turn the tide: refresh your inventory, remove three random triangles or place a "clean" square that doesn't leave blocks behind. Plan your strategy to clear the board completely!

title: Battle Zone 2D
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic 2D top-down shooter. Fight on a vast map, search for weapons, ammo, and gear to survive epic battles. Use strategy, cover, and tactics to become the last survivor. Simple controls, fast-paced matches, and thrilling gameplay make the game accessible to everyone. Test your skills, defeat enemies, and prove that you are the best fighter!

title: Knit Bears
description: Knit Bears is a cozy and colorful puzzle game where you help adorable teddy bears come to life by knitting them from soft yarn. Choose a bear, place it in the center, and matching yarn balls will start wrapping it up. Each teddy bear needs three yarns to be fully knitted, so plan your moves carefully. If the board fills with unfinished bears that can’t be completed, the game ends.

title: Squarehead Hero
description:
Squarehead Hero is a fun, turn-based puzzle game where you help a brave, square-headed hero explore dangerous dungeons full of monsters and treasure.
Plan your moves carefully on a grid board — fight enemies, grab loot, and gear up for the next challenge.
Think you’ve got what it takes to lead Squarehead to victory? Jump in and find out!

title: Eat Donuts
description: Swap, rotate, and smash colorful donut rings in a vibrant 3x3 grid to create explosive matches and devour points like never before. Start with easy levels like our sunny beachside challenge—rack up scores to hit that juicy target of 800, earn shiny coins for power-ups like the mighty hammer smash or speedy rotates, and unlock endless waves of mouthwatering fun.

title: Celebrity E-Girl Vibes
description: Step into the world of edgy street style with Celebrity E-Girl Vibes!  This game lets you dress up celebrities in the bold, trendy looks that define E-Girl fashion. Experiment with colorful hairstyles, graphic eyeliner, oversized hoodies, crop tops, ripped jeans, plaid skirts, chokers, and statement accessories. Pair each look with vibrant makeup and nail polish to complete the vibe.

title: Ball Sort
description: Ball Sort is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you sort colorful balls into tubes – can you solve the puzzle with fewer moves?

title: Fireside Solitaire
description:
Fireside Solitaire is a cozy card puzzle that combines logic and relaxation by the warmth of a crackling fire.
Place cards in sequence — one rank higher or lower than the current open card — to clear all columns.
Think ahead: once the draw pile runs out, it can’t be reshuffled, and the game ends.
Enjoy calm music, soft light, and the comforting atmosphere of a winter evening by the fireplace.

title: Black Cat Stacking POP
description: Tap tiles to clear them! When you tap a tile, any same-colored tiles next to it will also connect and clear together. Clear a bunch of tiles at once, and a toy mouse will appear to help clear even more! Clear target tiles or tiles that add moves to increase your remaining moves. The game ends when you run out of moves.

title: Boyfriend For Hire
description: Pushed by her mom to start dating, studious Amy hires charming transfer student Javier to pose as her boyfriend. Rival Christie, jealous rumors, and a flirty study partner turn the act into real complications. Choose outfits, make tough choices, and decide if this love is real—or just for show.

title: MMA Super Fight
description: The crowd is roaring, the spotlight is on you. From rookie to legend — face endless fights, unlock unique fighters and upgrade power, defense, health and regeneration. With every match, the pressure rises. The ring never sleeps and neither can you.

title: Cocktailz
description: Thirsty? Make all sorts of cocktails in this refreshing Match-3 game! Excessive alcohol consumption is harmful to health, but you can play this game without moderation.

title: Frost Land - Snow Survival
description: Frost Land - Snow Survival is a strategic base-building game where you battle the harsh cold to stay alive. You’ll wield a flamethrower to melt snow, uncover hidden resources, and expand your shelter. Every choice matters—manage supplies wisely and decide which frozen zones to explore as you carve out survival in a relentless winter.

title: Fire Ball and Water Ball: Parkour Love Balls
description:
Fire Ball and Water Ball: Parkour Love Balls is an interesting parkour adventure and addictive ball game in the platform genre where orange fire ball and blue water ball running races. 

Help orange ball to get to the portal faster than the blue ball doing parkour tricks! The game is similar to mario.

Game Features:
- Multiple levels with colorful balls
- Various biomes
- Secrets in the back
- Orange fire and blue water ball skins
- The water ball girl goes through the levels with you!

title: Backrooms
description:
Trapped in the eerie maze of the Backrooms, your only goal is to escape or survive, trying.
Play solo or team up with friends in this online multiplayer horror experience. Explore surreal levels, avoid lurking entities, solve puzzles, and use proximity voice chat to stay connected… and stay alive.

title: Plants Warfare
description: Plants Warfare is a shooting game where you step into the shoes of the cute plants. Aim your projectiles, and take down the zombies with strategic aiming and precision shots. Use the environment to your advantage—ricochet bullets and eliminate multiple targets with the least shots possible! Collect stars, customize your look, and prove you’re the ultimate plant defense.

title: Dino Game
description: Play Dino Game online! An offline-style dinosaur run for 1–3 players. Jump cacti, dodge flyers, unlock dinos, and race for high scores. Dino Game brings the classic offline dinosaur run to life with fast, responsive gameplay and local multiplayer. Dash across an endless desert, jump over cacti, and duck under swooping dinos as the speed steadily climbs. Play solo to beat your personal best, or switch to 2-player and 3-player modes to race friends on the same device.

title: Lion Family Sim Online
description: Step into the wild and rule the savannah in Lion Family Sim Online. It’s a full animal simulation adventure where you live the life of a mighty lion. Build and grow your own lion family, explore vast open landscapes, and face thrilling challenges. Hunt for food to survive, protect your territory, and lead your pride with strength and strategy.

title: Steal Brainrot Duel
description: Steal Brainrot Duel is a fast, competitive collector-raider where you hunt for the best brainrot characters, defend your base from thieves, and outsmart rivals in Solo or 2 Player mode. Start with simple picks like Noobini Pizzanini, then grind your economy to unlock rare and legendary favorites such as Tralalero Tralala, Cocofanto Elefanto, and Graipussi Medussi. Build income, raid others, protect your stash, and style your obby avatar with hats, glasses, backpacks, wings, outfits, and pets!

title: PoppyTile
description: PoppyTile is a soothing and delightful tile-matching puzzle game set in a peaceful, picturesque countryside farm full of charm!

title: Pew Pew Dose
description:
Build the weapon of your dreams and blast through hordes of cute… yet deadly zombie rascals!

Welcome to a bright and crazy post-apocalypse where only the most creative weapon makers survive. In this arcade 3D mayhem, you start with a simple gun… and end up wielding a monster built from multiple barrels twisted together into insane contraptions!

Craft without limits: attach barrel to barrel, add magazines, boost firepower, and create unique weapons that would make enemies run away…

title: Men Vs Gorillas
description:
Men vs Gorilla – The Ultimate Evolution Battle!

Step into the wild showdown of Man vs Gorilla!
Upgrade your human’s strength, damage, and health to survive the rising fury of the jungle’s strongest beast. ?

Each level brings a tougher gorilla, smarter attacks, and intense battles but also bigger rewards!
Use your earnings to level up your power, evolve your fighter, and dominate every fight!

title: Screw Puzzle
description:
Enter the world of Screw Puzzle, a captivating and intricate pin puzzle game where your strategic thinking and creativity are put to the test.

The mission is straightforward - unlock holes to make these bars fall in the correct sequence. Sounds simple, yet with unlimited levels of varying complexity, it promises an intriguing brain-teasing journey.

title: Find the Frog - Hidden Objects
description: Go on a relaxing and magical adventure in Find the Frog - Hidden Objects. In this charming hidden object game, you’ll explore beautifully hand-drawn black-and-white scenes and try to spot frogs hiding in plain sight. With each click or tap, the world around you lights up in color, revealing hidden surprises and playful details. Play for free on both mobile and desktop, unlock new levels, and collect unique frogs from all around the world.

title: Word Search Universe
description: Word Search Universe is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you search for hidden words in a grid. The game has 20 chapters, and each one comes with easy, medium, and hard levels to match your skill. In every level, you need to find 6 hidden words. If you get stuck, you can use a hint to help you out. It's a great way to have fun, improve your vocabulary, and keep your brain sharp!

title: Robberies 3D
description:
Welcome to Robberies 3D, a fast-paced online shooter where you can don the mask of a real robber! Inspired by the legendary PAYDAY series, this game offers exciting gameplay: search for keys, break into vaults, use a drill, and steal whatever you can get your hands on.
Choose your style: engage in a loud battle with the police or operate stealthily like a shadow. But don't think it will be easy: each level is a test of your agility, strategy, and nerves.

title: Backgammon Duel
description:
One of the oldest, most played and loved games, the classic backgammon game. 

Also known as Tavli (Greece), Tawla (Egypt), and Takteh (Iranian), but whatever you call it you can download it now and challenge yourself.

title: Slime Farm!
description: Farm Slime: Slime Farm Simulator is a relaxing yet addictive game where you drive a suction truck to vacuum up unruly slimes and turn them into cash. Cruise smoothly through gooey fields, slurp with satisfying precision, sell your haul to upgrade your truck and expand your farm into a thriving slime empire.

title: Animal Basketball
description: Dive into Basketball: The Power of Moe! Team up with adorable animals, unlock over 100 magical balls, and enjoy physics-powered hoop action. Play through arcade, championship, and mission modes on dazzling courts in this fun and addictive basketball party!

title: Delivery Now
description:
Delivery Now is an open world endless delivery game , which uses spectacular graphics and amazing audio effects to give a breathtaking game play experience.

Delivery Now is a fast paced action and racing game in which you will have to race against time to deliver these cute things, making your way through city highway traffic racers. You can make your own path towards your goal.

Let's enjoy it. What are you waiting for?

title: Color Nonogram Puzzle 2
description: Relaxing Color Nonogram is a vibrant logic puzzle game where every grid reveals stunning pixel art. Solve colorful nonogram challenges, train your brain, and enjoy a calm, stress-free experience. Perfect for fans of Picross and classic logic puzzles, this free nonogram game blends strategy, creativity, and relaxation. Discover hundreds of levels, improve focus, and unwind anytime with satisfying color puzzle gameplay designed for both beginners and experts.

title: Supermarket Simulator: Dream Store
description: Build and expand your shop: add shelves, displays, products, and decorations to attract more customers. Hire staff and manage their skills and motivation. Handle orders, discounts, and marketing campaigns. Every day, your store grows bigger and more profitable!

title: Hidden Object Farm Adventure
description: Play a fun hidden object game with 30 farm levels! each level, find 6 hidden things before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint! It's easy to play and full of colorful farm fun.

title: Puzzle Masters: Travelers
description:
Puzzle Masters Travelers is a relaxing and colorful jigsaw puzzle game where you assemble beautiful landscapes from dozens of pieces.
Travel across stunning locations around the world, unlock new sceneries, and enjoy the soothing atmosphere of discovery!
Use helpful boosters to finish each picture before the timer runs out. Challenge your focus, patience, and speed — and become a true puzzle master!

title: K-Pop Hunter Fashion
description: Unleash your creativity in K-Pop Hunter Fashion, a unique dress up game where trendy K-Pop meets gothic demon hunter vibes. Style glamorous idols in bold K-Pop looks while blending them with dark, fantasy-inspired outfits. From leather jackets and spiked boots to neon hair, glowing makeup, and mystical accessories—you’ll create fierce, otherworldly fashion statements.

title: Bubble Tea
description: Bubble Tea – Color Game is all about mixing and matching and blending and fusing a huge assortment of flavors and colors to create cold drink concoctions that will have you licking your lips. Receive orders, choose the right ingredients, pour them all into a cup, and serve to your thirsty customers. Take care not to spill your drinks in the excitement!

title: Merge Fruit
description: Looking for something fun, relaxing, and totally addictive? You just found it. Merge Fruit is a simple but surprisingly strategic puzzle game where you combine fruits to create even bigger ones. It’s a satisfying blend of logic, timing, and casual fun that’s perfect for any moment.

title: Travel Story Match
description: Embark on a global adventure with Travel Story Match! Match 3 identical travel items to complete exciting puzzles. Use powerful boosters to tackle tricky combinations, explore iconic destinations, and uncover hidden gems. Complete Daily Missions and Weekly Challenges, collect rewards, and enjoy hundreds of thrilling levels. Start your journey now and create your very own unforgettable travel story!

title: Merge 2048 Cake
description:
Merge 2048 Cake is a colorful and relaxing puzzle game where you merge matching tiles to create higher numbers!
Combine three or more identical tiles to form a new one with double the value. Plan your moves, trigger satisfying chain reactions, and aim for the ultimate 2048 tile!
Enjoy smooth gameplay, vivid visuals, and a cozy, casual vibe that’s easy to play and hard to put down.

title: Monkey Bubble Defense
description:
Survive the bubble invasion in this fast-paced 2D top-down tower defense game. Construct and upgrade various defensive turrets to take down hordes of bubbles.

Earn cash by popping bubbles. Use cash to to purchase new towers, upgrade existing ones, or sell for cash and reinvest into a different turret.

title: Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape
description: Enjoy a hilarious and brain-twisting adventure in Thief Stick Puzzle: Man Escape. It’s a mix of stickman comedy, clever puzzle levels, and funny escape challenges that will keep you hooked for hours! You play as a sneaky thief stickman trying to escape from tricky situations. To survive, you’ll need to solve smart brain teaser puzzles. For example, finding the correct path through a maze to obtain treasure, or bypassing a cutting machine to save a puppy.

title: Okay
description: Okay is a minimalist puzzle game where your goal is to clear every element from the board by drawing a single strategic line. Each line you draw interacts with the objects on screen — if it hits them correctly, they disappear. The challenge lies in predicting the trajectory and eliminating everything with just one attempt.

title: Gal Sliding Puzzle
description:
It's a classic sliding puzzle.
You can challenge yourself by increasing the difficulty level from 3*3, 4*4, 5*5.
Train and activate your brain~
Complete it and meet various pretty girls.

title: Hidden Objects Story
description: Every scene tells a story, waiting for your discovery. Collect coins, unlock hints and piece together secrets buried beneath the surface. The mystery deepens with every level. Stay focused or the secrets slip away forever.

title: Save the Bees
description: In "Save the Bee", you will play as a hero in the unique world of bees. Bee, the cute and necessary bee, is facing despair and your mission is to solve puzzles by drawing to the rescue. You will have to confront unpredictable threats that seem easy but are difficult but extremely attractive

title: Obby Blox Hook
description: Obby Blox Hook is an addictive physics-based platformer where players control the Roblox players swinging through levels using a grappling hook. With smooth animations, challenging obstacles, and fun physics mechanics, the game tests your timing and precision as you swing from one point to another, avoiding obstacles and making daring jumps to reach the finish line.

title: Archers Random
description:
Archers Random is a fast-paced stickman archery game that tests your reflexes and aim.

Fight endless enemy waves, explore new areas, and earn coins to unlock helmets, armor, and triple arrows. Upgrade speed, damage, health, and arm power, master 12 special arrows like fire, poison, rocket, and electric, face epic bosses, and survive nonstop action.

Play solo or challenge a friend in 2 Player mode on the same device for intense head-to-head battles.

title: Color Yarn Sort
description: Color Yarn Sort is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you need to sort colorful spools of yarn into their matching buckets. The challenge? You have limited space to place the buckets, and you must think carefully about which bucket to move forward. Each yarn color must be placed in its corresponding bucket, but you can only move the buckets into the available spaces—there’s no room for error!

title: Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro
description:
Post-apocalypse! Noob finds himself alone against zombies. Passing levels, he accumulates coins and picks up weapons.
There is a grenade launcher, a pistol, an uzi, a shotgun, a machine gun, a laser pistol, a rifle, a laser rifle - and so on!

Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro is an epic noob game in the world, similar to minecraft fnaf. Noob shoots at zombies with a variety of weapons like a rambo. Noob miner starts his fighting fnaf survival!

There are 60 levels and 15 bosses in total!

title: Pottery Master
description: Pottery Master invites you into a peaceful world of creativity and clay. Shape, sculpt, and refine your pottery using intuitive tools, then add your personal touch with vibrant colors. Each creation is a moment to unwind, express your style, and transform simple clay into a stunning masterpiece in a relaxing, artistic flow

title: Flower Sort
description:
Sort Flowers is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you sort flowers by type!
Combine three identical flowers in one pot to grow a lush, beautiful bush.
Plan your moves, create satisfying merge chains, and enjoy the colorful and cozy atmosphere.
Each level brings new combinations, vibrant colors, and delightful visual effects.

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Mojicon Emoji Connect
description:
A fast, fun twist on classic Onet puzzles!
Get ready to match and relax with Mojicon: Emoji Connect – the cheerful tile-linking puzzle bursting with personality!
Connect identical emoji tiles, clear the board, and enjoy satisfying spark effects with every perfect match.
With hundreds of cute icons, calming backgrounds, and rewarding combos, Mojicon delivers endless relaxing fun for all ages.
Play anywhere, anytime – no downloads, just pure emoji joy!

title: Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier
description:
Step into the world of retail and build the supermarket of your dreams! 

Manage customers, run the cash register, stock shelves, and keep your store thriving. From scanning groceries to cart-surfing adventures, every task brings your bustling market to life.

Take charge as the supermarket cashier, master time management, and turn your small store into a thriving grocery empire.

title: Brainrot Mega Parkour
description: Step into the wildest parkour adventure yet. Brainrot Mega Parkour brings together four intense modes, forty handcrafted levels, and a cast of hilarious characters in a single high-speed package. Whether you’re climbing an endless tower, racing across a platform full of traps, escaping a rolling lava ball, or surviving a lava flood, every level pushes your reflexes and timing to the limit.

title: Mahjong Cute Tiles
description: Enjoy a classic Mahjong game, now in another dimension! Rotate the board, explore fresh tile layouts and challenge your mind. Show off your skills and use powerful boosters like undo moves, tile shuffles, bombs and hints to help you advance faster.

title: Tile Sort - Match 3
description: Tile Sort - Match 3 is an addictive match-3 puzzle game where your task is to sort and match identical tiles on the board. The game combines classic match-3 gameplay with elements of sorting, adding an extra layer of strategy and logic. Move tiles, creating combinations of three or more identical tiles to clear the board.

title: Last Ufo Defense
description:
Last UFO DefenseThe galaxy is no safe place. 
As the last UFO of your kind, you stand alone against endless waves of hostile alien forces determined to wipe you out.
Pilot your hovering warship and unleash its full potential:One UFO, endless enemies. 
Survive as long as you can with precise upgrades and tactical choices.
Face relentless alien swarms in an endless survival challenge.You are the final line of defense in a hostile galaxy.
How long can the last UFO endure?

title: Road Digging Puzzle
description:
This is a puzzle game. you can make a way to pass a level. Dig your way through unique physics puzzles.

It's new and fun brain teasers each step of the way.

title: Cake Link Master
description: Cake Link Master is a fun puzzle game where you tap two matching cakes to connect them with a line. The line can turn up to two times but cannot go over other tiles. The game has 120 challenging levels, and the difficulty grows as you play. Clear the cakes, solve the puzzles, and enjoy hours of sweet, relaxing fun!

title: Coe Rabbit
description:
Coe Rabbit is a puzzle platformer where you control a cute bunny and teleport him between platforms! Progress through each level by teleporting to higher platforms, collecting power-ups to adjust the height of your portal, and find the perfect path to reach your destination!

Also have fun with the floating bunny, where you control a carrot ship and avoid crashing into obstacles. Play with your best friend in the challenging two-player mode. Who will win?

title: Ants Party
description: Welcome to Ants Party — a charming strategy-idle game where your colony's mission is clear: eat it all! On each level, a delicious item appears — from juicy apples to giant cakes — and your ants must devour it completely. Starting from your anthill, they march out, take a bite, and carry the piece back home. The level ends when the entire treat is consumed and hauled away.

title: People Playground! Ragdoll Arena!
description:
People Playground! Ragdoll Arena! is a fun physics-based adventure where chaos is the goal. Tap and hold objects to move them, then release to throw them at the doll.

Your goal:
Inflict maximum damage and destroy your doll using everything at your disposal. Drop a car on his head, throw a rock at him, or throw him off a cliff. Every action triggers a reaction, so experiment with different ways to destroy. Sometimes there will be multiple dolls: twice the targets, twice the strategies!

title: Zenith Rush
description:
Beat the track time to advance further! 
Switch the road and pickup upgrades, buy and upgrade cars to be faster and advance further!

title: Flow Block
description: Perfectly blends the classic Tetris gameplay with innovative sand flow mechanics. In the game, players not only follow the basic rules of traditional Tetris but also need to guide flowing sand particles to fill target areas.

title: Hero Transform Run
description: Superheroes accumulate energy by constantly upgrading themselves, and at the end of the level they must quickly defeat different enemies. This is a casual combat parkour game!

title: Unicorn Princess Dress Up
description: Welcome to Unicorn Princess Dress Up, a casual girl dress-up game online. Dive into a fashion world where you design fashionable clothing, create trendy hairstyles, and produce perfect eye makeup. Unleash your creativity and talents in fashion design to make your princess doll charming and beautiful!

title: Car Vs Zombies
description:
Car vs Zombie is a fast-paced low-poly survival game where you smash through endless zombie waves with your car, build turrets, and defend your base from the undead horde! 
Get ready for non-stop action in Car vs Zombie, a low-poly, cartoony survival game where chaos meets fun!
Will you survive the apocalypse — or become zombie food?

title: Through the Wall 3D
description: Through the Wall 3D takes the mind-bending puzzle gameplay of the original Through the Wall to a whole new level with stunning 3D graphics! Test your reflexes, strategy, and flexibility as you contort your character to match a variety of dynamic shapes in a visually immersive world.

title: Obby Modes! Online Mini-Games
description:
Is a massive online world where three unique modes are waiting for you!

Take on the challenge of 100 levels of hard obby, compete in crazy races with 5 players, and test your fate on a glass bridge in the spirit of Squid Game!

Create your unique character by choosing from over 100 cool skins!

Team up with friends using a code in squads of up to 3 people and conquer all modes together!

Ready to show off your agility and strategy? Set records and become a legend!

title: Ragdoll Jump
description: Welcome to Ragdoll Jump! In this exciting jumping game, you will control a lovable stickman character on a thrilling journey out of a building. You will experience the sensation of soaring high as you jump and glide through the air, creating spectacular action sequences. Get ready for hilarious falls, and remember that you won't always land safely.

title: Mahjong Connect: Spooky
description: Connect two tiles of an identical type. A move can only be made if there are 2 or fewer bends in the line between them. Clear the board to advance to the next level, but be warned, the game is time sensitive.

title: Sweet Haunt 2
description: Guide the ghost to pick up all of the candy and get it to the exit in this Sokoban-like puzzle game. 50 challenging levels to complete. You'll need to pick up candy carefully as depending on how they are carried, the ghost and the candy might not fit into the pathway to the exit. Use bombs strategically to destroy objects the ghost is carrying to be sure you can make it to the exit and not get stuck.

title: Toco Teens Halloween Party
description:
Step into the spooky fun world of Toca Teens Halloween Party, a fashionable Halloween dress-up game made just for style lovers! ?
Join the Toca teens as they get ready for the most glamorous Halloween event of the year. Choose from eerie yet elegant outfits, haunting accessories, and bold makeup looks to create the perfect spooky-chic style.

title: Lost in the Forest
description:
Lost in the forest is a classic adventure game. The protagonist is an airman who ends up in a storm, loses control of his plane and falls into a mysterious forest.
The next day is stuck under a tree and must find a way to break free and solve various puzzles to make it back home safely.

title: Screw Spin
description:
Screw Spin is a satisfying logic puzzle where you unscrew colorful bolts and sort them into matching boxes. It’s relaxing yet challenging, combining planning, logic, and a touch of strategy.

Each level introduces a new layout with bolts of different colors. Your goal is to clear the entire panel by removing all the bolts, carefully managing your limited storage slots and placing each bolt in the correct container.

title: Water Sort
description: Experience the simple yet addictive water sorting puzzle game! It’s the ultimate free game for training your brain, killing time, and relaxing!

title: Shanghai Town
description:
Mahjong matching game!
If you select the same mahjong block, it will be removed.
Please remove the last block!
Match the tiles to create a cool building!
Collect the buildings and create a cool city!

title: Murder Mystery
description: Murder Mystery – A fast-paced social deduction game. One player is the killer, another the sheriff, the rest are innocents. Use logic, stealth, and quick decisions to survive or expose the murderer. Perfect for high engagement and multiplayer retention.

title: Tile Living
description: Select matching tiles that can be connected with up to 3 straight lines to clear them! Clear all the tiles to complete the stage! Use the coins you collect from clearing stages to decorate your room!

title: Hex Sense
description:
Guide Mochi across risky hex lands. His hex sense lets him read the numbers that give clues of how many dangers are nearby, and use them to find a safe path. Reveal tiles, flag traps, and guide brave Mochi to the Exit. 

Hex Sense is a minesweeper-style puzzle on a field of hex tiles. Some tiles hide dangerous hazards, but clues around them help you figure out where it's safe to go. Cross several unique chapters filled with new kinds of hazards and clues.

title: Anime Dress Up - Doll Dress Up
description: Anime Dress Up - Doll Dress Up is a fashionable and wonderful dress-up game with shocking graphic effects that will provide females with an unforgettable dress-up experience! This game is ideal for everyone who enjoys fashion and adventure, thanks to its amazing graphics and simple UI.

title: Shoot 2048 Hexa
description: Shoot 2048 Hexa is a fun and colorful puzzle game where you shoot hexagon tiles with numbers to make bigger ones. Aim carefully and match the same numbers to reach new values. The board slowly fills up, so think fast and plan your moves. Try to stay in the game as long as you can and get the highest score!

title: Monster School vs Siren Head
Boo-tiful Princess Match
description: Welcome to an exciting puzzle-game, created in a Halloween atmosphere. There are three princesses in the game and each one is ready for her own eerily beautiful transformation. The player will have to look for paired cards to discover new elements of the girls future image. Each successful match brings you closer to creating a unique costume, makeup or hairstyle. Only the most attentive players will be able to make their princesses truly scary-beautiful!

title: Toilet Time
description: Toilet Time is more than just a puzzle game—it’s a hilarious journey into the quirkiest parts of everyday life. Challenge yourself with toilet-inspired puzzles that combine creativity, wit, and humor.

title: Rooftop Run
description: Run, jump, and slide over rooftops in this fast-paced parkour game! Dodge obstacles, smash through barriers, and escape from enemies as you race through exciting levels.

title: The Sorting Mart
description: The Sorting Mart is a store sorting puzzle game that lets you experience the fun of shopping in a store. Rearrange items between shelves to match three identical ones on a shelf, clearing it and letting the upper shelves drop down. Clear entire stacks to shift adjacent shelves and keep matching before time runs out. If you get stuck, use the shuffle button to mix up the shelves and find matches more easily. Challenge your sorting skills as levels become more difficult!

title: Hidden Horrors
description: Ready to explore the haunted Halloween world? Play a hidden object game with 30 Halloween levels. Each level has 6 hidden objects. Find all objects before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint. The game is easy to play. Enjoy colorful Halloween scenes and fun gameplay.

title: ASMR Makeover & Makeup Studio
description: Get ready to dive into the world of beauty and creativity! ASMR Makeup & Makeover Studio offers an incredible opportunity to give your virtual model a stunning makeover. This isn't just any makeover game — it's an immersive experience that combines relaxation and excitement through the power of ASMR!

title: Triple Cups
description:
Triple Cups is a bright and dynamic puzzle game where your goal is to flip colorful cups and arrange them to create rows of matching colors!
Every move requires focus and strategy: pick up cups from the top and place them on the stand below to form groups of three or more of the same color. When identical cups line up, they disappear, freeing space for new moves.

title: TOP HOG
description: Welcome to the forest adventure! A drowsy bear just wants to rest, but a playful group of hedgehogs  has decided to throw a party close by. Your task? Grab a hockey stick and send those troublemakers soaring through the air! Build your strength, collect bonuses to enhance your skills, and face the exciting challenges in each level. Who will rise as the winter forest champion? Become a true bear hockey expert! Simple to play, fun, and packed with thrilling airborne action! Give it a try now!

title: Flower Shop
description: Match 6 of the same flowers to ship them! You can place your flowers in any empty spot on the board. Place a flower next to a tray with the same kind to make them merge. When the right conditions are met, customers will come by to visit! Complete their requests to earn rewards. The game ends when there’s no more space left to place flowers.

title: SWAT Cats Shooter
description: SWAT Cats is an online shooter set in a world where every hero is a battle cat. Ready for purr-fect battle with wild action? Jump in, grab your helmet, and join the fight.

title: Relay Race
description: Relay race game is an engaging and addictive game that combines puzzle solving elements, casual gameplay and exciting race challenges. This game offers players a unique combination of fun puzzles and trolls for a thrilling and engaging gaming experience.

title: Hexa GO!
description: A puzzle game about dropping hexagons from grid. To do this, use a bomb and explode all the tiles nearby! Click on the rotate-button and swap the tiles! And also use other special tiles!

title: Draw To Fly
description: Ready for a game that’s as creative as it is challenging? Draw Fly brings your imagination to life, turning simple drawings into pathways to solve puzzles and conquer obstacles. Whether you’re flying past traps or dodging tricky obstacles, this puzzle game will keep you entertained for hours.

title: Halloween Match Trio
description: Halloween Match Trio is a classic match-3 puzzle game with fun challenges. Swap items to make a line of three or more matching items, horizontally or vertically. Keep matching to unlock all tiles and reach the final stage. Use power-ups like bombs, arrows, magnets, and more to clear levels faster. Complete all 75 levels to win the game!

title: Color Block Sort
description:
This is a casual puzzle game about sorting blocks by color!

Simply tap your finger to sort various blocks, achieve winning streaks, and win exciting rewards.

title: Zombie Horde: Build & Survive
description: Step into the chaos of Zombie Horde: Build & Survive, a free online game where your survival depends on smart defenses and sharp shooting. Play on your phone or computer as you fight off endless waves of the undead. Set up turrets, lay traps, and build barricades to hold the line while unleashing powerful weapons. In this post-apocalyptic world, every second counts—can you keep the horde at bay?

title: Red Stickman vs Craftmans 2
description: Classic platformer with shooting. Stickman got into the world of Minecraft, flooded with zombie people and zombie animals. Help Stickman destroy all the infected, save Eve and get out of this world.

title: Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle
description: Get ready for Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle, the ultimate test of logic and fun! Untangle the traffic, move the cars, and clear the way in this addictive puzzle adventure. With every level, new challenges appear—packed parking lots, tricky buses, and colorful traffic jams waiting for your brainpower. Easy to play, hard to master, and endlessly entertaining.

title: Cool Cars: racing at altitude
description:
Cool Cars: racing at altitude is an exciting racing game in which you can buy cars, build your own garage and compete with other players.

Earn points by collecting bonuses on a straight track, compete with other players to complete special tracks against the clock, equip your auto repair shop and collect cool cars!
In the game you will find a large number of cars, exciting tracks, your own garage with purchased cars, the ability to change the environment to suit you and much more.

title: Jenny's Math Puzzle
description: Challenge your mind with Jenny’s Math Puzzle, a fun and brain-boosting online game where logic meets creativity. Arrange number tiles to solve equations, unlock new puzzles, and sharpen your math skills along the way. Play on your phone or computer — every move counts, and every solution brings you closer to becoming a true math master.

title: Frog Knight
description: Frog Bubble your mission is to help a spirited frog pop an array of mischievous bubbles! Using your swift reflexes and strategic skills, you’ll throw your lily pad-shaped projectiles at bubbles to clear each level.

title: Color Block Jam 2
description: Play Color Block Jam 2 free online in your browser with no download and no install required. This free online puzzle game lets you slide colorful blocks into matching gates through smart logic levels designed to test your brain and timing. Perfect for fans of cool math games, unblocked games, and quick school breaks, it loads fast and works smoothly on desktop and mobile. Enjoy relaxing color block puzzles anytime, anywhere, completely free.

title: Spider Bubu
description: Spider-Bubu swings from wall to wall across the city. Halloween has arrived, and you need to collect all the Halloween candies along with Spider-Bubu. Don’t forget to grab the giant pumpkin too! You must be very careful in the city — sharp spinning blades and pointed spikes are everywhere. Collect all the pumpkins and safely reach the portal that appears in the city.

title: Mr Long Legs
description: Get ready to wobble, stretch, and stumble with Mr. Long Legs, the funniest physics puzzle game you’ll ever play! Step into the shoes of a long-legged stickman hero and control his stretchy legs to cross impossible terrains.

title: Block Master - Super Puzzle
description: Welcome to a unique puzzle game where logic and strategy decide everything! Experience a fresh take on classic block games! The pieces appear at the bottom, and it’s up to you to decide where to place them. Drag the blocks onto the field, fill horizontal and vertical lines, and clear space for new moves. Every action requires careful planning—can you score the highest points?

title: Mr Bounce
description: Challenge yourself with Mr Bounce, the brain-boosting puzzle game that will test your thinking skills and reflexes. Each level is a new puzzle demanding strategic planning and precise execution. Mr Bounce is more than just a game; it's a mental workout that improves your cognitive abilities.

title: Iconic Halloween Costumes
description: Get ready for a spooky and stylish adventure in Iconic Halloween Costumes! Help three BFFs pick out their perfect Halloween looks, from royal Glinda and Bridgerton-inspired outfits to edgy Beetlejuice vibes and cowgirl-chic styles. Customize their costumes with tops, bottoms, accessories, and makeup to create iconic Halloween outfits. Play now and let the fashion fun begin!

title: Merge Heroes Titans
description:
In this game, you will command squads of melee fighters and ranged archers fighting against waves of enemies. Your agility and strategic thinking will give you an edge to victory.

Unlock new powerful fighters and accurate archers by combining those available for purchase. Place them on the map according to abilities and win.

You will have to discover not only new characters, but also beautiful different worlds, enjoy our new game.

title: Black Pink Halloween Concert
description: Step into the spooky spotlight with Black Pink Halloween Concert, a thrilling dress-up game where you style the K-Pop superstars for their haunted Halloween performance. Choose from a wide variety of creepy-cute costumes, bold hairstyles, and festive accessories to make the members shine on stage.

title: Cheerful Plumber
description: Greetings, young artist. Do you like video games and creativity? Then this game is for you! Color video game characters: a princess, a cheerful plumber, a dragon and others! Choose different colors on the main and secondary palette. Play and color! Take a screenshot and share the result with your friends!

title: Ancient Wars: Caesar
description: Ancient Wars: Caesar is an exciting strategy game in which you lead an army and fight for supremacy on the battlefield. The game takes you to the world of epic battles where tactics, planning and proper utilization of resources are important. Control various units, including warriors, archers and generals, to destroy enemy troops and destroy their base.

title: Cake Sort
description:
Cake Sort is a colorful and cozy puzzle game where you stack and sort delicious desserts to score as many points as possible! Move cakes around the table and match them by type to build perfect stacks of identical treats.
Bright graphics, smooth animations, and tasty visuals make the game relaxing, cheerful, and endlessly replayable.
Your goal is simple — keep sorting cakes and earn points for every perfect match until the table is full!

title: Flower Block
description: Dive into our unique COMBO gameplay, where you strategically place blocks to clear rows or columns. Watch as clearing multiple lines triggers exciting animations and earns you bonus points. Challenge your mind and plan your moves wisely to ace Flower Block!

title: Construction Set - 3D Builder
description:
Dive into the fascinating world of 3D constructors and puzzles, where each block is a new step towards creativity and development.
This game invites players to assemble amazing buildings, monuments and characters using more than 200 different bricks.
From simple sets to complex models, each level presents a new challenge and develops attention, logic and spatial thinking.

title: Number Rush
description:
You can absorb smaller or equal numbers while avoiding obstacles.
If you collide with a number bigger than you, it's game over.
Make the largest number possible to break through the wall and get the treasure chest~!

title: Color Dots Challenge
description: Dive into Color Dots Challenge, a bright and addictive puzzle game that puts your logic and strategy to the test. Connect, match, and move colorful dots to clear the board and score big! Simple to play yet hard to master, this free online game is perfect for quick breaks or long sessions on your phone or computer. Can you outsmart the colors and conquer every level?

title: Stickman Archero Fight: stick shadow fight war
description:
Complete levels, collecting items that you can then put on yourself and improve in your inventory. You can finish off your enemies with colorful fatalities. Try different skill combinations to complete as many levels as possible. 
Game features:

- Fights with stickmen
- Skins: warrior, fighter, ninja
- Enemies: red stickman, black stickman
- Various biomes

Did you like the game "Stickman Archero Fight: stick shadow fight war"? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Survival in Area 51
description: You will play as the character Stas, who works in Area 51. One day, Stas was given a strange task, to find acid and pour it into an unusual device. Then something terrible happened... In Area 51, an explosion occurred underground, and zombies appeared. They began to attack scientists and guards. Your task is to destroy zombies, mercenaries and find a way out of this terrible underground place. The game offers shooting, simple puzzles, a plot, many locations and a final battle.

title: Butterfly Triple
description:
Butterfly Tripple is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you merge cute butterflies!
Place the shapes on the board so that three or more butterflies of the same color touch each other. When they connect, they’re released and gracefully fly away. Vivid graphics, smooth animations, and a cozy atmosphere make the game a true pleasure to play.

title: Challenge Your Friends
description: Challenge yourself! With seven different games, you can experience thrilling moments whether you're playing solo or competing against your friends. Drunken Duel, Tug The Table, Stick Duel, Milk The Cow, and many more games are waiting for you! Plus, to make the competition even more fun, you can choose exciting dares to make  the matches unforgettable! For those who prefer solo play, 6 games are ready to keep you entertained! Step into this world of fun and enjoy the thrill of competition!

title: Zooma Dragon
description:
Zooma Dragon is a brand new and amazing zoom style game!
Complete all 300 levels! Try to get three stars in each level!
A bright adventure with colored balls awaits you!
Instead of a frog, you will play as a dragon.

title: Noob: Jailbreak 2
Match Tile Royal Family
description: Play an addictive brain challenge in Match Tile Royal Family. This is not just another match puzzle game. It’s a thrilling mix of logic, strategy, and quick thinking. Your goal is simple yet exciting: match tiles of the same design to clear the board. Unlock levels and rescue the royal family from tricky traps. Eliminate blocks, balls, and other objects in a limited number of moves. You can also use power-ups to quickly clear blocks or temporarily freeze obstacles.

title: Ultimate Yatzy
description: Ultimate Yatzy is the classic dice game that delivers endless fun and excitement. Roll five dice to score the best combinations and outsmart your opponents. Whether you're a casual player or a Yatzy pro, this game blends strategy and luck to keep you challenged and entertained. Aim for a Full House, a Straight, or the elusive Yatzy—every roll is a new chance to win.

title: Koko Loco Block Blast
description: Think fast, blast smart — can you beat your best score? Blast blocks, fit shapes, and outsmart the grid in this fast-paced puzzle challenge! Every move counts: clear space, chain combos, and keep the board from filling up. With smooth controls, colorful blocks, and quick rounds, it’s perfect for casual fun or deep strategy. Easy to pick up, hard to put down — how high can you climb the high score ladder?

title: Drunken Fighters
description:
Are you ready for an adrenaline-filled fighting adventure?

Step into the ring in Drunken Fighters’ single-player mode and face opponents that will test your reflexes, or grab a friend and fight in two-player mode on the same device.

Master ragdoll physics and boost the thrill with Funny Mod options: Stretch Kick, Stretch Punch, Big Punch, Super Punch, and Big Head or let Random Mode surprise you with chaos!

title: ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang
description: Step into the world of ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang, where you take on the role of an adorable mukbang streamer! Get ready to indulge in delicious food, satisfy your cravings, and share the experience with your viewers in a cozy, interactive livestream. The more you eat and engage, the more you earn!

title: Chicken Banana Quest
description: Help the Chicken and Banana to solve all puzzle quest and find the play button. Use your skills to solve the puzzles before the lives run out and complete all levels with the less possible clicks

title: Wave Road 3D
description: Wave Road 3D is a fast-paced reflex game that challenges your focus, timing, and precision. You control a sleek arrow gliding through a floating road filled with gears, traps, and collectible gems. Whether you’re chasing high scores in endless mode, conquering 20 handcrafted levels in classic mode, or racing head-to-head with a friend in 2 player mode, Wave Road 3D offers a refreshing and dynamic experience.

title: Pet Merge
description:
Merge adorable pets! 
Combine cute companions to unlock rare and magical species. 
Pass exciting levels in adventure mode or beat your high score in the classic mode.
Let's Play! Meow

title: Royal Crown Blast
description:
Royal Crown Blast is a colorful and relaxing casual puzzle game where you tap, blast, and clear vibrant blocks to complete each level’s goals.
Immerse yourself in a royal atmosphere as you match groups of blocks of the same color and shape, triggering spectacular explosions and powerful boosters.
With many levels, charming visuals, and simple one-tap controls, the game is both relaxing and delightfully addictive.

title: Mindblow
description: Get ready for a mind-teasing adventure in Mindblow, the ultimate word puzzle game that challenges your vocabulary and logic skills. Explore hundreds of fun and engaging levels — from simple to truly tricky — all designed to keep your brain sharp and entertained. Play for free on desktop or mobile, uncover hidden words from beautiful images, and enjoy new levels added every month. Think you have what it takes to become a true word master?

title: Space.io
description: Jump into the cockpit of a powerful spaceship and engage in fast-paced 3D space battles! Face off against 9 other enemy ships in an intense dogfight where only the best pilot survives. Shoot down your opponents before they take you out, climb the rankings, and prove you're the ultimate space warrior! Unlock a wide variety of skins to customize your ship and dominate the battlefield in style. Can you claim the top spot?

title: Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure
description:
Cool orange ball went on an adventure in which evil stones beat him, but the orange ball has 3 hearts. The game is similar to mario and sonic.

Game Features:
- Lots of exciting levels
- Various biomes
- Secrets in some levels
- Skins of colorful balls

Did you like the game Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure? - Then try our other games and write a review on what to improve or what game we should release next!

title: Brainrot Merge
description:
Merge adorably weird Italian brainrot characters! 
Combine them to unlock rare (and even weirder) species. 
Build the ultimate brainrot paradise!

title: Cute Kitty Merge
description: Step into the role of a farmer and grow your own fruits and vegetables. In Solitaire TriPeaks Farming you will spend time in beautiful nature and play fun and constantly changing levels that will never allow for boredom. It is all about having fun.

title: Survival Island: EVO
description: Play a fun adventure and simulation game in Survival Island: EVO. You are alone on a mysterious island, and the challenge begins: survive, build, and thrive. Gather more resources like food, water, wood, and stone. And craft the tools you need to stay alive. Build your shelter, light a fire, and protect yourself from hunger and wild animals. Explore hidden corners of the island, discover secrets, and unlock new crafting recipes. Become the true survivor.

title: Juicy Match 2
description: Juicy Match 2 returns with even more natural, fresh, and juicy fun! Step into the best Juice Bar in town and match delicious fruits to create perfect juice blends. Your cheerful Banana friend will guide you with helpful tips along the way. Match three or more fruits to juice them, trigger chain reactions for big bonuses, and master hundreds of new levels. With Daily Missions, Weekly Challenges, and endless juicy puzzles, the adventure never stops in Juicy Match 2!

title: Vice City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning sports car through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Last Stand Warrior
description:
A thrilling third-person shooter where you play as an experienced shooter defending your land from endless hordes of enemies. Control the hero, apply precise punches, use skills and fight with waves of mobs to prevent them from breaking through. Upgrade your weapons and abilities to become a true defense champion!

Ideal for fans of dynamic gameplay, arcade battles and survival in the «wave of opponents» mode.

title: Snow Road Puzzle
description: Play Snow Road Puzzle free online — an addictive browser puzzle game with no download, no install, and no login required. Slide icy tiles, create snowy roads, and solve fast-paced logic puzzle levels instantly. Perfect for fans of cool math games, unblocked games, and brain puzzle challenges at school or home. This free online puzzle game is mobile-friendly, fast-loading, and fully playable on desktop or phone. Enjoy endless winter logic puzzles and sharpen your brain anytime, anywhere.

title: Paws Off My Clues!
description:
Explore unique locations filled with hidden objects and unexpected mysteries. From sunny beaches to the ancient ruins of Persia, every corner of this fluffy world comes to life as you hunt for hidden treasures.

Watch as the cats go about their lives, adding charm and humor to the atmosphere, while you search through their delightful mess. Solve puzzles, progress through levels, and become the ultimate hidden object master!

title: Powerful Punch
description: Ready to let off some steam? Powerful Punch is the perfect game to brighten your day and release your frustrations. Rescue the weak, take down villains, and unleash your spooky punch, sprunky punch, or even a spranky punch in levels filled with surprises and hilarity

title: Island Puzzle: Build & Solve
description: Welcome to the ultimate Island Puzzle adventure! Test your logic and strategy skills in this captivating logic puzzle and building game.

title: Smart Dots Reloaded
description: Smart Dots Reloaded is a fresh remake of the classic Dots and Boxes puzzle from Windows 3.1. Players take turns drawing lines between dots. Completing a square earns a point, and the game ends when the board is full. Featuring modern visuals, smooth animations, and both AI and two-player modes, this is a strategy game that’s easy to learn but hard to master.

title: Head Runner Dash
description: Head Runner Dash is a 2D platformer game where you need to run, jump, and climb walls to overcome obstacles and traps. Pass the obstacles and raise the flag to complete the level. Difficult levels will make you addicted and feel challenged.

title: Labuba Halloween Infestation
description: Monsters are invading Halloween! You must destroy them all — the fate of Halloween is in your hands. The game features three different modes, each with tougher and more powerful monsters.

title: Word search
description:
A beautiful word puzzle game with challenging yet addictive features for hunting down the words you love! Train your brain in a fun and relaxing way and take your critical thinking skills and IQ to the next level.
Find all the words on a given topic. Words are arranged horizontally, vertically, diagonally, and may overlap.

title: Capybara Skewer Match
description:
Capybara Skewer Match
Step into the cozy world of Capybara, your friendly skewer merchant! Help Capybara clear out the skewers by grilling and matching them before time runs out.

Capybara needs your help to keep the BBQ stand running. Can you master the grill, match all the skewers, unlock tasty collectibles, and make Capybara proud?

title: Echolocation Shooter
description:
Shoot to see in the dark!

Eliminate all the neon enemies, in the horroristic level!

The only way to see in this FPS is to generate soundwave with your weapon.

Survive endless waves of the wide variety of enemies, where the only way to see is to shoot. Unleash soundwave rifles, laser cannons, and grenades to light up the battlefield, upgrade your gear, and fight deeper into the horde.

Every shot reveals the world—every wave pushes your limits.

title: Car Parking Master 3D – Real Driving Simulator
description: Car Parking Master 3D is a realistic driving and parking simulator that tests your precision and control skills. Navigate tight turns, avoid obstacles, and park perfectly in challenging 3D environments. With smooth controls and progressive difficulty, every level pushes your driving accuracy to the limit. Can you complete all stages without crashing?

title: Rabbit & Carrot
description: Help the rabbit collect all of the carrots on each level and get to the flag. Lots of spikes and spiky enemies to avoid. Open gates and use bubbles to float across the screen. 48 challenging levels in this fun platformer.

title: Bubble Trouble
description:
Avoid and pop the bubbles! Shoot the bubbles with your harpoon and split them in smaller bubbles, until eventually they disappear.
The classic arcade game from 2002, remastered.
Bubble Trouble (later Bubble Struggle) has been played hundreds of millions of times, labeled 'one of the top 10 online games'.

22 unique levels, for 1 or 2 players (on the same keyboard).
Final boss level.
Challenge other player's scores.

title: Family Squid Challenge
description: Hey Player, bring your friend along and team up in this Squid adventure! There are black and red masked men everywhere, so you must be very careful. Run from them and collect the keys to complete the level. Be cautious — both of you need to survive!

title: Fashion Heroes Academy
description: Welcome to the Academy of Fashion Heroines, a place where style and superpowers go hand in hand! Three brave girls entered the academy in order not only to reveal their abilities, but also to create their own unique image. And you will help them in this. Choose outfits for studying, training and super battles. Experiment with makeup and accessories. Let each schoolgirl become a superhero and a style icon at the same time!

title: Grow a Garden: Online & Offline
description:
"Grow a Garden: Online & Offline" – Become the best farmer!

Plant, grow, harvest, and earn millions while playing online with other players! Start with a simple plot and turn it into a huge farm with rare and magical plants. Buy seeds from the shop, which refreshes every 5 minutes. Find your plants on the market!

title: K-Pop Hunter Halloween Fashion
description: Step into the glamorous world of K-Pop Hunter Halloween Fashion! In this fun dress-up game, you become the ultimate stylist, creating spooky yet stylish looks for popular K-Pop stars. Mix and match Halloween costumes, trendy hairstyles, and cool accessories to design jaw-dropping outfits for the season’s most exciting event.

title: Run Now
description: Dive into Run Now, where each step is a puzzle waiting to be solved! This game offers a unique blend of creative challenges, quirky humor, and addictive gameplay. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers alike, Run Now invites you to test your skills in a world filled with unexpected obstacles and entertaining surprises.

title: Color 3D - Bump It Up
description:
The main principle is pretty simple – you are controlling a small ball that is always moving forward.

On your way, there are a few obstacles that you need to get through. There’s a small problem however, because you can only touch obstacles that are the same color as your ball. If you touch an obstacle with a different color, the game ends and you need to start from the beginning.

title: Labubu Pop
description:
Labubu Pop is a bright and cheerful puzzle game where the playful Labubus have completely taken over the box! Connect matching characters into chains, clear the board, and earn points to level up. Each stage brings fun surprises, and even more exciting combos!

With its colorful visuals, smooth animations, and simple yet addictive gameplay, Labubu Pop is perfect for relaxing and having fun anytime. The longer your chain — the higher your score and the flashier the effects!

title: Student and Teacher
description:
The school is not ready for you!
Broken laptops, chairs in splinters, the dining room is looted!
Revenge is a dish served in the form of chaos!
Forget about the silent protest – only crushing anarchy!
Make your classmates regret it!
The teacher is in a panic!
The head teacher is furious!
The main thing is not to get caught and avenge the setup!

title: Zip Zap
description: Step into the fascinating world of Zip Zap, a unique online physics puzzle game that blends mechanics, movement, and precision. Tap, twist, and control your way through clever levels filled with moving parts and intricate structures. Every stage tests your timing and creativity — can you reach every target? Play for free on desktop or mobile and enjoy a perfectly balanced mix of challenge and relaxation.

title: Mall Anomaly
description: Mall Anomaly is not your usual mall trip. Instead of shopping, you’re stuck in endless hallways where mannequins stare, furniture floats, and unusual kitties vanish into thin air. Spot these bizarre anomalies before the place completely glitches out—it’s like spot the difference, but in a cursed shopping center.

title: Magic and Wizards Mahjong
description: Enter the enchanting world of Magic & Wizards Mahjong! Match mystical tiles adorned with runes, potions, and magical artifacts across beautifully crafted layouts. Enjoy smooth gameplay with boosters like Hint, Shuffle, Undo, Torch, and Freeze. Race against the clock to earn time bonuses, or use extra seconds to finish your quest. With 50 rotating layouts and stunning wizardly visuals, every match feels like a spellbinding adventure for Mahjong lovers and casual players alike.

title: Tangram Puzzle
description:
Tangram Puzzles is a relaxing geometric logic game where you must recreate a given shape using classic tangram pieces. The challenge trains your spatial thinking, visualization, and ability to rotate and position shapes so they perfectly fit the silhouette.

Don’t be afraid to experiment — sometimes a wrong combination in one place prevents the correct placement somewhere else.

title: Noob: parkour tricks
description:
Welcome to Noob: Parkour tricks!

This is a runner and timekiller in the minecraft universe about the adventures of Noob. Do parkour tricks and complete challenges.

Monster School kicked out Noob, and Herobrine turned him into a Gigachad!

Game Features:
- Run through the village with trials.
- Do parkour tricks.
- Complete challenges and avoid traps.
- Collect diamonds.
- Unlock new skins.

title: Rock Crawling
description: Welcome to the thrilling world of 3D Rock Crawling Racing, where speed meets strategy and off-road dominance is your only goal. In this high-adrenaline off-road simulator, players take the wheel of powerful 4x4 rock crawlers and navigate some of the most extreme and rugged terrains ever designed in a browser game. From sharp mountain ridges to slippery mud tracks, this is not your average racing game—it’s a true test of control, timing, and grit.

title: Lost Adventure
description: Lost Adventure is a survival puzzle game where you guide a determined pilot through a strange, untamed land after a mid-air crash. Craft tools, mine resources, and solve clever challenges as you race to rescue scattered passengers. Your choices shape their fate—will you lead them to safety before the wilderness claims them for good?

title: Dinosaur Shifting Run
description: Get ready for a prehistoric race unlike any other! Dinosaur Shifting Run throws you into a thrilling adventure where you transform into mighty dinosaurs to overcome obstacles and outrun rivals.

title: Math Wall Simulator
description: Combine brainpower and action in this math-based Roblox adventure! Solve equations to break through walls, collect coins, and unlock new challenges. Progress through 20 classes of increasing difficulty, from basic arithmetic to extreme math puzzles

title: VegaMix Match-3 Village
description: A cozy match-3 with a heartfelt story! ? Visit grandma in the village — she’s a true star with fun tales from her youth. Play classic match-3 levels, earn stars and complete quests for villagers. Bright puzzles, touching stories, colorful graphics and daily bonuses await you. Perfect for short sessions and relaxing breaks. ? For fans of match-3 with plot, coziness and helping heroes.

title: Magic Tiles 3
description:
Love music games? Play your favorite songs on Piano Magic Piles 3!
Magic Tiles 3 is an engaging music game that combines magic piano, rhythm, and games for a fun and immersive experience. Tap the tiles to the beat, challenge your reflexes, and enjoy a massive library of 45,000+ songs across various genres, pop, EDM, hip-hop, and more! Tap the black tiles to the rhythm while avoiding the white ones.
Support email: magictiles3.support@amanotes.com

title: Cyber Arrow
description: Play Cyber Arrow – a fast, fun online game where you become a Techno Archer! Fly a remote-controlled arrow, solve puzzles, defeat enemies, and rescue hostages across 3 exciting game modes in a stunning sci-fi world.

title: Emoji Drop Themes
description: Dive into the addictive fun of Emoji Drop, a delightful physics puzzle game where strategy meets chain reactions! Drop a variety of charming items, from classic emojis and juicy fruits to wild animals into the container. The magic happens when two matching items touch, merging into something new and bigger. With a challenging Adventure Mode and a relaxing Classic Mode, can you master the merge and discover the final, ultimate item?

title: Coffee Match Rush: Sort Puzzle
description: Get ready for a deliciously challenging in block puzzle game - Coffee Match: Block Puzzle. In this game, you’ll be tasked with block jam 3d puzzle - sorting coffee cups into the right trays. Each level presents a new set of challenges where you’ll need to move the coffee trays around and strategically place the cups before the timer runs out.

title: Farm Defense
description: Farm Defense is a fast, arcade-style shooter where you guard your ranch from waves of quirky mutants. Move between lanes, aim, and blast anything that crawls out of the burrows before it reaches your crops. Earn coins, unlock new weapons and gadgets, and power up your electric fence. Bright visuals, snappy controls, and escalating waves make every run tense and satisfying.

title: Home Match: Tile Master
description: Tile Master - Classic Triple Match & Puzzle Game is a challenging matching game.? In the game, you need to blow your mind and match 3 numbers of blocks. When all tiles are matched, you can pass the current level!? Our puzzle game includes large numbers of levels. Some levels might be hard. Challenge your mind and solve the puzzles, and then you will find them easy and exciting!

title: Farm: Merge Harvest
description: Transform your land into a beautiful farming haven. Start with a small plot and grow it by merging crops, designing structures and unlocking new areas. The more you build, the more surprises await, bringing new rewards and adventures at every stage!

title: Monster School 3
description: Continuation of the Monster School series from the creators of Noob vs Pro games. Teacher gave the school students a new challenge, this time the monsters will have to draw to survive!

title: Elytra Flight
description: Elytra Flight is an endless flying adventure inspired by the legendary Elytra wings. Players take to the skies in a fast-paced challenge where reflexes and strategy decide how long they can survive. Whether solo or in 2 player mode, the game blends arcade action with survival mechanics, offering a fresh and rewarding experience every flight.

title: Cooking Restaurant Kitchen
description: Prepare and cook delicious food from all over the world in Cooking Restaurant Kitchen. Build the cafe of your dreams while serving hot and awesome meals to hungry customers at a fast pace! Don't let the time run out, practice your time management skills, and get ready to experience the craze of real cooking!

title: Obby Tower
description:
Climb. Think. Survive.

Ascend a towering obstacle course filled with tricky jumps, moving platforms — and surprise math challenges! Combine your parkour skills with quick thinking to make it to the top.

Perfect for players who love obbies and want to test both reflexes and brainpower.

title: JUMPER
description:
Bounce your way to record-breaking heights in JUMPER! Dodge epic traps, collect unique power-ups, and enjoy upgraded visuals as you climb higher and higher.

Unlock adorable skins and earn achievements as you master your jumps. Whether you're aiming for the top or just chilling, JUMPER offers a relaxing platform-hopping experience packed with charm.

title: Path ice
description:
Chill the soda, add some ice, but here's the problem, it's not so easy to get into the glass, you need to draw a path for the ice.

Draw the path as you like.
Go through many levels
Discover all kinds of ice and glasses

title: Shotting Balls
description: In this fun game, you'll have to use your skills to destroy all the black blocks you find in each level in order to advance to the next one. But that's not all: you'll also have to avoid losing the ball, because if it leaves the screen, you'll lose a life and, ultimately, the game. On the other hand, you can also collect gems, which will allow you to obtain new skins to give your ball a new look.

title: Red Hide Ball
description: In Red Hide Ball you protect designated balls from roaming monsters by manipulating the level layout and placing shields or obstacles. Each stage presents a fixed arrangement of elements and predictable monster movements, turning each solution into a small tactical exercise. Success depends on reading patterns, timing actions and using limited moves to create safe zones. The game balances accessible mechanics with steadily increasing difficulty to engage players who enjoy pure logic challenges.

title: Mr Long Hand
description: Immerse yourself in the quirky and delightful world of Mr Long Hand, where you take on the role of a stickman with incredibly long arms. Your mission is simple yet endlessly entertaining: use your elongated limbs to swing through obstacles, solve puzzles, and embark on thrilling rescues. Mr Long Hand offers a unique blend of creativity, challenge, and humor that is sure to captivate players of all ages.

title: Sort Master
description: Get ready to bring order to the chaos in Sort Master, a relaxing yet addictive online puzzle game. Test your logic and observation skills as you sort, match, and organize a variety of fun challenges — from colors to everyday objects. Whether you’re playing on your phone or computer, enjoy the satisfying feeling of tidying up and completing each level with perfection. Play for free and become the ultimate Sort Master!

title: Jetstream Escape
description: Play Jetstream Escape free online and dive into a high-speed browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install required. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks or long sessions. Race powerful boats, dodge coast guards, and outrun storms in this mobile-friendly arcade challenge. Designed for desktop and mobile players who love skill-based brain game style reflex tests, it’s a free online game built for pure,nonstop.

title: Dino Slide
description: A puzle slide game wher you have to feed Dino. Move Dino with the keyboard arrow or swipe. Each level you have to complete the goal that consist in eating fruits and vegetables.

title: Car Mechanic Simulator 2025
description:
In "Car Mechanic Simulator 2025", you are a master restorer who breathes new life into forgotten cars! 

Your task is to find old, broken, and abandoned cars, disassemble them down to the last screw, repair them, replace parts, and reassemble them, turning rusty piles of metal into shiny legends of the automotive industry. Search for rare spare parts, restore engines, choose the perfect paint, and bring every detail to perfection.

title: Witch Craft Potion Sort
description: Step into the witch’s lair this Halloween night and test your skills in a spooky potion puzzle! Sort the eerie liquids, mix glowing brews, and fill each cauldron with the right color to complete your craft.

title: Tappy Bird - Avoid the Spikes
description: Tap on the screen to move bird up, avoiding the spikes as the level progresses more spikes appear and the possibility to collect coins increases.

title: Bricks Balls Breaker
description: Dive into Bricks Balls Breaker, an addictive online arcade game where precision and timing are everything. Launch the ball, shatter the bricks, and plan your every move to keep the field clear. Easy to play yet challenging to master, this free game offers hours of fun on both mobile and desktop. Can you clear every level before the bricks reach the bottom?

title: Chicken Math
description: I am Archimedes. I've been trying to solve this difficult problem for a week, and those chickens have stolen my numbers again. Grab the rifle and head to the backyard. Find and retrieve my numbers. Just be careful — I need the correct numbers!

title: Destruction Simulator
