description: Experience the ultimate destruction sandbox! Bend time, shift gravity, and unleash realistic debris effects. Choose from 13+ explosives, quakes, and tornadoes, or craft custom weapons. Wreck 30+ maps or design your own with the advanced map editor!

title: Sand Block Blast
description: Play Sand Block Blast free online and enjoy a relaxing browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Drop sand-shaped blocks, watch them crumble into grains, and clear lines in a clever logic puzzle that feels both calm and strategic. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home. Mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online brain game perfect for quick breaks and focused play anytime.

title: Circuit Master
description: Circuit Master is a puzzle game where you aim to get a green light by connecting the circuit correctly! Arrange the wires, fans, and machines in the right places, then turn on the button to see the electricity flow. Only the correctly connected circuit will make the green light shine. Use hints if you need help.

title: What's In My Bag?
description: Unpack style and surprises in What’s In My Bag? – the ultimate dress-up and makeup game for fashion lovers! Choose cute outfits, glam makeup, and trendy bags, then reveal what’s inside each one. From influencer props to girly goodies, every bag tells a story. Get creative, show off your style, and join the viral “what’s in my bag” trend now! Perfect for fans of dress-up games, makeup fun, and aesthetic vibes.

title: Beat Music Battle
description: Step into the world of Beat Music Battle: 456 Survival, where rhythm meets creativity and fun! This casual music game is perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and party lovers alike.

title: Happy Monsters 2
description:
A bundle of fun games designed for children of all ages that will delight everyone!

Our little monsters love to play all sorts of games where you collect coins. Help them gather as many as possible to unlock all the toys. Complete the entire toy collection!

title: Capybara Coin Master
description:
Capybara Coin Master is a cozy yet addictive incremental tycoon clicker game where every flip counts!

Start small by buying your first coin and flipping it for income—heads mean profit! As your fortune grows, hire adorable Capybara Coin Masters to flip coins for you, even while you relax. 
Upgrade your coins to higher quality for bigger rewards, and unlock powerful Coin Mastery to boost your team’s flipping skills.

Flip. Upgrade. Profit. Rule the coin empire with your capybara crew!

title: Marble Bubble Legend
description: Marble Puzzle Quest is a fun and addictive casual puzzle game where your task is to sort colorful marbles into the correct slots. With each new level, the challenge grows — chains become longer and more colorful, while the space for moves gets tighter. Use logic, plan ahead, and clear the board! Watch out: the marbles fill four slots at the top, and only three of the same color will disappear. Place them incorrectly, and you lose the round.

title: Ammo Rush Master
description:
Get ready to run, multiply, and blast your way to victory in Ammo Rush Master!
Dodge obstacles, choose the right gates, and build the biggest Ammo army of bullets. Then, grab your blaster and unleash a storm of foam darts to smash through targets, enemies, and bosses!

title: SNAKES
description: SNAKES is a modern puzzle game that combines strategy and spatial reasoning. Players guide multiple snakes across a grid, filling every empty tile to complete each level. With clear visuals and intuitive mechanics, the game offers a relaxing yet challenging experience that sharpens logical thinking. Each level introduces unique layouts and obstacles, ensuring variety and depth as players advance.

title: Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat
description: Ever wanted to experience life as a mischievous cat? In Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat, you take on the role of a playful yet naughty kitty, causing absolute mayhem inside Grandma’s house—all from a first-person perspective! This exciting 3D simulation game lets you see through the eyes of a troublemaking feline as you knock over furniture, scratch walls, and do everything in your power to drive Grandma crazy! Are you ready to embrace the chaos?

title: Merge Pixel
description:
Attractive characters in dot, pixel style!
Combining the same characters creates a higher level of characters.
Repeat Merge to create a legendary character.

title: Foxy Eco Sort
description:
Join Foxy and Raccoon on their eco-mission! Sort waste, play match-3 and matching pairs to clean polluted locations. 

But it's not just cleaning! Uncover the conspiracy of cunning Ratty who wants to destroy the forest. Complete story chapters: track garbage trucks, expose arsonists and save your home!

title: Block Puzzle 3D
description:
Block 3D Puzzle is a colorful logic game where you need to place 3D blocks on the board in the right order. Every move turns into a bright visual effect — when you place a figure and complete a line, the entire line lights up with that block’s color!
Plan your moves carefully, fill the lines, and clear space for new blocks. The game combines relaxing gameplay, smooth animations, and stylish 3D graphics, making every puzzle a true visual delight.

title: Chicken Banana Run
description: Explore the World and Space with the famous Chicken Banana! Run and keep running to collect gold, diamonds and special items and finish with the longest distance to get a high score! Play now the new free runner game for everyone.

title: Mini Golf Battle
description: Mini Golf Battle is a casual sports puzzle where precision and timing decide the outcome. Your task is to sink the ball into the hole with the fewest strokes possible while navigating ramps, walls, and tricky obstacles. Special power-ups like Fire, Wing, and Spring shots add variety, letting you approach each course with unique strategies. Whether for short play sessions or longer runs, Mini Golf Battle delivers an engaging mix of relaxation and skillful play.

title: Solitaire Story Tripeaks 6
description: The highly anticipated 6th installment of one of the most popular Solitaire Story card games of all time! Your good friend Foxy will take you on a journey to new destinations, visiting countries, landscapes, and landmarks like Japan, Egypt, Brazil, Korea, New Zealand, Madagascar, North Pole, and Fiji. With 6700+ levels, Daily Missions, Weekly Air Balloon and Pet Events, and dozens of new card designs, this is the biggest Solitaire Story game yet!

title: Grunge Chic Alt Fashion
description:
Step into the edgy world of Grunge Chic Alt Fashion, where style meets attitude. This dress-up game lets you explore the perfect mix of grunge edge and chic sophistication.

From plaid skirts and ripped jeans to oversized jackets, fishnets, and combat boots—you’ll have endless options to design your alternative fashion star. Top it off with smoky makeup, bold lipstick, and layered accessories to complete the vibe.

title: Formula Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning F1 cars with modified body kits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in F1 Traffic Racer

title: Dog Escape
description: Welcome to Dog Escape, the hide-and-seek puzzle where saving a dog is only the beginning. Guide a lost canine through traps and guards, then bring it home to cuddle, feed, and style! If you adore puppy-care, dress-up, and dog games with heart, this is your new daily ritual. Rescue your puppies now!

title: Minecraft Battle Party
description: Ready for a hot feast of square battles? In Minecraft Battle Party, you'll enter a pixel-styled battle arena where nervous fighting meets iconic Minecraft-style visuals. In this world, every game is a duel to the death. You will play different roles and use different weapons. For example, as a gunner, constantly move your character so that enemies are shot within your scanning range. Watch out for other people's attacks.

title: Sort Tiles
description:
Sort Tiles: Tap Away is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you move tiles, clear the board, and reveal hidden pictures. It’s simple to learn but offers endless logic challenges that keep your brain active. Perfect for fans of tile puzzles, logic games, and relaxing brain teasers.

Key Features:
Unique puzzle mechanics — move tiles in the arrow’s direction and solve logic puzzles step by step.
Hidden images — every cleared puzzle board reveals a new picture.

title: Merge Beasts
description: A fun and addictive merge game where you combine cute and quirky beasts to create stronger and rarer creatures. Each merge brings you closer to discovering powerful evolutions and unlocking new surprises. Collect coins, upgrade your beasts, and watch your monster city grow!

title: Legend of Fireball
description:
Fireballs are your weapon of choice as you tap on objects to obliterate them and earn rewards. Every tap brings you closer to becoming the ultimate Fireball King! Collect various fireballs, costumes, and upgrades, enhancing your powers with every victory. Master cool fireball skills to crush objects even faster and more efficiently.
Race against time to demolish all targets in thrilling challenges, proving you're the strongest fireball wielder in the universe!

title: ASMR Pet Treatment
description: Take care of your adorable puppy and kitty in this relaxing ASMR game! Wash, heal, and pamper your pets with gentle treatments. After they feel happy and healthy, have fun dressing them up in cute outfits. Relaxing sounds and sweet pets make every moment enjoyable!

title: Slice it Up
description: Slice It Up is a colorful arcade puzzle where precision is key! Cut fruits, toys, and other shapes exactly in half to earn stars. The closer your slice is to the center, the better your score. Simple controls, smooth animation, and bright graphics make every level fun and challenging. Test your reflexes, aim for three stars, and unlock new levels in this exciting game for all ages!

title: Aliens Hunter
description: You are an alien hunter and your mission is to use your abilities to find the aliens hidden in the city and use your gun to accurately shoot the aliens to get rewards. Each round has different aliens hiding in different locations. You have to accurately choose, aim and shoot to complete the level mission.

title: Word Seasons
description: Puzzle lovers, it’s time to get solving! Discover hidden words on a word-filled journey through the seasons. Don’t let tough spots stop you – hints are always there to guide you. Keep moving forward, solving one puzzle after another.

title: Twilight Solitaire TriPeaks
description: Step into the shadows with Twilight Solitaire TriPeaks! Explore abandoned castles, fend off lurking vampires, and rebuild forgotten halls. Play 200+ haunting Solitaire levels plus 50 chilling Mahjong boards. Face spooky twists like frozen and locked cards, tricky obstacles, and powerful boosts. Search the dark, cobwebby corners of every last level for gems and coins to purchase new castle upgrades and power-ups. Are you ready for a Solitaire adventure that sends shivers down your spine?

title: Onet Monster Book
description:
A "match-the-pairs" genre game where you need to find matching images and connect them. But it's not that simple: there are tons of pictures, and you have to find the right ones.

Match all the books with the same little monsters on the covers — once you've paired them all, the level is complete! With over 100 levels, meditative gameplay, various cute monsters, and beautiful graphics. Play and relax!

title: Unstack Tower
description: Unstack Tower is a puzzle game that challenges players to dismantle a tower of colorful cubes in the correct order. Every move matters—remove or drop blocks carefully to keep the structure stable while freeing space for the next step. Different block materials such as glass or wood add variety and difficulty, making each level unique. With its blend of strategy and reflex-based gameplay, Unstack Tower offers a mix of tension and fun that keeps players engaged.

title: Fishing the Russian Way
description:
Embark on a journey through Central Russia: picturesque rivers and lakes, different types of fish, and the exciting process of fishing. Improve your tackle, control your rod, decide the fate of your catch, and add to your collection of rare finds.

Use your car to discover new locations, complete tasks, participate in tournaments, and receive daily rewards. Freedom of choice and the path to becoming a true fishing master await you!

title: Paris Kiss
description: Welcome to Paris Kiss, a fun and quirky puzzle game where your goal is simple — bring the characters together for a kiss

title: Panda Mahjong Classic
description: The panda has a challenge for you. You will face five tests on your way to the top. Attempt to finish all stages and earn the honor of being a Mahjong master.

title: Mysterious Familiars Enchanted Bestiary
description: Welcome to the magical world of Mysterious Familiars! Your task is to fill the magic vessel by simply tapping on the screen. Each click fills the potion bowl. As soon as the vessel is filled, a new image of one of the familiars or its next stage of maturation will open. Explore magical locations, from the Moonlight Glade to the Slug Trail, and watch incredible creatures appear from small drops of magic potion. Start the adventure right now - the familiars are waiting for you!

title: Treasure Seeker
description:
This is fun game to play.
You have 5 languages to choose.
There are levels to complete in this game by matching the 3 items and collect the correct items on the list to complete the levels.
Enjoy this game!

title: On Fire Basketball Shots
description: The gym is packed, and the crowd is roaring! The scoreboard's ticking down, and your team is trailing. The only way to win is to sink blazing basketball shots from the court. You're the star player, but the pressure's on—every shot counts, and the hoop's rim is red-hot, making each attempt trickier!

title: Car Destruction King
description: Get behind the wheel and push your limits in this dynamic driving simulator! Choose from different cars, race across diverse maps, and challenge yourself against rotating hammers, giant presses, catapults, and other wild obstacles. With multiple game modes, realistic crash physics, and even the ability to slow down time, every drive is an unpredictable adventure. Set new records, experiment with stunts, and see how far your skills can take you!

title: Sort Water Now
description: A fascinating puzzle journey, a mysterious water sorting adventure, waiting for your experience!Rich and fascinating levels and a variety of props combination, let the classic puzzle game take on a new look!

title: Brainrot Click to Hatch

Accumulate energy, unlock upgrades, and watch how the BRAINROTS evolve into impossible forms. From viral classics to MAX POWER versions, the challenge is clear: collect them all before losing your mind. Do you think you can dominate the Brainrot universe with just a click?

Each level will face challenging features like the sleeping piggy, the hidden piggy, the powerup bubble, the moving bubble and more.

title: Just Mahjong
description:
Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of tranquility with "Just Mahjong" — the perfect implementation of classic mahjong solitaire. Enjoy pure gameplay without unnecessary complications, where all attention is paid to the very essence of this famous game.

"Just Mahjong" offers:

Classic Rules: Authentic and time-tested mahjong solitaire gameplay.

Endless Enjoyment: Hundreds of carefully designed layouts guarantee long hours of play.

title: K-Pop Puzzle Hunters
description: K-Pop Puzzle Hunters is a fun and creative puzzle game inspired by the K-Pop Demon Hunters universe where you get to piece together 12 stunning images featuring Huntrix, Saja Boys, and Derpy Tiger. Choose your challenge with 16, 36, 64, or 100 puzzle pieces and use hints when needed. Perfect for K-Pop fans, anime lovers, and puzzle enthusiasts, this free game mixes strategy, logic, and fandom fun. Start solving today and become the ultimate Puzzle Hunter!

title: Shark Chomp Chase
description: Play Shark Chomp Chase free online and jump into a fast-paced browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks. Hunt, grow, and survive as you master each chase in a fun, skill-based challenge that feels like a light brain game. Mobile-friendly and built for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game that’s easy to start and hard to put down.

title: 3D Chess Master
description: 3D Chess Master – The ultimate 3D chess experience! Enjoy stunning three-dimensional graphics while testing your strategy skills. Challenge your friends in head-to-head matches or take on powerful AI opponents in the most immersive chess game yet.

title: Bubble Shooter Witch Tower 2
description: Bubble Shooter: Witch Tower 2 brings back the magic in a fun, family-friendly way! Pop colorful bubbles, unlock cozy enchanted rooms, and help the Witch Tower shine again. Meet adorable familiars, enjoy charming details, and celebrate the magic of every season — even a touch of Halloween spookiness! Easy to play for all ages, with plenty of bubble-shooting fun to enjoy anytime.

Just move the bubbles around, stack 3 to 10 of the same color together, and watch them pop away! With endless levels and relaxing gameplay, it’s the perfect brain teaser to unwind anytime, anywhere.

Use momentum and precise mouse movements to swing, evade, and counter waves of enemies. With only three lives per round, survival demands quick reflexes and smart play. Rack up high scores and push for a new personal best!

description:
"Zero to Millionaire!" is an immersive life simulator where you rise from poverty to wealth! Start with simple jobs, earn your first money, and work your way up: open businesses, buy luxury houses, sports cars, stylish clothes, and build romantic relationships. Upgrade your skills, make life choices, and build a career or entrepreneurial empire. Live the life you’ve always dreamed of!
How far can you climb in Real Life?

title: Ball Bunker: Sneaky Stacks
description: Ball Bunker: Sneaky Stacks is a fun physics puzzle where your goal is to keep the ball safe! Tap to drop shapes and stack them into a bunker. Rotate pieces to fill gaps, then release the enemy balls. If your bunker holds, you win — if the ball gets hit, you fail. Simple, clever, and addictive!

title: Super Swing
description: Dive into the thrilling world of Super Swing, where you’ll swing, fly, and solve hilarious puzzles in this hyper-casual adventure! Play as a daring stickman hero, swinging through colorful and lively scenes filled with quirky challenges and creative problem-solving opportunities.

title: Block Builder Jam
description: Block Builder Jam is a physics-based puzzle game that blends logic with creativity. Your goal is to drop blocks and fit them into the outlined shape on the screen. Each block falls according to real physics, so precision and timing matter. As levels progress, shapes become more complex and demand sharper planning. With its simple mechanics and engaging challenges, Block Builder Jam offers a satisfying mix of strategy and experimentation.

title: Miracle Mahjong
description: The panda has a challenge for you. You will face five tests on your way to the top. Attempt to finish all stages and earn the honor of being a Mahjong master.

title: Gloomy Princess Favorite Toy
description: Immerse yourself in the mysterious world of the Gloomy Princess and her strange but touching teddy friend. Create unique images for the heroine of the game: choose makeup, outfits and accessories - from witch hats to lace corsets in the Gothic spirit. Add personality to her favorite toy. Assemble the perfect duo - a princess hiding her feelings behind a flawless image, and her beloved companion reflecting the inner world of the hostess!

title: Knife.io
description: Knife.io is a fast-paced 2D battle game where you throw knives at your enemies to eliminate them! Dodge incoming attacks, aim precisely, and take down as many opponents as possible without getting hit. With vibrant worlds to explore and tons of unique characters to unlock, every match is a colorful and action-packed challenge. Play solo or team up with a friend in local multiplayer, only the sharpest player will survive!

Match cookies, candies, pies, donuts, cupcakes, and cotton candies to clear the board and trigger scrumptious chain reactions. Explore a fairytale-like saga map filled with colorful sweets, charming graphics, and a catchy soundtrack. With new treats raining down and endless levels of fun, Cookie Land is the most addictive, mouth-watering Match 3 game for all sweet lovers!

title: My Tiny Market
description: In My Tiny Market, you're the boss of your very own supermarket. Manage your time and resources well to find the perfect balance between all your tasks: restock shelves, serve customers and keep everything running at full speed!

title: Neighborhood Defense
description: Neighborhood Defense is a dynamic tower defense strategy game where your mission is to protect your neighborhood from waves of zombies. Diverse maps with multiple exits, different types of enemies, and limited tower spots make each match unique. Upgrade your towers, combine their abilities, and plan your tactics carefully to stop the horde and prevent them from breaking through.

title: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure
description: Brawl Stars Brave Adventure is a casual battle game designed for brave boys who love fast-paced action and nonstop adventure. Control fearless heroes as you battle enemies, avoid traps, and blast your way through nervous levels. Defeat monsters to constantly upgrade. Choose your skills to ensure your survival or increase your damage! Keep moving to avoid enemy attacks! Complete all levels to win. Get coins to unlock a variety of awesome weapons. Like darts, axes, etc.

title: Durak
description: Play the classic card game Durak online — a fun mix of strategy and luck that you can enjoy for free on your phone or computer. It’s a well-known Russian card game that challenges you to think fast and play smart. The goal? Don’t be the last one left with cards. With just 36 cards in the deck, every match brings a fresh, dynamic experience.

title: Cube to Hole Puzzle
description:
Welcome to Cube to Hole Puzzle!
Get ready for an exciting and brain-teasing experience! In Cube to Hole Puzzle, your objective is simple: fill the colored cubes into their matching colored holes. But there’s a catch—limited space on the board and only a few slots to move the cubes forward. You’ll need to plan ahead and choose the right cube to move first. Strategize carefully to avoid blocking yourself and clear the board to progress through each level!

title: Hidden Objects
description: Hidden Objects is a visually stunning puzzle game that challenges your observation skills. Explore beautifully detailed scenes filled with cleverly hidden items. Use hints if needed, but the real reward lies in uncovering every object on your own. Dive into a world of mystery and sharpen your perception.

title: UGC Math Race
description:
Run fast. Think faster!

Solve math problems on the go in this competitive racing game! Choose the correct answer to stay on track, one mistake and you fall. 

Perfect for players who love speed, smarts, and math.

title: Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker
description: Get ready for the cutest twist on the viral Brainrot universe! Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker is the baby-themed sequel to the hit Brainrot Clicker! Tap your way through the baby versions of your favorite characters, collect upgrades, and enjoy a whole new atmosphere with colorful visuals, cheerful music, and fresh sound effects designed to fit the playful baby theme!

title: Two Stunt Racers
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning sports car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Tales of Lagoona
description: Embark on a magical Hidden Object adventure beneath the waves! In Coral Bay, the New Anemone Orphanage is in danger of closing – only you can save it. Search beautiful underwater scenes for hidden treasures, sell your finds at the market, upgrade the orphanage, play 160 mini-games, and take on quests from the townsfolk. Join Islabelle the Mermaid in a heartwarming quest to rescue the orphans!

title: Vex 9
description:
Vex 9 is here- the next evolution in the legendary stickman platformer series! Take your parkour skills to the limit as you run, jump, and slide your way through a brand-new set of Acts filled with dangerous traps, bombs, and other deadly surprises. 

For the first time ever, take to the skies with the powerful new Jetpack! Put your reflexes to the ultimate test in the all-new Challenge Mode! Can you conquer every challenge and become the ultimate Vex champion?

title: Merge Haven
description: Merge items to restore the café to its former glory, uncover hidden secrets, and discover its mysterious past. Start merging today to reveal the café's enchanting story!

title: Princess Rescue: Save Girl
description: Dive into a heart-pounding quest in Princess Rescue: Save Girl, a thrilling puzzle adventure full of danger, strategy, and fast-paced action! If you're into dragon-themed puzzles that test your reflexes and thinking skills, this is your next favorite game.

title: Marble Puzzle Quest
description: Marble Puzzle Quest is a fun and addictive casual puzzle game where your task is to sort colorful marbles into the correct slots. With each new level, the challenge grows — chains become longer and more colorful, while the space for moves gets tighter. Use logic, plan ahead, and clear the board! Watch out: the marbles fill four slots at the top, and only three of the same color will disappear. Place them incorrectly, and you lose the round.

title: Tung Sahur Bots Chase Room
description:
Horror brainrot bots are on the hunt! Watch out, stay alive!

Welcome to Tung Sahur Bots Chase Room – the ultimate brainrot meme horror escape game!

Get ready for heart-pounding chases as you find yourself trapped in backroom full of unpredictable Tung Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Tralalero Tralala Bots and other viral meme creatures. Can you keep up with the chaos, dodge the brainrot traps, and make it out alive? Only the fastest runners will escape this nightmare.

title: Ship Out
description: The harbor’s a mess! Ships of all sizes and colors are stuck in a massive jam. Pay attention to their direction, plan your moves, and clear the chaos! Need help? Use special power-ups to sail through tougher levels.

title: Maze Craze
description: Step into the captivating world of Maze Craze, a puzzle game that combines creativity, humor, and strategic problem-solving. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers, Maze Craze offers an endless journey through a variety of mazes, each with its own unique set of challenges and surprises.

title: Bubble Shooter Temple Jewels
description: Embark on a temple adventure in Bubble Shooter Temple Jewels! Pop colorful bubbles as you progress through ancient ruins inspired by Central American temples. Keep track of your journey with the Stats screen, showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With vibrant visuals, exciting challenges, and detailed progress tracking, this bubble shooter keeps you motivated to aim higher and improve every round!

title: Tag Run
description: Tag Run is an adrenaline-fueled multiplayer action parkour game where 1–4 local players race to ditch the bomb and be the last standing! Tag opponents, use teleport pads and jump springs, and survive thrilling matches with 6 players. Explore six dynamic maps: Pixel, Winter, Lava, Jungle, Candy, and Night, and packed with creative power-ups. Test your reflexes, strategy, and parkour skills in this fast-paced, chaotic playground challenge.

title: Dreamy Home
description:
It's not just a game, but a warm and peaceful adventure that helps you feel the magic of ordinary moments.
Opening box after box, you will find personal items and lovingly find the perfect place for them. Room by room, step by step, you will assemble mosaics of memories and emotional stories hidden in simple objects.

title: Smashdoll
description:
Smashdoll – Ragdoll Smash Game is a fast and chaotic physics game where you smash through floors, obstacles, and enemies to reach the bottom! Collect coins, dodge bullets, and upgrade your smash power, jump force, and trails.

Break enough floors to charge your smash meter and transform into an unstoppable bullet of destruction. How far can you smash?

title: Fun Mini Games For Princess
description: Welcome to Fun Mini Games For Princess, a collection of mini casual games for kids. Dive into the gaming world and enjoy the fun of playing at your fingertips! Whether you are a casual gamer who looks for relaxation or a skillful player with a purpose, you will find your favorite game and enjoy endless fun in our mini games. Our mini games cover a large range of categories.

title: Autumn Glam Gala
description: Get ready for the ultimate fall beauty adventure at the Autumn Glam Gala! Help three BFFs create stunning makeup looks for the most anticipated gala of the season. From soft, natural tones to bold, sparkling colors, you’ll have endless fun choosing makeup, hairstyles, and glamorous outfits. Experiment with fall-inspired looks and fashion trends to ensure each girl shines at the gala. Are you ready to showcase your makeup artist skills? Play Autumn Glam Gala now and let the glam begin!

title: Strange packages
description:
You wake up alone in an empty apartment where everything seems calm… until the first knock at the door. Nameless parcels, mysterious objects, eerie creatures, and meaningless incantations turn your cozy home into a nightmarish trap.

Who is sending you these items — an enemy or a savior?
Why do toys come to life, eyes grow on the walls, and a ceiling-high worm bursts from the bathtub?

title: Color Hoop Sort
description: Color Hoop Sort Puzzle Game is a fun and relaxing online puzzle where you sort colorful hoops onto rods. Test your logic and focus as levels get harder! Perfect for all ages, this brain-teasing game will keep you entertained for hours. Play now and see how far you can go!

title: Metaxis
description: In Metaxis, a minimalist puzzle-platformer, if you stop moving, you die. Descend into a black-and-white underworld to save a lost soul, facing Death’s cruel challenge: succeed or stay trapped forever. Cross dangerous, changing isometric levels with quick reflexes and sharp thinking. Every step is a fight between life and death. Your only chance is to keep moving.

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description:
Drag to create a path and guide the bike to the goal.
To draw the bridge, you need to line over the open areas and your vehicle will go over them. there will be multiple vehicles in the same level make sure you don't make them collide each other.
You can only draw the line once
You can only draw it once, make sure the bike bridge you create is strong enough. Safety comes first, make sure your bike gets to the finish line safely.

title: Tap Tap Builder
description:
"Tap Tap Builder invites you to build the city of your dreams and become its mayor! But before leaning back in a comfortable boss's chair, you'll have to roll up your sleeves and do some work. Want to build a skyscraper? Tap-tap and you're done! Not enough money? Tap-tap and earn some! A fire broke out? Tap-tap and save your people!

Let's start working right now, tap-tap the PLAY button!

title: Chinese Food Chef DuDu
description: Are you a fan of Chinese food? Do you want to discover the mystery of delicious Chinese cuisine? You do not want to miss this cooking game - Chinese Food Chef DuDu. Here, you have the chance to learn different recipes of traditional Chinese food, such as dumplings, rice dumplings, and zongzi. Win the heart of the little monkey with your delicious Chinese food!

title: Arrow Survival: 15 Seconds
description:
Dodge and shoot to survive 15 seconds! Master 40 levels of arrow chaos in this fast-paced pixel art platformer! 

Dive into Arrow Survival: 15 Seconds, a thrilling 2D pixel art platformer where every second counts! As a skilled archer, your mission is to survive 15 seconds per level by dodging deadly hazards and strategically firing arrows.

title: Zomblox
description:
Zomblox is a free FPS shooter in the spirit of CS, Minecraft, and Roblox.

Survive in a school overrun by zombies, catch memes, rescue your friends, and blast the undead in pixelated chaos.
Watch out: the teacher has turned into Zombalina Teachrina and is turning everyone into zombies!

title: Brainrot Hole
description: Brainrot Hole is a fun casual game where you control a hole that sucks in objects. Your task is to guide the hole to eat all the objects and defeat all the Brainrot Enemies . As you progress through the levels,  the game gets more challenging with more complex obstacles to avoid. Use your strategy and quick reflexes to become the ultimate Brainrot Hole master!

title: Back To School: Uniforms Edition
description: Explore global fashion in Back to School: Uniforms Edition! This fun dress-up game lets you spin the wheel to unlock school uniforms from countries like Japan, the U.S., the U.K., India, France, and South Korea. Customize your character with stylish outfits, accessories, and hairstyles inspired by each culture. Dive into the diversity of school uniforms and become a fashion expert while having fun!

title: Big Head
description: Looking for a logic puzzle that’s both smart and funny? Big Head is a mobile maze game that flips classic mazes upside down with creative challenges and comedy. Each tricky puzzle is a brain challenge that makes you think outside the box while enjoying hilarious animations.

title: Sausage Flip Free
description: In Sausage Flip Free, you're not just any sausage. You’re a daring, bouncy hero on a mission to overcome wild levels full of danger, timing, and precision! This action, casual game blends goofy fun with real skill challenges! Tap to launch your sausage with a perfect flip! Launch the sausage on the vine and keep moving to the next pot or shelf, etc. Use your perfect skills to master each tricky obstacle. Cross the finish line to win.

title: Snake Out
description: Dive into Snake Out – a vibrant puzzle adventure packed with fun and challenges! ?✨ Sharpen your skills, conquer tricky stages, and enjoy endlessly rewarding gameplay. Ideal for casual gamers and puzzle lovers alike! ?

title: Monster Arena
description: Be the longest monster ever! Beat out your rival monsters by eating fruits and grows. This snake io game let you roam free, grow large, and finish your enemies by making them crash into you. Be the king of the island!

title: Halloween Fruit Slice
description: Halloween Fruit Slice is a high-energy arcade action game set in a spooky Halloween world. Vivid fruits and devious traps streak across the screen in an instant. Your task is to slice as many fruits as possible with lightning speed, chaining spectacular combos and racking up points while dodging explosive bombs. Rich visuals, splashy juice effects, and eerie backdrops create a thrilling, immersive atmosphere. The tempo keeps rising, so every moment tests your reflexes and precision.

title: Marble Run - Ultimate Race!
description:
Race, roll, and clash in Marble Run, the ultimate marble racing game! Guide your marble through physics-based tracks, dodge obstacles, knock rivals off the edge, and aim for the finish line. 

With fast-paced races, competitive knockout rounds, and fun marble skins, it’s the most addictive 3D marble runner you’ll play!

title: Stickman Rocket
description: You have a powerful cannon loaded with Stickman Ragdols which you must shoot far to reach your target! Solve all kinds of challenges as you collect gems, avoid obstacles and control your throws to reach the targets in each level. Try not to bump into obstacles along the way and use all the raggedy characters you need to have fun with these amazing challenges - good luck!

title: Murderers VS Sheriffs Duels
description:
Love Roblox-style action games? Get ready for the ultimate showdown!

Jump into fast-paced 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, and 4v4 duels where every second counts. Play as a Murderer or a Sheriff, master unique abilities, and outplay your enemies in style.

If you enjoy games like Murder Mystery or Arsenal in Roblox, this is made for you!

title: Queens Royal: Sudoku Puzzle
description: Queens Royal: Sudoku Puzzle reimagines the classic eight queens challenge into a sleek logic game with over 5,000 levels. Place queens strategically so none share a row, column, or color zone while avoiding attacks in all directions. With elegant visuals, daily challenges, endless mode, and smart hints, every puzzle offers a unique test of reasoning and precision for players who enjoy refined brain-teasers.

title: Sea Lords
description: Set sail for success in Sea Lords - the fun idle tycoon simulation game where you're the master of the seas. Start with a small fishing port and gradually build your global shipping empire! Manage ships, upgrade docks, hire captains, and automate your logistics as you conquer new routes and earn riches - even while you're offline! It's time to prove your skills as the next sea lord! Buy and upgrade ships to boost your delivery speed and cargo capacity.

title: 3Dash
description: 3Dash is a fast-paced 3D rhythm platformer inspired by Geometry Dash—dash, jump, and flip through dizzying, rotating tracks while keeping perfect time. Tackle six hand-crafted levels, then build your own with the level editor for endless replay

title: 3D Acrylic Nail: Nail Art Game
description: 3D Acrylic Nail: Nail Art Game lets you become the ultimate nail artist! Step into your very own nail salon where creativity has no limits. Design stunning acrylic nails with trendy styles, vibrant colors, and charming accessories. Satisfy your customers' unique requests, earn money, and upgrade your salon to become the best nail stylist in town!

title: Galaxy Clicker
description: Explore space in Galaxy Clicker, a free online game where you travel through galaxies with just a click. Play on your phone or computer and enjoy a relaxing space adventure that tests your strategy while keeping you entertained.

title: 3D Block Gladiator: Sword Draw
description:
Sketch Your Path to Fight and Become the Ultimate Champion!

Step into the gladiator arena where only the strongest and smartest warriors survive! In 3D Block Gladiator: Sword Draw, you don’t just fight—you draw your attacks and dodges, controlling your gladiator’s every move with precision. Swipe, slash, and outmaneuver your enemies to claim victory!

title: Halloween Merge Mania
description: Halloween Merge Mania is a fast-paced casual game with a fun Halloween vibe. Cute monster balls—pumpkins, black cats, mummies, vampires, and other iconic characters—appear on the screen. Your task is to merge identical creatures to create new, rarer, and more valuable ones. Each successful merge unlocks the next level of spooky yet adorable monsters, while the dark background and vivid graphics immerse you in the festive autumn atmosphere.

title: Driverz Ed
description: Driverz Ed invites you into an open-world driving adventure where exploration meets discovery. Collect hidden puzzle pieces scattered across diverse locations, unlock a wide selection of cars, and complete missions that blend racing with strategy. With free exploration, fast travel, and mission tracking, the game delivers a fresh take on the driving genre while keeping every ride exciting and unpredictable.

title: Knife Madness
description: Aim, throw and survive! Watch out — avoid hitting other blades. The spinning wheel gets faster, the stakes get higher and only your quick reflexes will keep you in the game. Can you defeat the boss levels and unlock epic knife skins? The challenge is on!

title: Zombie Road: Shooter with Destruction
description: Grandpa is eager for adventure again! Survive in a harsh zombie world. This time, Grandpa has to save the world from evil zombies. Zombies can drive and shoot! And Grandpa can destroy evil spirits! Fight the most dangerous mutants. Buy cool guns, find unique attachments, assemble your own unique gun and go into battle! Many locations, go through the whole world, from hot deserts to sea battles!

title: Pixel Blast
description: Pixel Blast is a colorful online arcade game that mixes classic gameplay with modern design. Play for free on your phone or computer and enjoy smooth controls and vibrant pixel art. It’s easy to pick up and fun for players of all ages.

title: Ball Jump Switch The Colors
description:
Tap on the screen, that will make the ball bounce higher and higher. The ball has one color, and can pass through obstacle with the same color, or sneak in between obstacles with different colors.

Easy-to-play and addictive !

title: Phantom thief Cat Running
description: Avoid obstacles and reach the goal! Tap to change direction, and the game ends when your stamina reaches zero. Pick up items to increase your score or restore stamina. Collect three stars to enter Invincible Mode. Fish bones reduce stamina, but collecting ten turns coins into high-scoring diamonds for a short time!

title: Alien Wreckage 1
description: In "Alien Wreckage - Chapter 1" you are a lone space traveler, who explore the deepspace looking for alien artifacts around the universe. Face alien creatures, collect coins and jewels to spend in the game shops, find all the secrets and unlock new powerups.

title: Bubble Shooter Hawaii
description: Bubble Shooter Hawaii is a bubble shooter game with a hawaii theme and classic gameplay combined with special bubble mechanics. It's unique level map will guide you to the challenging levels with unique bubbles like the horizontal row destroyer, the rocks or the hidden bubbles.

title: Forest Glade Mysteries
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Forest Glade Mysteries — a magical forest where the cutest animals live! Each level introduces you to new fluffy friends and exciting challenges. This forest is full of mysteries, and every step brings you closer to uncovering ancient secrets!

title: Traitor Beaver!
description: Beaver Traitor! An exciting game where one player takes on the role of the traitor, while the other players act as regular participants. Your goal as the traitor is to secretly kill all the other players, sabotaging their tasks at the nuclear power plant. You'll need to be cunning, careful, and think strategically to avoid detection and achieve victory. Use various tactics and deception to reach your goals.

title: Blankets
description:
Put together cozy blanket pieces with the same colors and patterns to make them disappear and keep your board nice and neat!
With soft colors and a calm, happy feel, Blankets is great for kids who like fun puzzles without too much stress.

Can you build the coziest blanket and get the best score in Blankets?

title: Through the Wall
description: Get ready for a unique puzzle experience with Through the Wall, where creativity and humor meet strategic problem-solving. Guide your stick figure character through moving walls by striking the perfect pose, with each level presenting new and exciting challenges.

title: Swim Good
description: Chomp your way through a swirling feast of worms while dodging deadly spiky firing urchins! Stay alive, keep circling, and see how long you can last.

title: Draw a path to the finish line!
description: Draw a path and lead your character to the finish line! Use your creativity and planning to avoid obstacles and reach your goal. Whether you're playing on a computer or phone, this fun puzzle game is all about finding smart and artistic ways to win. Great for all ages!

title: Tile Match Cafe
description:
Discover the engaging tile-matching puzzle game that plunges you into a world of triple-tile tapping challenges and stimulating fun.

Prepare yourself for an exciting adventure filled with complex puzzles as you match tiles, clear the boards, and strive to become the top tile master.

With its intuitive mechanics and addictive gameplay, Tile Match Cafe is an ideal pick for fans of tile-matching games seeking a charming and rewarding puzzle experience.

title: Tricky Challenges: Mini Games
description:
Only 5% will pass all the Challenges! Ready to test your reactions and wit? Take the challenge and prove that you are better than thousands of bloggers!

✨ "Tricky Challenges: Mini Games" is a unique game that combines popular challenges from TipTop and puzzle elements.

title: Goon Ball
description: Fast-paced, two-player game where players try to control a "Goon Ball" to paint the  floor their color before time runs out.

title: Square Punki Long Hand
description: Ever wondered what life would be like with super long arms? In Square Punki Long Hand, you get to experience just that! This unique puzzle game challenges you to stretch, grab, prank, and solve hilarious puzzles using your extra-long limbs. Whether you're rescuing trapped characters, reaching impossible places, or pulling off mischievous tricks, every level is filled with surprises and laughter!

title: Block Parkour Trials
description: Block Parkour Trials is a super fun and free-to-play parkour game. Your goal is to reach the portal at the finish line by skillfully jumping over obstacles. Have fun and enjoy the challenge!

title: Jigsaw Fantasy
description: Jigsaw Fantasy is the perfect game for puzzle lovers! Choose from a wide collection of puzzles, each offering a relaxing and fun experience. Want a personal touch? Upload your family photos and turn them into custom puzzles. Simply drag and drop the scattered pieces into place to complete the image. With intuitive controls and a clean interface, Jigsaw Fantasy is great for kids and adults alike.

title: Fluffy Mania
description: Step into the charming world of Fluffy Mania, where bright, fluffy creatures are ready to test your puzzle-solving skills. This online game combines adorable visuals with clever gameplay, creating a fun and relaxing challenge. Play on desktop or mobile and dive into colorful levels full of lovable characters. Connect matching creatures, score points, and climb through progressively tricky stages.

title: Spooky Chains
description: Spooky Chains is a fun Halloween puzzle game. Tap a tile and drag through matching nearby items to make a chain of 3 or more. The items vanish, and the tiles turn golden. Your goal is to turn all tiles golden. Sometimes a Flying Witch glides across the board. Tap her while she flies to watch a reward ad. After the ad, she blasts some tiles into golden. You can also watch a reward ad to remove the timer and play without time pressure.

title: Isometric Escape 2
description: Isometric Escape 2 challenges you to solve a variety of puzzles in uniquely designed isometric rooms. Search for hidden objects and use your logic and memory to unravel the riddles and escape.

title: Fortune's Deck Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Fortune's Deck Solitaire, where ancient Tarot magic meets the timeless thrill of Tripeaks!

Three enchanted towers of fate await your touch - draw from the mystical deck and begin your journey through the arcana.

Inspired by the classic Tripeaks Solitaire, this magical twist invites you to clear the cards, trust your intuition, and let the deck reveal your fortune.

Will you find insight, mystery… or unexpected luck?

title: Journey Of Escape
description: Escape games have always been a popular genre among puzzle enthusiasts and adventure seekers. They challenge players to think critically, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover hidden secrets while racing against time. "Journey of Escape" is an immersive collection of escape games designed to test your intelligence

title: Hexa Sort Trick or Treat
description: Step into a haunted puzzle realm where glowing hexagonal blocks hide within a web of spooky challenges. Your task: sort eerie, color-coded pieces into their rightful places before the shadows close in. With every drag and drop, you’ll sharpen your wits and unravel chillingly clever layouts that grow trickier as you progress. Easy to pick up yet devilishly addictive, this Halloween brain-teaser will keep players of all ages spellbound through hundreds of spooky levels.

title: Bid Wars 1: Auction Simulator
description: Ever dreamed of becoming a smart and fearless auction tycoon? Bid Wars 1: Auction Simulator is an addictive auction and simulation game that puts you in exciting bidding wars to uncover hidden treasures! In this game, you join intense auctions for storage units, antiques, and mysterious items. Spot valuable gems, bid wisely, and sell them for huge profits! From small street auctions to luxury halls, build your empire step by step!

title: OUTSIDE
description:
OUTSIDE is a sleek and minimal puzzle game where every move matters. Guide a one-eyed character through a grid to collect the key and reach the exit — but there’s a twist: once you start moving, you won’t stop until you hit a wall.

Plan your route carefully, avoid dead ends, and use the environment to your advantage. With simple mechanics and clean visuals, OUTSIDE is easy to pick up but tough to master — a perfect test of logic and spatial thinking.

title: Number Tubes
description: Relax and train your brain with Number Tubes — the addictive number sorting and merging game! Tap to move balls, merge the same numbers into bigger ones, and keep going to beat your best score. No time limits, no pressure — just pure fun. Perfect for fans of merge games, number games, and classic sort puzzles.

title: Chroma Trek
description:
Dive into the glowing world of Chroma Trek, a vibrant neon platformer where every step is a test of skill and perception. With dazzling visuals and a unique color-switching mechanic, each level feels like a handcrafted puzzle filled with dynamic challenges.

Shift colors to phase through obstacles, stay sharp to dodge traps, and be inspired by motivational messages that guide you along the way. Your goal? Reach the shimmering Finish Crystal and conquer every stage with style.

title: Hidden Object: My Hotel
description: Hidden Objects: My Hotel – A fun hidden-object game where you help a young woman restore her dream hotel! After buying the old building, she needs your help to clean up cluttered rooms, find hidden items, and bring back its lost charm.

title: Magical Diary: Paper Dress Up
description: Dress up your paper doll with mystical styles in Magical Diary: Paper Dress Up! ?✨ Get ready to enter a dreamy world where fantasy meets fashion. This isn’t just a dress-up game—it’s your magical escape, where every outfit tells a story and every style reveals a spellbound secret. Whether you're a fashion dreamer, a lover of magic, or a diary keeper at heart, this enchanted adventure is made just for you.

title: Grill Party
description: Welcome to Grill Party! Step into the exciting world of grilling and become a master at crafting tasty skewers! In Grill Party!, you’ll experience a thrilling match-3 puzzle game where you’ll arrange meats, seafood, and veggies to create perfect combos. Serve up mouthwatering treats and show off your grilling skills!

title: Cryptogram
description:
This game is for people who do not just look at letters but see the meaning behind them.
Each phrase hides a thought that can be revealed if you use logic, intuition and persistence.

title: Schoolboy Runaway: room escape
description: Step into the gripping adventure of Schoolboy Runaway: Room Escape, where strategy and mystery go hand in hand. A young schoolboy finds himself locked in a strange room, full of tricky puzzles and hidden clues. Help him think fast, solve each challenge, and escape before it’s too late. Play for free on both mobile and desktop and see if you can unravel the secrets of every room.

title: Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
description:
Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
Swipe fruits, blast combos & solve hundreds of juicy match-3 puzzles! Fun for all ages with vibrant graphics, daily rewards, offline play & no time limits. ?? Perfect for quick play or long sessions. Match, crush & enjoy!

Play now and test your brain!

title: Crazy Stunts 3D
description: Get behind the wheel and conquer extreme tracks! Jump from ramps, compete with players, complete modes and unlock new cars!

title: Math Lava: Tower Race
description: Test your math skills under pressure in Math Lava: Tower Race, a fast-paced Roblox style web game where quick thinking and accurate answers are your keys to survival. Answer math questions correctly to build blocks beneath you, racing against opponents and rising lava. The faster and more accurate you are, the higher you climb!

title: Hide Ball
description: Hide Ball is an addictive puzzle game where your mission is to protect the red ball from dangerous spiky enemies. Use the given blocks to build a safe shelter and hide the ball. Each level brings a new challenge — the constructions become trickier, and the enemies more relentless. Plan your moves, create a solid defense, and save your little hero!

title: Ninja Obby Parkour
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Ninja Obby Parkour, where every level is a test of speed, agility, and strategy. Packed with hundreds of unique obstacle courses, this game combines competitive racing with ninja-style combat and dazzling customization options.

From smashing glass doors at checkpoints with your ninja power to unlocking powerful bonuses like speed boost, giant mode, and flight, every run feels fresh.

title: Prásino
description: Prasino is a free-to-play forest adventure game that combines exploration, survival, and environmental restoration. As nature’s last hope, your mission is to travel through beautiful landscapes, collect magical seeds, and revive the forest by planting trees. Along the way, you must watch out for dangerous enemies and manage your breath carefully to keep exploring deeper into the wild.

title: Emergency Jam
description: As you progress, encounter cars in 8 different colors, adding complexity to your strategy. Use powerful boosters to line up characters by color or shuffle vehicles, clearing the way more efficiently. Test your logic, think fast, and rescue passengers.

title: ASMR Tattoo Treatment
description: Treat a cool rocker in your ASMR clinic! Heal their sore piercing with gentle tools, retouch their fading star tattoo, and enjoy relaxing sounds with every step. Make them smile with your careful care and earn rewards for a perfect treatment!

title: Words or Die
description:
Build words to survive — think fast or get crushed!

In this fast-paced word survival game, players race to create words from random letters. Each correct word builds a tower under your feet. Fail to spell on time? Lava rises, and you're out!

 - Stay above the lava
 - Show off your vocabulary skills
 - Compete against others in real-time
 - Choose your character and style
 - Only the smartest will survive!

title: Sort And Style: Back To School
description: Step into the world of Sort And Style: Back To School, a fun mix of sorting and dress-up games for girls! Organize messy desks, lockers, wardrobes, and even bento boxes across 9 exciting levels. Then, challenge your creativity in the final dress-up unit where you style your school look with trendy uniforms, shoes, hairstyles, and accessories. Perfect for fans of organizing games, makeover fun, and school fashion challenges!

title: Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up
description:
In Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up, you’re dressing up your doll and getting her ready to go live. Pick from different styles—she can look like a fairy, wear chill street clothes, or go for a beach outfit. When you’re done, she jumps on the stream and starts showing off her look.

You can mess with her hair, add makeup, and try out accessories. There’s also a battle mode where you go up against other players to see who styled it best.

title: Vikings: An Archer's Journey
description: Vikings: An Archer’s Journey blends the fast-paced action of a shoot ’em up with the adrenaline rush of an infinite runner, all presented in a striking minimalist art style. Play as Nott, a fearless Valkyrie archer, on a quest to save her wolf, Oder, from the Underworld. Use intuitive controls, collect powerful upgrades, and team up with Viking heroes to face off against mythical Nordic creatures in this thrilling adventure.

title: Witchy and the Puzzle Adventures
description: Help the brave Witch to pass all the puzzling tests and find all the seals to shelter them in her cozy forest house. Kittens are lost in the forest, which is full of various traps and dangers, you need to help the Witch to pass all the tests and find all the seals.

title: Fun Sorting Through The Shelves
description: Unwind with this charming match-3 puzzle game! Spot matching items, place them neatly on shelves, and merge triplets to free up space. Collect treasures, decorate, and design your own cozy virtual nook in a relaxing experience for all ages.

title: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park
description: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park is a horror escape adventure where bright amusement park rides hide lurking dangers. Players must solve puzzles, collect items, and uncover clues while evading hostile enemies. Stealth and timing are crucial—explore cautiously, hide when needed, and outsmart the threats to survive and escape. The mix of colorful setting and eerie tension creates a unique, suspenseful experience.

title: Stickman Kombat 2D
description: Adrenaline unleashed! Rage, speed, and chaos collide in explosive 2D battles. Feel every hit — and dive into the madness. Are you ready?

title: HexaMatch
description:
HexaMatch – The Ultimate Number Puzzle!
Swipe and sort tiles into the empty slot to solve addictive hexa puzzles. With progressive difficulty, unique gameplay, and a fresh twist on classic number games, HexaMatch is perfect for all ages. Train your brain, relax your mind, and enjoy endless fun with this simple yet challenging merge hexa puzzle!

title: Meme Wars
description: MeMe Wars is a strategy battler with US-style Shanhaijing flair. Build a quirky hero lineup with unique roles and stats. Place them on the board for max power, adapt to new foes each stage, and win.

title: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue!
description: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue! is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game with lots of interesting puzzles. You will see several niches in it. They will be separated by partitions. In one niche you will see a fish, and in another water. You will need to carefully study everything and pull the pin. Thus, you will open it and water will get to the fish.

title: Italian Brainrot Find the Stars
description: Play Italian Brainrot Find the Stars game online and for free. Find out the hidden stars in the specified images. Each level has 12 hidden stars. There are 12 levels in total. The time is limited so be fast and find all hidden objects before time runs out. Clicking in the wrong place several times reduces the time by an additional 5 seconds. So, if you are ready, start the game and have fun!

title: Minicraft Chef Cake Wars
description: Hey player, would you like to have a cooking competition with your friend? In this cooking contest, you must beat your friend. Collect all the cooking materials as quickly as possible. We need to gather the cake ingredients floating in balloons in the air. The player who collects the most ingredients the fastest wins the game. To bake the cake, collect everything: salt, flour, and milk. Gather all the ingredients and win the game!

title: STELLAR GUARDIAN
description: Stellar Guardian – Cosmic Defense Force is a fast-paced space shooter where you command powerful ships, unlock upgrades, and defend the galaxy across challenging missions and game modes. to fix the lag you need to keep the PC on a full screen, while on other devices it runs smoothly

title: Sudoku Vault
description: Sudoku Vault is a logic-based puzzle game featuring 4x4, 6x6, and 9x9 boards — each with four difficulty levels: Basic, Normal, Hard, and Expert. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, every grid offers a fresh challenge for your mind. Use smart NOTES to keep track of possibilities, and when you want to check your progress, tap the CHECK button — it will remove incorrect inputs and lock the correct ones, helping you stay focused on the solution.

title: Fish rain 2
description:
"Cast and pull!" is the motto of this fishing game. Everything is real here: the sounds in the locations, and the online chat. Share your legendary trophies with other players, show off your catch, and name the weight and type of fish.

 Try to catch a pike or a catfish, a perch or a minnow, or maybe a carp or a sturgeon?

 Fish in different locations: on a rocky shore or on the Pripyat River. Use a variety of baits, from worms to live bait and leeches.

title: Travel With Me: ASMR Edition
description: Prepare to jet-set across the world with Travel With Me: ASMR Edition! Join Lisa, the stylish vlogger, as she explores stunning destinations, allowing you to dress her up in fabulous outfits that match each location perfectly. From the serene temples of Thailand to the desert adventures in Dubai, and the tropical paradise of Maldives, challenge your fashion skills and create unforgettable looks for every occasion.

title: Dragon Egg
description: Players can unlock higher-level Divine Dragon eggs by moving three or more of them. Supports multi-level recursive synthesis of 5-color dragon eggs. Eventually, unlocking high-level dragon eggs can unlock the birth of new dragons, accompanied by splendid animations, filling the sense of achievement to the fullest.

title: Carvivor Ops
description: Carvivor Ops puts you behind the wheel of a weaponized supercar in a nonstop chase for survival. Dodge relentless police, unleash rockets, and upgrade your gear as you fight through chaotic urban streets. Every second counts as you outmaneuver enemies, collect power-ups, and push your skills to the limit in this high-octane mix of driving and combat.

title: Skate Hooligans
description: Help the little hooligans escape from the policeman who is constantly trying to catch them. Try to collect as many bonuses and coins as possible on the road, for which you can buy new coolest skateboards and amazing characters. And do not forget to complete funny tasks, because the number of points you receive depends on this!

title: Froggy Hop
description: Froggy Hop is a fun, physics-based game where you launch a bouncy frog and help it travel across lily pads, turtles, and spring pads while dodging obstacles. Upgrade jump power, height, and bounce to go farther. Unlock cool skins with upgrades, complete daily missions, and aim for the best distance!

title: Italian Brainrot Survival Arena
description: Are you ready for the ultimate showdown between Trallero and Tung Tung Sahur? Yes, in a lava-filled cave — let’s see who will win! The player who falls into the lava the most loses the game. You can push your friend. Push your friend and make them fall into the lava. Be very careful! Avoid falling into the lava at all costs. Remember, it’s not just the danger of falling down — you also have to watch out for rocket missiles falling from the cave ceiling.

title: Fruit Jam
description:
Make juice from fresh fruits in this easy and enjoyable Match-3 puzzle game!
Click on the fruit, if the fruit and the cup are the same color, just squeeze it.

title: Billiard Diamond Challenge
description: Billiard Diamond Challenge is a fun and free online billiard game for both kids and adults. Your goal is to sink all the balls into the pockets except for the white ball. While playing, you can collect blue diamonds that allow you to unlock a brand new cue. The game offers both level mode and time mode, so you can choose the challenge that suits you best. Get ready to test your skills and have fun at the billiard table!

title: Farm Business Saga
description: Create the farm you’ve always wanted in Farm Business Saga! ? Plant crops, care for animals, trade products, and grow your farming empire. With beautiful visuals, endless ways to customize, and engaging simulation gameplay, it’s fun for all ages!

title: Code Runner: Binary Confusion
description: A fast-paced binary runner where logic and reflexes collide. Match the rule, dodge the wrong digit — survive the code! .A psychological runner puzzle where every second counts and one rule could change everything.

title: Brainrot Evolution
description: Welcome to the world of meme Italian animals - a dynamic arcade game where you control unique creatures, destroy the environment, gather resources, and unlock new animals. Your goal is to evolve and progress further, unlocking more and more unusual meme beasts. Help yourself with pets: each one provides advantages and strengthens your character. Explore levels, destroy objects, collect useful resources, and unlock the next stage of evolution.

title: AOD - Art Of Defense
description: Step into the world of AOD - Art Of Defense, a free online strategy game where your main goal is to stop enemy waves by placing towers in smart locations. Play on your phone or computer and test your skills in this action-packed defense challenge. Every move matters—can you build the perfect defense?

title: Paint Master
description: Fill the squares to match the sample pattern. Tap the brush to paint a straight line of squares in one move. When your moves reach zero the game is over, so use them carefully to clear the stage!

title: The Road Home: Granny Escape
description: Step into the chilling world of The Road Home: Granny Escape, a horror escape room experience where every shadow hides danger. Solve puzzles, collect items, and find a way out while being relentlessly hunted by Granny and Grandpa. Use stealth, strategy, and courage to survive this terrifying challenge and make your way to freedom.

title: Pop Puzzle
description: Dive into the vibrant world of Pop Puzzle, a colorful block-busting challenge that tests your strategy and quick thinking. Tap on groups of matching blocks to clear the screen and progress through levels filled with satisfying chain reactions. Simple, addictive, and fun for players of all ages.

title: Enchanted Mahjong Saga
description: Enchanted Mahjong Saga is a fast-paced twist on the classic tile-matching game, with unlimited levels to challenge your mind. Match tiles, beat the clock, and keep your streak alive as each level gets tougher and more exciting. Feeling stuck? Use helpful hints to get back on track and stay in the game.Whether youre playing for a quick break or settling in for a longer session, theres always a new puzzle waiting.

title: Thread Match
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Thread Match — a unique and exciting puzzle where you sort colorful threads to complete embroidery patterns. Unravel layers of palettes, carefully working your way down to reveal hidden threads. Use logic and strategy to avoid running out of moves. But be careful — the color palette can be tricky, and every choice matters!

title: Anime Doll - DIY Cosplay Girl
description: Dive into the enchanting world of Anime Doll - DIY Cosplay Girl, where you can live out your fashion dreams and become a master of anime dress-up!

title: From Nerd to Popular Ballerina Cappuccina
description:
From Nerd to Popular: Ballerina Cappuccina is a makeover and dress-up game that follows a sweet transformation story. Ballerina Cappuccina starts as a shy, awkward girl with big dreams—and it’s your job to help her glow up and become the confident ballerina she’s meant to be.

Style her through each stage with fabulous outfits, stylish hairstyles, and elegant accessories. As you dress her up, she slowly sheds her insecurities and gains the charm and confidence needed to shine on stage.

title: Speed Run 3d
description: Race through glowing 3D tunnels in a fast, reflex-based runner. Read the patterns, react in a split second, and thread the gaps as speed ramps up. Simple one-touch controls keep the focus on pure flow while crisp neon visuals make every run feel clean and satisfying.

title: Water Junk Warriors
description: Water Junk Warriors is a vibrant eco-adventure game where players dive into polluted waterways to clean up human-made junk and restore the natural balance of riverbanks, beaches, and urban canals. Armed with clever tools and a passion for nature, players collect floating trash, unlock animated milestones, and witness the environment come back to life, one subgoal at a time.

title: Labubu Jetpack Rush
description: Fly high in Jetpack Jump with Labubu to survive the escape from the lab! Tap to use the jetpack and release to run . Upgrade your jetpack, your running speed and other upgrades to be able to travel further than before and beat your high score. The further you travel the more money you get!

title: LinkLink
description:
Round and cute animal blocks are piled up.
If you connect the same types together, you can get points by disappearing!
Let's compete to see who gets the highest score in a minute

title: Home Run Boy
description:
There is a boy who wants to become a home run king.
He's been practicing his batting and his dream is to hit the ball to the end of the world.
Hit the ball, build up your strength, and hit it farther and farther!

title: Guinea Piggy Matching
description:
Guinea Piggy Match uses well known and easy to learn game mechanics. Your target is to take apart a pattern made of tiles. 
For each completed level, you are given a golden puzzle piece. For these, you can uncover images of cute guinea piggies.

title: Stickman Doors and Island
description:
Open all the criminal's doors and escape from the desert island!
You will have to go through two interesting escape stories.
The first story is about how the criminal kidnapped the character Stick and locked him in the rooms.
The second story is about how the character Stick ended up on an island in the ocean.
Go through all the stories, fight for your life! Break open doors, use various objects. Guess all the puzzles and versions of fate.

title: Wood Color Block
description: Step into the colorful puzzle world of Wood Color Block, where strategy and quick thinking collide. Slide vibrant blocks into place, match them with their crushers, and clear the board before time runs out. With each level, the puzzles grow more challenging, pushing your skills to the limit.

title: Math Duck
description:
You play as a fearless duck who battles enemies not with brute force, but with math smarts.

The rules are simple but addictive:
- Pick from shuffled number cards and combine them to make 10.
- Each correct match becomes your attack to damage enemies.
- Defeat foes, earn XP, and level up your duck!

Every level-up lets you choose from 3 unique upgrades. Each run is different, and your choices shape the way your duck fights.

Sharpen your mind, master the numbers, and guide your duck to victory!

title: Cat Escape
description: Play Cat Escape, the viral cat puzzle hide-and-seek game now free online! Sneak past guards, dodge traps, and guide your kitty to safety across hundreds of stealth levels. Unlock skins, collect coins, and outsmart enemies in this browser cat game loved worldwide. Want the full mobile experience? Discover more at CatEscapeTheGame.com

title: Egg Adventure: Mirror World
description: Mr. Egg accidentally entered the Mirror World. In this world, all the challenges in each level look the same with Egg Adventure 2, but the ways to pass them are different. Use your wisdom to help Mr. Egg bravely pass every level!

title: 21 Cards
description: 21 Cards is a fun and addictive blackjack-style puzzle game where your goal is to reach exactly 21 points in each column. The game combines the thrill of classic card play with a cozy, home-style atmosphere. Place cards wisely, complete columns, and aim for the perfect 21!

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Sort Works: Nuts & Order
description:
Sort Works: Nuts & Order is a fun color-sorting puzzle game where you organize colorful nuts onto matching bolts.

? How to Play:

* Tap a bolt to pick up the top nut.
* Drop it onto a matching color or empty bolt.
* Sort all nuts by color to win!

? Easy to learn, challenging to master, with hundreds of levels and a clean mechanical design—perfect for puzzle fans and casual gamers!

title: Math Obby
description: Combine your math skills with parkour prowess in Math Obby, an engaging Roblox experience that challenges players with arithmetic problems amidst obstacle courses. Navigate through stages that test both your agility and your knowledge of addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Earn badges as you progress and showcase your mastery in this educational adventure.

title: Tropical Match 2
description: Tropical Match is back with its highly anticipated second sequel! Join your island friend Coco for a colorful Match 3 adventure in a lush tropical paradise. Match juicy fruits, vibrant flowers, and clear away algae and clouds across 1,250+ exciting levels. Complete Daily Missions and discover tropical treasures along the way! With relaxing island tunes and gorgeous scenery, this is the perfect summer escape. Dive in and start your tropical adventure today!

title: Katana
description:
It's a first-person Katana game!
Slice all the enemy ninjas into small pieces and save the hostages. Use multiple katana swords and shurikens. Fight epic bosses and complete the levels.

title: Shape Transforming: Shifting Run
description: Get ready to dive into the exhilarating world of Shape Transforming: Shifting Run, where the power of transformation is in your hands! This game is a thrilling journey across diverse terrains, challenging players to adapt, transform, and conquer. If you have a knack for quick thinking and love dynamic gameplay, this is the perfect game for you! ??

title: Giant Crowd io House Capture
description: Come to lead your squad in Giant Crowd io House Capture, a fun .io strategy adventure game. You will expand your power in the city, occupy more houses and become the winner of the city. Grow your crowd by collecting more followers as you explore the city.

title: Idle Pop Merge
description: Get ready for endless fun in Idle Pop Merge! Drag and drop characters into the slots to merge them into stronger versions. The more you merge, the more powerful your team becomes. It's a simple, addictive game that anyone can enjoy—whether you’re on desktop or mobile. Perfect for players who love puzzle challenges with a strategic twist!

title: Skip Love
description: Ready for a funny, brain-teasing love adventure? Play an addictive brain teaser puzzle game in Skip Love. A funny little stickman hero trying to win the heart of his beloved while dodging all sorts of dangers! Each level has unique puzzles that make you think and laugh! Think and use your brain to overcome each challenge, helping the man overcome his sexy wife and lover. For example, help him disguise himself as a clown, disrupt, create chaos, etc.

title: Connect Em All
description: Play Connect Em All Online and Solve Colorful Dot Puzzles. Connect Em All is an exciting and addictive puzzle game that you can enjoy for free right in your browser. The goal is simple yet surprisingly challenging: connect all the dots of the same color to complete each level. It sounds easy at first, but as the puzzles grow in size and complexity, you will need clever thinking and careful planning to succeed.

title: Math Box Balance
description: Math Box Balance is a puzzle game with numbers. Early levels have 2 boxes, and as you progress you can reach up to 8 boxes. Each box contains 4 number blocks, and the sum of these numbers is shown inside the box. Your goal is to make the sum of all boxes equal. You can swap number blocks between boxes to achieve the equal sum. It is an endless game where the difficulty increases over time, your score goes up, and the fun grows with it.

title: Block Breaker
description: Embark on a 2D adventure filled with dynamic physics! Break ice blocks, use springs and portals, and launch the character through the air to reach the goal platform. Master the environment and discover all the creative ways to complete each level!"

title: Italian Brainrot Bomb - 2Player
description: The dynamite bomb is left in the space hangar. Whoever has it when the time runs out wins the game, because the bomb will explode. Take the bomb from your opponent before the time runs out. When the time ends, the player holding the bomb wins. Grab the bomb to win the game. Be very careful — take the bomb and run, and never let the other player have it.

title: My horse is amazing
description:
Ride a horse and overcome obstacles: fences, pits and water obstacles. Control the jumps — tap and release to jump accurately.

Collect powerups with powerups — increase attack and health. The further you run, the stronger your horse becomes!

Your steed is growing: it's getting faster and more powerful. Upgrade it and keep running. At the end of each level is a boss battle! Show what you are capable of!

title: MeatRider
description: Welcome to "MeatRider" — an intense action-packed game set in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by zombies. You find yourself right in the middle of the chaos, where your only goal is to survive at all costs. Choose one of the unique combat vehicles, each with its own special abilities and weapons, and get ready for dynamic battles across a zombie-infested desert landscape.

title: Perfect Job Run
description: Run your way to the perfect job. In the Perfect Job Run, you'll run the platform of the workplace. Facing various challenges, selecting the right career path and becoming a winner in the workplace. There will be different career tests along the way. Quickly select tools to accomplish tasks.

title: Sneaker Factory!
description: Manage your own sneaker factory in this fast-paced online game! Complete orders, organize sneakers, deliver shipments, and rise through the ranks. Put your speed, strategy, and management skills to the test to become the city’s leading factory!

title: Horror School Detective Story
