description: Ready to enter a horror school full of scares and mysteries? In Horror School: Detective Story, you’ll play the role of a brave detective. Solve the mysteries layered on top of each other at the school. Each scene is tense and exciting, full of suspense and the unknown! Choose the complexity of the scenario to start your challenge.

title: Tarcat
description:
Enter the world of feline destruction with Tarcat, a hilarious casual game where you control a cats paw! Your goal? Smash all targets with quick reflexes and pinpoint accuracy!

With just one tap, hit targets, avoid traps, and dominate each level with the style of a true feline destroyer.

title: Komaru cat
description:
Take care of Komaru the cat! Pet her, feed her, bathe her, and tuck her in for sleep!
Dress her up in stylish looks! Hats, glasses, collars, new fur colors, and more! Experiment and create your own unique cat!
Play the merge mini-game, compete on the leaderboard, and earn coins!
Watch the best video memes with funny moments from her life!
Complete the daily challenges and come back tomorrow, Komaru will miss you!
Try to unlock all achievements! Come and have fun!

title: Draw To Crush : Monster Game
description: Play the thrilling "Draw To Crush: Monster game" . Use your artistic talent to defeat evil creatures. sketch and destroy the monster and save animals and the good clown at the same time is your task, you have to draw the line that changes into a three-dimensional weapon to blast the monster.

title: Sand Blast - Block Game
description:
Welcome to Sand Blast, a fresh and relaxing twist on classic block puzzle games!
Relax your mind with Sand Blast — a satisfying and strategic puzzle game built around flowing sand mechanics.
Whether you're into relaxing brain games, casual offline fun, or smart logic challenges, Sand Blast delivers a fresh experience you can enjoy anytime, anywhere — no WiFi or internet required.

title: Ultra Realistic BlockCraft
description: Help Steve in the ultra-realistic block world and make sure he reaches the portal. Remember, this realistic world is extremely challenging and monsters are roaming everywhere. You must collect all the diamonds. While collecting diamonds, don’t forget to open the chests you find along the way. Open the chests and crush all the monsters. Reach the portal at the end of the level safely to complete the stage. Remember, you only have one life and if it runs out you will lose everything you’ve earned.

title: Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes
description:
Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes is an exciting game in which the player has to become a real wrecking racer.

There are many unique cars available in the game, each of which has its own characteristics and capabilities. From classic sports cars to massive monster trucks, you will have complete freedom to choose the vehicle for your crazy adventures.

title: Magic Princess Dress Up Doll
description: Welcome to Magic Princess Dress Up Doll, a casual dress-up game for girl gamers. Have you ever dreamed of becoming a beautiful princess one day? Are you an enthusiast of dressing up fashion dolls? Come join us and realize all your imaginations about fashion design! This is a fashion design game where you can make up your own doll from scratch.

title: Labubu And Me
description: Play this fun game for girls where you style your own Labubu monster and yourself! Customize Labubu with fur colors, eyes, tops, stickers, and accessories. Then, match your makeup and outfits to create the ultimate twin look. From trendy dresses and cute bags to stylish hairstyles, show off your fashion skills and creativity. Perfect for fans of Labubu games and makeover fun!

title: Cosmic Dash
description: Jump into Cosmic Dash – an endless space runner full of speed and challenges! Dodge debris, break through asteroids, and gather tokens as you race across the solar system. Use boosts, shrinks, and jumps to chase high scores and experience thrilling interplanetary action!

title: Fire snake
description: Help the fire snake slither safely home! Dodge dangerous obstacles, collect shiny coins, and master tricky levels. Can you guide the snake through every challenge? Play now and test your skills!

title: Satisdom
description: Step into the calm and quirky world of Satisdom — a game where every little task feels oddly satisfying. Whether you're dragging, tapping, sorting or matching, each level is a chance to relax and have fun. Designed to run smoothly on both phones and computers, Satisdom is the perfect escape for anyone who loves simple pleasures and playful puzzles. Slow down, enjoy the details, and let yourself get lost in the fun.

title: Bubble Around
description: Bubble Around is bubble shooter with a twist. You shoot the bubbles from the inside to the playing field around you. Match 3 or more bubbles to make them pop. Clear all bubbles to complete the level. Each level will be slightly more challenging. Stuck in a level? Use the bomb, rocket or multi color power up. Find out all level shapes!

title: Squid Game Hunter
description: Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game – a fast-paced game for stealthy and strategic players that takes you on a wild adventure as a hunter with a deadly knife. With multiple Squid games enemies to kill, challenging missions to complete, and rewards to collect, this game will test your skills and keep you on the edge of your seat.

title: Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up
description: In Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up, you get to explore a vibrant underwater world where two playful dolphins are ready to get glammed up! This charming dress-up game lets you choose outfits, accessories, and fun props to create a stylish underwater look for both dolphins.

title: Catch Thief
description: Catch Thief is an addictive puzzle game where you must outsmart a clever thief and stop his escape. Take control of the police, block every possible path and drive the criminal into a dead end. With each new level the challenge grows, requiring you to plan ahead, think strategically and act quickly. Bright cartoon graphics, fun scenarios and increasing difficulty make Catch Thief a perfect choice for fans of logic games who enjoy testing their skills, attention and reaction speed.

title: DOP: Draw One Part
description:
► Can you see what’s missing? 

What a pretty picture, but don’t you get the nagging feeling that something’s not quite right? What’s the final touch that will make the image complete? 

Engage your brain, your imagination and your artistic talents to identify the missing element and add it to the drawing in this delightful puzzle game that will get you thinking and make you smile time and time again.

title: Manyunya Saving the Princess
description: Welcome to the time when there were knights, magic, farmers, princesses, and generals. Manyunya sets off at the request of the Supreme Lord to save his princess. On the way you will find a whole dangerous adventure, you will come across colorful views, and characters with whom you can communicate and interact, as well as enemies that you will need to defeat at any cost, and save the princess, and complete the task. Interesting voice acting and story will immerse you in this world with your head!

title: Animal Royal
description:
"The ultimate player versus player game allows players to engage in battles against their opponents using unique animals."
You'll be challenged to use your wits and strategy to outsmart your opponents and emerge victorious.
Animal Royal is a game that features a wide variety of animals and birds, each with its unique strengths and weaknesses.
Your goal is to protect your meat from being eaten by your opponent's animals while sending your animals to eat as much meat as possible to win the battle.

title: Eastern Star vs City Style Icon
description: Welcome to the world of style, where the ancient palaces of the East meet the splendor of a modern metropolis! Two beautiful heroines are waiting for you in the game: an oriental beauty with exquisite outfits in the style of an Ottoman fairy tale and a stylish urban fashionista conquering the catwalks of the metropolis. During the game, you will become a fashion stylist and create unique looks for each of the girls. Choose your side in the cultural dispute and make this choice a reality!

title: Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam
description:
Slide the blocks, beat the clock, and master the puzzle jam!

Block Puzzle Slide: Block Jam – Slide, Match, and Clear the Grid!

Get ready to train your brain in the most colorful way possible! In Block Puzzle Slide: Block Jam, your goal is simple but oh-so-addictive—slide the colorful blocks to their matching exits and clear the board before time runs out.

title: Dream Pet Hotel
description: Dream Pet Hotel is a charming connect puzzle game with an engaging hotel meta. Match tiles to clear levels, earn rewards, and unlock cozy rooms. Decorate and furnish spaces to create a unique style, then welcome adorable pets to stay in your hotel. Watch your collection grow as you design the perfect home for cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Relaxing, addictive, and fun to play online — build your dream pet hotel today!

title: Charger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle car through an expansive night city map! Customize and upgrade your muscle car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 4 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Monster Escape
description: Monster Escape is a thrilling puzzle platformer where you rotate the entire level to help a little green monster grab the key and escape the dark dungeon. Each stage is packed with tricky obstacles — spikes, falling crates, and narrow passages that put your timing and planning skills to the test. The unique mechanic — rotate the world, find the path, unlock the door — creates plenty of satisfying moments as you advance.

title: Princess Run 3D
description: Want a magical and exciting running adventure? Step into Princess Run 3D, a fun 3D platform arcade game full of exciting challenges. Play as a fearless princess racing through colorful 3D worlds. Collect beautiful clothes, shoes, hair, etc. Increase your charisma to get a maid of honor. They're going to help you fend off enemies in front of you or dirty mud, rain, etc. Be careful to avoid ugly clothes, costumes, bad weather, etc.

title: Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy
description: Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy is a fast-paced action game where you take out your frustration on a relentless, annoying dummy. With quick reflexes and nonstop punches, you’ll unleash a flurry of blows in simple, satisfying bursts. Stay sharp, keep hitting, and enjoy every moment of chaotic stress relief wrapped in hilarious impact.

title: Mahjong 3D Match
description: Welcome to the 3D Mahjong adventure! Challenge your mind with speed and precision. Plan your moves, view the board from all angles and remove pieces intelligently. Beat increasingly difficult levels, play offline and relax with immersive music.

title: Bubble Shooter Neon
description: Bubble Shooter Neon brings vibrant neon colors and exciting bubble-popping action! Match and pop glowing bubbles before they reach the bottom—new rows appear every 15 seconds, so stay focused! With sleek, modern visuals and fast-paced gameplay, it’s perfect for bubble shooter fans and casual players alike. Sharpen your aim, beat the clock, and enjoy the glowing thrill of Bubble Shooter Neon!

title: Dan the Man
description: With a cracking funny story, action, an awesome upgradeable fighting skills and an epic arsenal of weapons that will make even the most heroic of heroes envious, Dan The Man's arcade fight fest has enough enemies and boss fights to satisfy every hardcore Action Platformer enthusiast and every indie game lover.

title: Wood Blocks Jam
description:
Wood Blocks Jam is a relaxing logic puzzle game with colorful wooden blocks. Your goal is to drag each block into a gate of the same color. No time limits — just calm, thoughtful gameplay.

Enjoy thousands of handcrafted levels with increasing difficulty and new mechanics to discover.

title: Dudu Engineering Truck
description: DuDu Engineering Truck is a casual and puzzle game where you drive engineering trucks to finish tasks on the worksite. Use your sensitivity to shapes to construct a truck and conquer all challenges ahead. If you love car designing and car games, never miss DuDu Engineering Truck! You will enjoy an adventurous journey of being an engineer.

title: Word of Fortune
description:
Guess the hidden 5-letter word, solving the clue and using spins of the letter wheel to get hints! You get 3 spins to reveal letters and 2 guesses to solve it. Win and earn your title, or miss, and you’re out! Each day brings a new puzzle, plus extra themed levels to explore.
This game is great for players of all ages, and it's a fun way to spend time and test vocabulary and mental abilities!

title: Stick Rope Hero
description: Are you ready to become a super stickman hero? In Stick Rope Hero, you enter an exciting sandbox world filled with adventures and challenges. Swing around the open city with your powerful rope skills and completing many action tasks.

title: Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle
description: Ready to challenge your mind and intelligence in the Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle. This casual 3D Screw Puzzle game will take you into a world of creativity and puzzle solving fun. Here you need to match the screws of the same color and move them to the correct box. You sort screws by their colors. Keep moving the model to find the corresponding color.

title: Tung Tung Sahur in Geometry Dash
description: Join Tung Tung Sahur, the wooden drum-carrying dawn caller, as he bounces and flips through a neon cityscape just before sunrise! Dodge spikes, leap over traps, and time your jumps to the beat of his signature “tung-tung!” calls. In this Geometry Dash–inspired challenge, the streets are alive with glowing gates, speed pads, and tricky gravity flips. Can you drum your way to the end without missing a beat?

title: Fusion 2048
description: Fusion 2048 is an addictive puzzle game where you combine matching numbered blocks to reach higher values and aim for the elusive 2048 block. Play in Classic or Shape Mode, plan your moves to avoid filling the container, and use TNT blocks to clear space. With clean visuals, smooth controls, and score tracking, it’s perfect for quick sessions or long strategic runs—easy to pick up, hard to master.

title: Balloon Pop Frenzy
description:
Balloon Pop Frenzy is a fun and fast-paced tap game where you pop balloons for points!
Tap normal and gold balloons to score, but avoid the tricky skull balloons!
With vibrant visuals, increasing difficulty, and simple controls, it's perfect for quick, casual play on any device.

title: Wire Connect
description:
Captivating puzzle game where your task is to connect electrical devices to power outlets by drawing conductive paths. But be careful — electricity will flow along your lines, and if it touches water or bystanders, it will cause a short circuit!

Your goal is to find a safe route, avoid all hazards, and complete the level successfully.
Each new puzzle demands focus, logic, and precision. As you progress, the challenges become more complex, with more obstacles, devices, and tricky scenarios.

title: Moscow Metro Driver 3D
Gun Match Screw
description: a unique level-based puzzle game that combines screw puzzles with exciting gun-themed mechanics. In this game, each level presents you with a board shaped like different guns or gun parts, and your goal is to unlock all the boards by matching colored screws, which are represented as bullets.

title: Dr. Parking
description: Ready to test your parking skills? Welcome to Dr. Parking - the super addictive car simulation game designed for all the boys who love a true driving challenge. In the game, you will drive various types of vehicles. Traverse the obstacle-laden parking lot and change corners and park your car precisely in the designated spot. And keep an eye out for keys. Each level is a test of your precision, patience, and driving instinct.

title: Princess Dress Up Run
description: Run, collect, and dress up like a true princess. Race around the fantasy track. Collect all kinds of gorgeous princess dresses, shoes and accessories along the way according to the goal. Create the perfect princess look. And watch out for obstacles and traps, such as suddenly broken platforms, flames, etc.

title: Apple Worm
description: Play Apple Worm now. This is a classic puzzle game with simple operation. Brain-burning levels make you love it! Control a cute little worm whose goal is to eat the apple and upgrade. Upgrading allows you to unlock more cute skins. You can also earn rewards by completing challenges. Unlock Auto ATK, Summoning, etc. Enter the snakey mode. Control your worm and eat the apples. Go through the obstacles and enter the portal without any problems!

title: That's My Seat Logic Puzzle
description: Who took my seat? Welcome to the brain-teasing logic puzzle game - That’s My Seat - Logic Puzzle. In this fun and casual game, your mission is to help each quirky character find their perfect seat. Some want to sit by the window, others hate noise, and some need distance from others. Your job is to match everyone’s preferences and place them just right! Each level is a unique puzzle that requires smart seating arrangements.

title: Kick Loser
description:
Dive into the world of Kick Loser, a puzzle game that challenges your creativity and problem-solving skills. The objective is simple—inflict maximum damage on the stickman hero using a variety of objects. Each object has unique properties, adding a strategic element to your gameplay.
Take aim and deliver powerful drags to send the stickman crashing into objects. Experiment with different angles and forces to achieve the most satisfying results.

title: Medieval Escape
description: Medieval escape is a adventure escape game where you must search for useful items in the rooms to help you escape. Look carefully around the rooms, and use your logic to solve the riddles. Find your way to escape!

title: Stickman Mega Boss: Battles!
description: Battle hordes of Minecraft mobs! Buy awesome swords and helmets, or unbox them from cases. Take on mega-bosses, unlock different modes, and earn leaderboard points to become the best in this game!

title: Brainrot-A Difference Challenge
description: Put your observation skills to the test in Brainrot – A Difference Challenge, the ultimate photo puzzle game! Spot subtle differences between two eerily similar Italian "brainrot" images across a series of mind-bending levels. Each pair of pictures will challenge your focus, attention to detail, and visual memory. Can you find them all before time runs out?

title: Sudoku Relax
description: Sudoku Relax is a fresh take on the world-famous sudoku puzzle that you can enjoy anytime and anywhere. This free sudoku game keeps the classic rules but adds a clean, colorful design and smooth controls, making it ideal for both beginners and seasoned puzzle lovers. Simply fill the grid with numbers from 1 to 9 without repeating them in any row, column, or 3×3 square. Train your brain, challenge yourself, and enjoy one of the most beloved logic games in the world with Sudoku Relax!

title: Kids Supermarket
description: Welcome to Kids Supermarket, a casual supermarket simulation game for kids. Have you ever gone shopping alone? Feel confused about finding goods among a large number of products? Join Kids Supermarket to elevate your observation and categorization skills. Our diverse and clearly aligned products will make you feel like shopping in a real-life supermarket. Pick up your shopping basket and start your journey in the supermarket.

title: Digital Aqua
description:
Digital Aqua is a digital aquarium designed for PC Browser.
Explore the vibrant world of aquariums, where colorful tropical fish and stunning underwater landscapes come to life.
Transform your Monitor into a serene and enchanting aquarium that fills your living room with comfort and wonder.

title: Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon
description: Get spooky and stylish in Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon, where gothic meets glam in a 3-level makeover game. Treat Wednesday to a facial, apply stunning dark-themed makeup, and finish off with iconic dress-up fashion in her unique style. From skincare to eyeliner, you control every detail of her transformation. Whether you’re a fan of the Addams aesthetic or just love alternative beauty, this salon experience offers a complete glow-up from head to toe.

title: Pinball Basketball
description: A captivating fusion of classic arcade pinball excitement and thrilling sports gameplay. Flip your paddle skillfully to keep the ball in play, aiming for the basketball hoop while enjoying the stunning minimalist art and responsive design that make every moment electrifying and addictive.

title: Vex Hyper Dash
description:
Get ready for a fast-paced challenge in this brand-new Vex spin-off: Vex Hyper Dash! Inspired by the legendary Geometry Dash. Your goal is simple: survive as long as possible. Jump from platform to platform, time your moves perfectly, and avoid the countless dangers that stand in your way. One wrong move, one mistimed jump, and it’s game over. 

Vex Hyper Dash puts your reflexes and precision to the ultimate test. Can you master the flow and set a new high score?

title: DIY Phone Case Shop
description: Welcome to Case Craft, a fun and creative game where you'll design and decorate phone cases to impress clients! Run your own phone case shop, attract customers, and fulfill their unique requests. Customize phone cases with various designs, patterns, and themes, and decorate your shop with attractive items to draw in customers. As you meet client demands, earn rewards and upgrade your shop to become the top phone case designer!

title: Space Survival Rainbow Friends Monster
description: Begin a fun battle like never before in Space Survival - Rainbow Friends Monster! You’re in a mysterious space station overrun by terrifying rainbow monsters. Your task is to escape and rescue your friends. Use your gun to begin the battle. Avoid enemy attacks and unleash shooting combos against waves of enemies.

title: Auto Ninja
description:
Auto Ninja is the ultimate ninja platform game that dares you to conquer 41 trap-filled chambers with sharp reflexes and puzzle-solving skills. 

Your mission? Steal all three coins hidden in each chamber to unlock exclusive ninja skins and show off your mastery.

With simple but tight controls, dynamic level design, and a steady ramp in difficulty, Auto Ninja delivers an intense, addictive experience that tests your agility, timing, and wit. Play now and rise to the challenge!

title: Italian Brainrot Bike Rush
description: Hop on for chaotic fun in Italian Brainrot Bike Rush, a meme-filled obby bike platformer. Pick from 5 absurd meme legends and ride through floating platforms, deadly traps, and wild jumps. Play 5 levels across 3 modes—Normal, Challenge, and One Life. Collect coins, unlock checkpoints, and conquer brainrot chaos. Perfect for fans of meme-based bike racing and Italian brainrot platformers!

title: Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve
description: Embark on a Brain-Twisting Journey with Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve, an exceptional wood puzzle game about nuts and bolts to test your IQ brain power. For nuts and bolts lovers who likes challenge and innovative gameplay, the right game for you - the ultimate puzzle game - is here.

title: Soccer Arena X
description: Soccer Arena X is an exciting football game that delivers dynamic matches, simple controls, and colorful arcade gameplay. Every match is fast, fun, and full of energy, giving you the ultimate multiplayer football experience. As you progress, you’ll collect coins and gems to unlock powerful abilities like freeze, lightning, super kick, or a giant head, adding a bright and entertaining arcade style to the gameplay. Step onto the pitch, score goals, and become a football star!

title: Wordling: Daily Word Challenge
description: Wordling is a fun, free daily word puzzle game where you guess the hidden word in 6 tries using color-coded clues. Perfect for adults and seniors who love brain games, spelling challenges, and relaxing, ad-free gameplay. Explore all game modes!

title: Shanghai Chef
description:
A fun and fast-paced matching game where you need to find and connect the same blocks! 
Test your reflexes and observation skills as you quickly spot matching pairs. 
Can your hands move faster than your eyes can track? 
Pay close attention to which blocks can be linked together and clear the board as fast as possible!

title: Brainrot Boing Boing Merge
description:
Welcome to Brainrot Boing Boing Merge – a charming merge puzzle game where adorable creatures meet polished gameplay and juicy physics!

Merge. Match. Maximize
Satisfying Effects & Lively Details
Unlockable Skins System
Relaxing Yet Strategic

If you love satisfying merges, juicy feedback, and charming characters, this game is for you. Play now and see what creature you’ll create next!

title: Math Crossword Puzzle - Genius Edition
description: Challenge your brain with Math Crossword, the perfect mix of logic puzzles and number games! Solve clever math equations in a crossword-style grid by placing the correct numbers into the right spots. Each level sharpens your brain with fun and rewarding challenges that test your addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division skills.

title: Neon Blast
description: Upgrade your defense cannons by merging them!Watch as your cannons level up and become powerful defenders, and get exciting new powers to crush bosses and attackers!

title: Scary Teacher 3D Returns
description:
Start with the size of a board. A faint sound echoes through the hallway. You freeze, the heart is beating, and the house seems to breathe with you. You are inside the mansion of the old teacher once again.

In the 3D fear teacher, every shadow, every echo matters. Your goal is not to escape; it is mischief. But make an error, and you will become its next goal.

title: Draw Bridge: Brain Game
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle - Draw Game is an exciting and challenging brain game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test. In this bridge-building adventure, your task is to draw paths for the car to safely navigate through obstacles and reach its destination. Get ready to embark on a thrilling journey of bridge construction and puzzle-solving as you draw roads to rescue the stranded car!

title: Toy Match 3
description: Toy Match 3 is the third sequel to one of our cutest Match 3 puzzle games! Get ready for colorful graphics, fun animations, and a catchy soundtrack. Match adorable toys in over 4,100+ exciting levels and take on Daily Missions and Weekly Challenges! Embark on thrilling quests like the Treasure Hunt for amazing rewards. With tons of extras and surprises, Toy Match 3 is pure puzzle fun. Start playing now for free!

title: Obby Escape: Prison Rat Dance
description: Obby Escape: Prison Rat Dance is an exhilarating adventure game that merges the thrill of intricate prison escape challenges with the dynamic agility required in parkour. Assume the role of a resourceful rat striving to escape the strict surveillance of a heavily fortified prison. Find your way through elaborate mazes and overcome diverse, challenging obstacles as you plot your daring prison escape.

title: Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY
description: ? Welcome to Paper Doll Diary: Doll DressUp, where the timeless charm of DIY paper dolls meets the exhilarating world of fashion dress up! Step into a realm of creativity and style where you become the master stylist of your enchanting paper doll dress up. With an expansive wardrobe featuring over 1000 fashion items, including the latest in trendy attire, distinctive accessories, diverse hairstyles, and soothing ASMR makeup touches, your creative potential is limitless.

title: Food Sort 3D
description:
In this game, you manage your own food court, sorting various food items into their respective categories. You'll encounter different eateries, from fast-food joints to upscale restaurants, each requiring you to sort items like burgers,
sushi, hotdog, fries, pizza and desserts. The game features colorful graphics and quick, satisfying levels that keep you engaged as you expand your food

title: LOGic Slide
description:
Get ready for some beaver fun in LOGic Slide – the cutest puzzle in the forest!
Meet two friendly beavers who love playing with wood. They need your help to slide the logs and make one big river-wide log . 
It might look easy, but you’ll need to think and figure out where each log should go!

Let’s slide some logs together with the beavers – start playing right away! ?✨

title: Color Dash
description: Color Dash is a fast-paced endless runner that tests your reflexes and color matching skill! Pilot a speeding rocket and match its color to smash through colored gates. Dodge the wrong colors and react to frantic color changes to keep your run alive. Grab powerful shield and nitro power-ups to blast further and beat your personal best score in this addictive arcade adventure. How high can you score?

title: Mahjong Stack
description: Mahjong Stack is a unique tile-matching game featuring realistic 3D mahjong tiles. Unlike classic match-3, blocks appear in stacked piles. Match identical tiles and drag groups of three to the tray to clear. Use boosters to speed up progress. Dive in and enjoy!

title: Squad Assembler
description:
Assemble a cool squad and see who wins!
Combine items to improve the fighters' equipment! Combine weapons and armor, buy loot boxes with new weapons!
You can create cool, unique characters, each of which will have certain skills! Buy parts for your fighters, change their arms, torso, head! Create real cyborgs to defeat the enemy! Merge armor and weapons, increase the levels and characteristics of items. Hire cool heroes who will help you in tough battles.

title: Foam and Find
description: Foam and Find is a relaxing hidden object game with a playful bubble twist. Explore cozy houses, each filled with charming rooms and easy-to-spot hidden items. Your tasks appear inside floating bubbles — and when you find an item, it flies into its bubble and pops with a satisfying animation. No timers, no stress — just a calm, casual experience at your own pace.

title: Number Master Run And Merge
description: Number Master: Run And Merge is an awesome number racing game that lets you run, merge, and upgrade on a parkour platform to become a true number master! Control your number character as you run through dynamic tracks. Keep collecting more numbers and expanding. Merge with matching numbers to grow stronger. The bigger your number, the more unstoppable you become! Pick the smartest paths, hit speed zones, and keep your speed maxed out!

title: Paint Tiles Puzzle
description: Welcome to Paint Tiles Puzzle, where creativity meets logic in a colorful puzzle adventure! This is a relaxing puzzle game that combines drawing and puzzle-solving elements. Each level presents a tile grid and your task is to fill the empty spaces with the right colors.

title: Mr Reckless: Car Chase Simulator
description:
Run fast, crash hard, and cheat death — in style.

Race through a chaotic low-poly city as you dodge police, traffic, and total destruction. Use game-changing power-ups like Slow-Mo, Freeze, Nitro to escape the impossible.

One rule: don’t stop. How long can you stay free?

title: Puzzle Games: Outing Day
description: Welcome to Puzzle Game: Outing Day, a casual puzzle game online. Today is the day for an outing. What will happen with all the little animals? What activities will they have on their trip to the field? Come and explore the interesting things on the camp and solve puzzles with your animal partners. See if you are the cleverest child in the crowd!

title: Sprunki Quiz
description:
Sprunki Quiz is a wild and wacky guessing game where you match weird names to even weirder Sprunki characters!
Can you tell who’s who between Simon, Oren, Pinky, Raddy, and the rest of the crew?
Play in two chaotic modes:
Guess the Name  – See the name, pick the right picture!
Guess the Image – Look at the picture, choose the right name!
It’s fast, funny, and full of Sprunki madness.
Warning: extreme brainrot vibes ahead. Ready to Sprunk?

title: Alchemy Puzzle
description:
We create challenges with fun puzzles, challenge your brain and make you always smile on your lips.
Alchemy Puzzle will help you have moments of light entertainment, combined with puzzle play and fun real life characters.
If you've ever played games: puzzlers, word games, trivia games, quiz games, brain teasers, or just want to spend time have time to relax, let try Alchemy Puzzle, It's for you.

title: PuzzleJam
description:
Puzzle Jam is a bright and fun puzzle game where you merge jellies of the same color to clear the board and complete each level!
Easy controls and smooth gameplay make it accessible for players of all ages . Each level brings a new challenge – find the smartest moves, use boosters, and unlock powerful combos!

title: Move the rubber bands: Logic puzzle
description:
In this game you need to put the rubber bands in their places.
At the start of the level, rubber bands are scattered across the field. Your task is to move the cutters along the pins and place the cutters on the platforms of the corresponding color.
Your task is to solve logic puzzles. It won't always be easy to come up with a solution. Sometimes you will need to strain your logic and ability to navigate in space.

title: Grandma's Last Stand
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones. But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka. Help Granny get home, roast them all!

INSTRUCTIONS

title: Sprunki Link
description:
Sprunki Link – the wildest Sprunki-fueled tile puzzle!
Find and connect matching tiles featuring your favorite chaotic Sprunki characters.
Test your focus and logic across 15 levels of pure unhinged madness.
Can you collect all 45 stars, or will the Sprunki win?
It’s fast, it’s silly, it’s dangerously addictive – Sprunki-style!

title: Labubu Coloring Adventure
description: Labubu Coloring Adventure is a splashy journey into a world full of color, fun, and furry mischief!. Grab your digital crayons and bring Labubu and friends to life with every stroke!. From goofy grins to magical backgrounds, every page is a new surprise! Explore, color, giggle, and create your own cartoon adventure with Labubu!. It’s not just coloring: it’s a giggle-filled adventure waiting at every tap!

title: Merry Christmas Connect
description: 《Cute Animal Connect》is a classic puzzle game where you connect identical patterns to eliminate them and score points. It tests your observation skills and reaction speed, with simple yet addictive gameplay that appeals to players of all ages.

title: Zoo Anomaly Simulation
description: Experience a zoo mutation crisis like no other. In Zoo Anomaly Simulation, a peaceful zoo has turned into a nightmare filled with mutated animals, and you’re the only one who can stop the chaos! Enter a first-person shooting experience like no other. Explore the eerie zoo environment, grab your weapons, and fight back against giraffes, zebras, elephants, etc.

title: Color Dodge
description:
Color Dodge is a fast-paced, addictive color-matching arcade game where reflexes and precision are your only hope!

Control a glowing circle and survive as colorful walls charge toward you from all directions. Here's the twist — you must collide only with the wall segment that matches your color, or you explode in a juicy blast!

Whether you're chasing high scores or just vibing with neon chaos, Color Dodge delivers bite-sized action with a splash of style.

title: Match Factory
description: Welcome to Match Factory - the most relaxing and non-stop casual triple puzzle game. Step into a vibrant factory full of colorful items, and play the role of a master matcher. Match three identical items to clear them from the board, pack them up, and keep the factory running smoothly! Every level is uniquely designed with tricky layouts and challenges. Use power-ups that help you overcome difficult puzzles!

title: CloneUp - Stack Yourself
description:
CloneUp – Stack Yourself is a 2D pixel-art platformer where your greatest tool is… yourself!

Create clones, stack them, and use them as platforms to dodge spikes, reach new heights, and make your way to the exit door.

In CloneUp – Stack Yourself, you’ll use copies of the main character to reach platforms and avoid deadly obstacles.

title: Duck Luck
description:
Guide a lovable duck and his humorous friend and drop numbered blocks that merge when identical numbers come into contact, creating larger numbers that help clear the board. 
As you strategize and match numbers, you'll earn points. 
The goal is to accumulate the highest score possible by making as big of a number as you can.

title: Draw Climb Race - The Ultimate Hill Climbing Challenge
description: In Draw Climb Race, you draw shapes to climb hills! Any drawing you make will help you climb up steep hills and tricky paths. If you get stuck, just draw a new shape to keep going. Have fun and test your skills in this easy-to-play, addictive game!

title: Merge 3D - Match 3 Balloons
description: Your goal is to help the house, floating in the sky on a variety of colorful balloons of different shapes, to land on the ground. Clicking on the balls, you move them to the cells at the bottom of the screen. Collect three identical ball objects in a row to make them disappear, freeing up space and bringing the house closer to the ground. Grandpa is sitting on the roof, and when the house finally lands, he will be happy to celebrate the victory!

title: CS: Command Snipers
description: "CS: Command Snipers" is an exciting online game where players take on the role of elite snipers who carry out challenging missions in various combat environments. The game combines elements of tactics, precision and teamwork, providing a unique experience for fans of shooters and strategies.

title: CrazyZombies 3D
description:
Crazy Zombies 3D is a fast-paced top-down zombie survival shooter with cartoon-style 3D graphics. Use 10+ weapons to fight endless waves of zombies, conquer a town map, and unlock powerful upgrades. Battle 5 zombie types and 4 deadly bosses with unique abilities. Customize your loadout and survive as long as you can. Fun, intense, and addictive—can you survive the apocalypse?

?- Zombie Survival
?- 10+ Weapons to Master
?️- Conquer the Town
?- Boss Battles
?- Fun, Fast & Addictive

title: Match Collection
description: Collect 3 of the same items from the shelf to erase them. When a shelf is empty, the shelf above it falls down. You can have up to 7 items, and when your hand is full, the game is over. When all items are erased, the stage is cleared.

title: DuaLight - A Reflected Game
description:
DuaLight is a challenging 2D pixel art hyper-casual platformer. The true path lies in the reflection. 

Navigate levels where the real world tricks your eyes, and only those who watch the reflection below can move forward. Minimalist and short.

In DuaLight – A Reflected Game, nothing is as it seems… or rather, everything only appears in the reflection. You control a character in a world where invisible platforms can’t be seen in the real world, but only in the reflection below the screen.

title: Sprunki Monster Music Beats
description: Sprunki Monster Music Beats is a music game where popular characters create unique compositions. Combine sounds, create melodies, and enjoy!

title: Childcare Master Online
description: Get ready to become a parenting superstar in Childcare Master Online! This wonderful casual simulation game is all about playing the role of a top parenting expert. As soon as you start the game, you'll find yourself in a lively daycare center with adorable kids. What's your mission? Give them love and care! First, you need to create a warm environment.

title: Match-3: Dream Room
description: Assemble the dream room and show your friends how to transform the space with clever combos! Join Match-3: Dream Room and create your dream room by solving puzzles and enjoying the exciting process of furnishing!

title: Worms
description: Worms is a fun and addictive arcade puzzle where you control a cute worm and guide it through winding labyrinths. Your task is to lead the worm through the entire maze, collect rewards, use portals and avoid dead ends. Bright cartoon-style graphics and easy controls make the game perfect for both kids and adults. Worms combines fast arcade action with puzzle-solving logic, turning every new level into a fresh and exciting challenge.

title: Zombie Survival
description: Play the nervous zombie adventure in Zombie Survival. Explore a dangerous world occupied by zombies. Collect various weapons to attack zombies. Move smartly and set traps to defend yourself from massive zombie waves. Explore abandoned cities, dark alleys, and creepy forests - each level is a new adventure! Challenge big zombie bosses and prove your survival skills under pressure! Collect many useful items to fix your broken tools.

title: Traffic Cop 3D
description: Traffic Cop 3D is a casual game where you play as a police officer enforcing the law of the road. Scan nearby drivers and use intel from the police database to decide whether you should pull them over, or let them go, all while progressing through the story and increasing your duties as a cop.

title: Draw Climber
description:
Funniest race you ever played ! Draw your legs to win the race!
Any drawing will make you run !
When you are stuck you can draw another shape to pass!

title: Sniper Team 3
description:
Take down waves of enemies using powerful sniper rifles in this action packed shooting game.

Sniper Team 3 is a sniper shooting game where you have to defeat enemy forces with the fire power of your whole team. The missions are a true challenge even for veteran snipers. 

Switch between your team members in real time, and make good use of your scoped rifles, heavy assault weapons and tactical airstrikes.

title: PIZZA PUZZLE
description: Match the same pieces to complete the whole. If you are next to the same piece, the pieces will come together. Game over when there is no place to put pizza.

title: Street Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning street cars with modified body kits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Street Traffic Racer

title: Card Master
description: Card Master is a fun and addictive puzzle game for all ages! Strategically merge identical cards to create stronger, higher-level ones while keeping the board from filling up. Use special cards and powerful boosts to clear space and score big. With its mix of strategy, challenge, and endless replay value, it’s the perfect game for anyone who loves to think ahead and have fun.

title: Geometry Platformer
description: Geometry Platformer is a fast-paced, reflex-testing platformer where players guide a shape-shifting cube through a series of dangerous geometric obstacles. The game features sharp spikes, swinging hazards, and gravity-defying mechanics that challenge your timing and precision. The neon graphics and intense gameplay create a thrilling experience, requiring quick reactions and memorization of complex patterns.

title: Bubble Shooter GO
description:
Pop. Match. Dominate.
Step into the world of precision and strategy with the ultimate bubble shooter experience.

Solo Mode – Play at your own pace or push your skills to the limit. Chain powerful combos, unlock boosters, and master every level as you progress through increasingly challenging stages.

1v1 Battles – Challenge a friend or face off against opponents. Use smart angles, fast reflexes, and well-timed power-ups to outplay your rival in intense bubble duels.

title: Tiles of the Unexpected 2
description:
Tiles of the Unexpected 2 is a puzzle game with a dark military theme and refined gameplay. Clear groups of tiles, set off chain reactions, and plan each move carefully as the board shifts and collapses. The classic mechanics from Tiles of the Unexpected return with smoother controls and a sharper, more intense style.

The game introduces a new Time Attack mode, where speed and strategy are key. Clear tiles quickly to push back enemy forces and survive as long as possible.

title: Guivo.io
description:
Challenge the world in Guivo.io, a skill-based Match-3 battle arena playable instantly in your browser! Match pieces, shatter ice and outscore opponents in lightning-fast 2-minute rounds.
Climb our chess-inspired Elo ranking system based solely on skill, earn Trophies with each victory and see your name showcased in the winner's banner. Ready to prove you're the puzzle master?

title: Summer Rider 3D
description: Hit the waves in Summer Rider 3D, a sun-soaked surf adventure inspired by high-speed endless runners. Glide over water on a surfboard or jet-ski, collect shimmering starfish, and push your reflexes to the limit as the speed cranks up. With a colorful summer theme and upbeat tropical soundtracks, the game offers endless fun for both solo and 2 player mode!

title: Kitten Never Dies
description: Join an interdimensional adventure to help a lost kitten find its way home! Solve unique challenges in each dimension. Cute, clever, and full of surprises—are you up for the challenge? Play now and test your puzzle-solving skills!

title: Merge Fantasy
description: Look around! The island is rich with raw materials waiting to be gathered. Extract resources from rocks, trees, gold ore or crystals,  then merge them to breathe life into the land! Dragons will be your companions on this magical journey filled with secrets and surprises at every turn.

title: World Solitaire -Tripeaks-
description:
It is TriPeaks, one of the most famous solitaires in the world.
Take a step to go up and test your brain and luck
How far can I clean it?

title: Shelter Security: Gatekeeper Simulator
description: Become the gatekeeper of the most bizarre shelter in a post-apocalyptic world! In this guard simulator, you’ll face chaos, humor, and wild challenges. Inspect documents at the visa center, scan luggage for contraband, and distinguish peaceful residents from prankster mutants and disguised bandits.

title: Scooter Touchgrind Tricks 3D
description: Scooter Touchgrind Tricks 3D is an exciting and simple scooter game where you ride through challenging tracks filled with obstacles. Your main goal is to reach the finish line without crashing. As you play, you’ll need to dodge barriers, keep your balance, and react fast. You can collect coins along the way to unlock new scooters with cool designs. With smooth controls and many levels to explore, the game offers fun, speed, and tricks for anyone who loves action on two wheels.

title: Pretty Sheep Run
description: Play a fun arcade game in Pretty Sheep Run. You guide an adorable little sheep dashing across endless platforms. Keep your sheep running while cleverly avoiding dangerous traps. Control your sheep running to shoot different numbered doors. Change the numbers into positive numbers. Thus increasing the gun's DMG, ATK SPD, etc. Reach the finish line and shoot farther to get rewards. Keep buying guns and merging the same two guns to get upgrades.

title: Air Strike 2D
description: Become a bomber pilot and fly an army airplane in epic air strikes! Drop bombs, destroy tanks, cannons and soldiers, intercept missiles and shoot down drones. Eliminate enemy troops and destroy their military bases. Upgrade your aircraft with deadly weapons and cool gear. Dominate the battlefield from the sky and defeat the villain general in a final airstrike!

title: Make Ten Tiles
description: Play Make Ten Tiles free online and sharpen your skills in a clever browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Merge number tiles, add to ten, and solve each logic puzzle in a satisfying brain game that blends fun with real mental math practice. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game perfect for quick breaks and focused learning.

title: Animal in Rails!
description:
An exciting puzzle game about delivering animals to a trader's base

Connect and disconnect railways around the world to help each animal reach its home.

Install, remove, and redirect connections so that wagons can safely connect to the locomotive. But be careful and don't let them collide with each other!

Delay trains by using railway barriers. Change the tracks to redirect the wagons in different directions. Pick up new pets along the way and face even more challenges along the way!

title: Erase the extra element
description: Sharpen your focus and logic in Erase the Extra Element! Erase parts of each scene to reveal clues and solve tricky visual puzzles.

title: Steam Sorter
description: Take control of a cute robot and get to work sorting industrial garbage! A dynamic puzzle game with a steampunk aesthetic.

title: The Stone Miner
description: Become the ultimate mining tycoon in The Stone Miner! Drive your powerful mining machine through various fantasy terrains. Crush, collect and smash stones like never before! Steer your mine cart through rocks of different colors and materials and enjoy the exhilarating experience of stone mining. Sell collected stones for gold, and unlock new areas full of rare materials and surprises! Upgrade your vehicle to mine faster and deeper, turning your gear into a true beast!

title: Crazy Screw King
description: This is Unscrew All! More than simple matching, swiftly remove screws into same-colored bins. Glass slides down with each success! Release stress, show skill, become the Screw Master!

title: Idle Baseball Tycoon
description: Play Idle Baseball Tycoon free online and step into a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Build your dream team, upgrade stadiums, recruit players, and grow profits in a smart manager sim that blends idle strategy with brain game decision-making. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly, working perfectly on desktop and mobile. It’s a free online game made for quick breaks and long-term domination.

title: Boost Your Brain!
description: "Boost Your Brain!" is an exciting incremental game where you develop your mind by collecting Aiku! Click the magic book, upgrade skills, collect pets with bonuses, and customize with skins. Enjoy deep progression, endless leveling, and cute companions. Reach new heights and become a genius!

title: Italian Brainrot Challenge
description: Welcome to the Italian Brainrot Challenge quiz game with the characters from Strange Animals! Choose your difficulty and test your knowledge of the Brainrot characters. Tap the correct answer from multiple choices and collect points as you go through the world of Italian Brainrot.

title: Snowboard Game​ Party
description: Begin snow racing thrill in Snowboard Game Party. It's a high-energy multiplayer ski sport challenge. In this adrenaline-filled winter sports game, you’ll join other players on dynamic ski tracks full of surprises. Flexibly control your hero and race against other opponents. While keeping your speed! Avoid snowballs, fences, sudden slopes, etc. Win races to earn points, unlock gear, and customize your style!

title: Crown & Cannon
description: Crown & Cannon is a fast-paced 2D strategy game where players expand territory, deploy various weapons, and battle dynamic AI on destructible terrain. It features upgradeable units, strategic combat, and is optimized for Web platforms and cross platform.

title: Find & Restore: Hidden Puzzle
description:
Find & Restore: Hidden Puzzle! is a relaxing and brain-teasing puzzle game where you must spot, drag, and fix the misplaced parts of beautiful images.
Each level challenges you to find hidden pieces, pull them out, and place them exactly where they belong.
With handcrafted levels, soothing music, and satisfying visuals, it's the perfect game to relax and train your observation skills.
Can you restore every picture to perfection?

title: Spellmind
description:
Welcome to Spellmind Magic School where wonderful adventures await! Solve match-3 puzzles to restore the old mansion to former glory. Beat colorful levels, explore magic mist-filled rooms, decorate them to your taste and solve the mysteries of the missing wizard’s mansion!
Show that you’ve got what it takes to restore the Spellmind Magic School to its former glory!  Build wonderful interiors for Sabrina’s story to take place in.

title: Mahjong Four Rivers
description: Discover the engaging world of Mahjong Four Rivers – a fresh take on the classic puzzle game. With its traditional charm and modern gameplay, it’s perfect for sharpening your observation and strategy skills. Enjoy beautifully designed tiles and the rewarding challenge of clearing the board. Play for free on your phone or computer, wherever you are.

title: Number Bubble Shooter
description: Have fun with the whole family in this colorful number puzzle game! Shoot numbered balls onto the board and merge matching ones to create bigger numbers. Use powerful rocket boosters to clear a round area and make room for more moves. Easy to learn and packed with cheerful challenges, it’s perfect for players of all ages to practice quick thinking, strategy, and have a blast together.

title: Diamond Solitaire Mahjong
description: Step into the radiant world of Diamond Solitaire Mahjong! Enjoy a beautifully crafted single puzzle with shimmering tiles adorned with diamonds, gems, and sparkling jewels. Zoom in and out for the perfect view as you match tiles in a relaxing setting. Earn points for quick matches and climb the leaderboard. Perfect for casual players and Mahjong fans seeking a peaceful yet rewarding experience.

title: Run Friends
description:
'RUN FRIENDS' is a game where beautiful heroines run to save planets in danger. 
Rescue the various creatures (Friends) on each planet, threatened by the cosmic villain Vegapunk, and save the planets. 
Are you ready to run alongside these beautiful heroines?

title: Grass Land
description: Grass Land is a vibrant exploration game that drops you into a sprawling world of thick greenery and hidden surprises. Take control of your grass cutter, uncover valuable resources beneath the overgrowth, and build up your base as you roam the fields. Stay sharp, move fast, and make the most of every patch of grass you find.

title: Food Truck Chef Cooking
description: Welcome to Food Truck Chef Cooking, a casual food cooking simulation game online. Want to experience a day of a food truck chef? Are you curious about what the screw's work is like on an airplane? Join our best chef simulator game and resolve all your doubts. Step into the kitchen of a running truck and answer all your customers' requests. Challenge your mind and boost your thinking in this cooking management game.

title: Math Runner
description: Challenge your mind and reflexes in this fast-paced arithmetic adventure! Solve math problems on the run, dodge obstacles, and race against time to achieve the highest score. Perfect for players of all ages looking to sharpen their math skills while enjoying thrilling gameplay.

title: Crazy Fruit Merge
description: Looking for the perfect relaxing game? Sometimes all you need is a fun puzzle. Merge fruits, challenge your mind and use power-ups to keep the game flowing. Progress further and aim for the highest score!

title: Minecraft Pixel Warfare
description: Minecraft Pixel Warfare" is a fast-paced PvP shooter set in blocky, Minecraft-inspired worlds. Players battle in competitive team modes (e.g., Team Deathmatch, Capture the Flag) or free-for-all arenas using guns, grenades, and melee weapons—all with Minecraft’s iconic pixelated visuals. Unlock skins, upgrade weapons, and master maps to dominate the leaderboard!

title: Sword and Jewel
description: Sword and Jewel is a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game where you place colorful gems on the board to create lines of three or more. Match gems in rows or columns to clear them, score points, and keep the board from filling up. Plan your moves carefully - when there’s no space left for new gems, the game ends!

title: 4 Hexa
description: 4 Hexa is a fun, colorful online puzzle game! Merge same-number blocks to reach higher scores in this addictive math trivia challenge. Perfect for fans of block match games and brain teasers! Play now and test your skills!

title: Lovely Cat Pet Life
description: Call for all pet lovers! If you are a DIY enthusiast or enjoy playing with cute animals, join Lovely Cat: Pet Life, a casual DIY cat game online. Dive into this adorable, fun-filled, and creative game that combines the elements of cats, pets, fashion, and DIY all in one perfect package! Play dress-up game: Try out charming suits on your pet. Decorate an ideal look for your kitten. Enjoy minigames unblocked: Join mini animal parkour games with your little cat.

title: Speedrun platformer
description: A classic platformer with coin collection and jumping on monsters' heads. But if you complete the levels as quickly as possible, you can get into the leaderboard.

title: Blob Hero
description: In Blob Hero, you become a brave hero facing endless waves of enemies and monsters! This survival game offers a true rogue adventure experience. You control a blob hero, choose basic skills and upgrade to survive.

title: Make Two
description:
In Make Two, your job is simple. Give each customer two of the same food! Drag the matching items to the hungry customers before time runs out.

- Beat the clock to clear each level
- Match food pairs to fulfill orders
- Earn coins for every satisfied customer. The more you serve, the more you earn!
- Use your coins to unlock new cute customers.

Fast-paced, satisfying, and easy to pick up. Make Two is the perfect bite-sized game to test your reflexes and memory.

title: Hexa Block: Honey Cells
description: Dive into the exciting world of logic and shapes. Your task is to fill the field with multi-colored hexagonal blocks, choosing the right combinations. Each level is a new puzzle that requires attention, logic and precise calculation. Exciting gameplay, smooth animation and bright graphics make the gameplay as enjoyable as possible.

title: Magic Princess: Dress Up Doll
description:
Magic Princess - Dress up & Character Maker game, come and design the cutest doll?!

Magic Princess is a fashionable ultra-casual simulation girl game with a strong anime chibi style, suitable for all unique girls to play.
Design dolls and let your imagination soar! Dress up your doll in your own unique way now!

title: Slime Attack: Puzzle!
description: In this complete action, the play-heading playing you have to choose the right arrows and hit the corresponding slugs until it became too late. Calculate the time of shots, select colors and bring down arrows on top to protect your kingdom!

title: Monster School Challenge
description: Complete teacher's assignments for evaluation, finding out who is a Noob and who is a Pro! Different tests and characters are waiting for you in the game Monster School Challenge.

title: Fix Da Brainrot
description: Fix Da Brainrot is a quirky jigsaw puzzle game with pieces that look like torn paper. Pick your challenge —16 pieces for a quick and easy fix or 32 pieces for a real brain teaser. Drag, drop, and fit the torn pieces together, and watch the picture slowly come alive as you fix the brainrot and conquer the puzzle!

title: Hit ball
description:
Hit ball is a fast-paced arcade game with roguelike elements, in which you fight off waves of enemies with ricocheting balls! With each shot you break through obstacles, knock down monsters and earn experience to improve your abilities.
Dozens of levels with unique traps, walls, boosting balls and dangerous bosses await you. Collect boosters, pick up abilities, regenerate health and strategize to survive the battle!

title: Suitable Outfit Dressup
description: Suitable Outfit Dressup is a fashionable and exciting dress up game. If you are a big fan of fashion games, then you will surely enjoy this game! Try different dress styles, hairstyles to make your anime girl character stand out and show off your skills as a fashion line master in the game! Have fun playing!

title: Alien Chase - Swing and Fly
description: Alien Chase - Swing and Fly is the wildest swinging game in town! Play as a superhero on vacation, caught in the middle of an alien invasion. With nothing but your grappling skills, swing between towering skyscrapers and outrun the relentless alien swarm. It’s fast, it’s frantic, and it’s an endless escape—how far can you swing?

title: Jewel Solitaire TriPeaks
description: Rebuild glorious castles in a magical Solitaire adventure! Conquer 200 levels, master 12 variants – from Klondike to Spider – and enjoy fresh mechanics that reinvent the classic. The kingdom’s fate lies in your cards – are you ready to play your way to glory?

title: Fitness Club 3D
description: Fitness Club 3D is a casual game where you plunge into the world of fitness and make every workout count as you strive to build an empire. Help your clients achieve their dream bodies and fitness aspirations while transforming your studio into the ultimate gym. Jump into the aerobics class, making a splash to rake in the cash. Pay close attention to your clients' forms, ensuring proper training techniques.

title: Cornhole League - Board Games
description: Cornhole League is a thrilling twist on the classic backyard game where you aim, toss, and score your way to victory. Compete in intense matches, join tournaments, and showcase your flair with customizable boards and bags. Explore stunning venues, from cozy backyards to grand stadiums. Perfect your toss and rise to cornhole greatness!

title: Dynamons 12
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 12! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Guardian Tomb world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons Captain Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon trainer. Encounter the 8 titans from the Guardian King: Bearmoryx, Sharkonyx, Crocynos, Horzaryx, Visi, Rhinodys, Fenixaro, Uryndur and many more special Dynamons.

title: Geometry Arrow 2
description: Geometry Arrow 2 is the fast-paced sequel to the original rhythm arcade hit! Navigate through 6 dynamic levels, dodging obstacles that move to the beat. Switch between the Arrow and the all-new Wheel character, each with unique mechanics. Unlock achievements and customize your Arrow and Wheel with different skins, particles, and block textures. Time your moves, feel the rhythm, and reach the portal in perfect sync!

title: Fruit King Merge
description: Fruit King Merge is a bright and addictive arcade game where your goal is to merge identical fruits to create new, larger, and more valuable ones. As you play, you will earn coins, unlock new types of fruit, and aim for the highest possible score. Colorful graphics, smooth animations, and simple controls make the game suitable for all ages and perfect for engaging gaming sessions.

title: Paper Doll Diary - Chibi Dolls
description: With Paper Doll Diary - Chibi Dolls, users can unleash their creativity and design unique outfits for their dolls. The game offers a wide range of clothing options, accessories, and hairstyles to choose from, allowing players to mix and match to their heart's content.

title: Celebrity Wednesday Addams Style
description: Indulge in the iconic and bewitching Celebrity Wednesday Addams Style! Embrace the darkly chic aesthetics, explore mesmerizing outfits, and channel your inner gothic elegance. Discover how celebrities rock the macabre charm of Wednesday Addams with a modern twist. Unleash your inner darkness and redefine elegance with a touch of the mysterious.

title: Block Pixels
description:
Block Pixels is a vibrant puzzle game where classic block-clearing action meets the creative joy of pixel art discovery.

Your main goal is to strategically place colorful pieces to clear lines on the board. But the real magic lies in what you clear. Each block you eliminate contributes to a larger masterpiece. Clearing specific colors helps you build and reveal dozens of charming hidden images, from cute animals to fun objects.

title: Hair Salon: Beauty Salon
description:
Get ready to unleash your inner hairstylist with the adorable and entertaining game Hair Salon: Beauty Salon Spa! ?

This charming simulation game allows you to run your very own hair salon, where you can give your cute and quirky customers the hair style of their dreams.
From washing, styling hair and providing luxurious jewelry & makeup accessories, there's never a dull moment in this delightful game.

title: ASMR Beauty Superstar
description: Welcome to ASMR Clinic, where relaxation meets rejuvenation! Our superstar guest is receiving expert care for acne-prone skin and rough feet in a serene atmosphere. Our skilled doctors will work their magic, providing personalized attention to detail and soothing care. Customize her look with various hairstyles, makeup looks, and shoes to create a stunning outfit that's uniquely hers. Unwind and express your creativity in this calming and fashionable game.

title: Sneaker Art
description: Sneaker Art is a creative casual art game where you become a pro sneaker designer. Grab your paintbrush, unleash your imagination, and craft unique shoe designs. Choose from a variety of laces, showcase your artwork, and sell your masterpieces in your sneaker shop. Pack your custom sneakers in stylish boxes and grow your business with every sale!

title: Craft Block World Building
description: Welcome to Craft Block World Building! This is the creative simulator to ignite your creativity. In this colorful world of cubes, you can build, design and create your own amazing world! You can also drive a car and explore the open landscape! Feel the thrill of driving across blocky mountains, rivers, and endless fields!

title: Summer Maze
description: Summer Maze is a fun summer puzzle game filled with sunshine and bright colors. Guide the ball through the intricate mazes, filling all the space inside. Earn gems, unlock new skins and enjoy simple but addictive gameplay. Perfect for lovers of logic games, arcades and puzzles.

title: Tap To Color: Painting Book
description:
Unleash your inner artist and paint your stress away with Tap to Color: Painting Book Game! Dive into a vibrant world of color where creating a masterpiece is as simple as a single tap. Forget the mess of crayons and paints; this is the ultimate digital coloring book for all ages.

Find your calm and enter a state of flow as you bring beautiful illustrations to life. It’s the perfect way to relax after a long day, pass the time on your commute,

title: Smartle
description: Smartle is a free online word puzzle game where you rearrange letters by swapping them on a 5x5 grid to form words. Win the game by creating 5 horizontal 5-letter words on the field. There are multiple valid combinations of words which can win the game.

title: Rope Rescue! - Unique Puzzle
description: Rope Rescue is a puzzle game with simple controls but a challenging twist. Strategize to save everyone using ropes while dodging tricky traps and obstacles. Stay sharp to overcome each level and claim exciting rewards. With its easy-to-learn mechanics and increasingly complex challenges, this game will keep you hooked as you perfect your rescue skills!

title: Labubu Merge
description:
Engage, Merge, and Challenge!
Dive into a labubu-matching journey where you collide identical labubu to evolve them and keep them from falling out of the box. But here's the twist: when the same labubus collide, they transform into an entirely new labubu. Can you merge your way to the grand labubu?

title: Cat Rescue
description: Protect the cat from dragon invasions through strategic sort puzzle combat. As enemies display colored patterns, your cannon must sort puzzle sequences to match their hues. Click the correctly colored cannon to obliterate matching dragon sections. Each precise cannon shot slows their advance toward the cat! Repeat until dragon threats vanish, but remember: rescue missions demand speed and sort puzzle accuracy!

title: Turbo Stunt Racing
description: Experience high-speed thrills in Turbo Stunt Racing! Perform epic stunts, race fierce rivals, and upgrade unique cars in this 3D arcade racer packed with action, traps, and ramps. Master precision driving and dominate every level!

title: Brainrot Memory
description:
Memory Brainrot: Boost Your Brain with Meme Power!

Flip cards, match pairs, and meet iconic characters from the Italian Brainrot meme universe! Play in a vibrant cartoon world, train your memory, and unlock chaotic fun. With two difficulty levels and dozens of legendary meme heroes to discover, this game is both brain-boosting and hilarious. Dive into pure meme madness and rot your brain... but in the best way! ??

title: Wall Hop
description: Every wall has a purpose. Every move is a lesson. Learn the mechanics, feel the flow, and gradually unlock the mental agility needed to navigate increasingly complex challenges.

title: Natural disaster survival Obby
description:
Immerse yourself in an exciting Roblox-style adventure with the game “Natural disaster survival Obby”! 

Dynamic maps are waiting for you, where disasters are happening every second - lava flows, floods, tornadoes and much more. Pass the obby trials, dodge the dangers and try to survive the longest! 

Play online with friends and other players from all over the world. 
Unlock stylish skins and unique pets to stand out from the rest.

title: Brainrot Merge
description:
Get ready for a weirdly satisfying evolution puzzle!
In Brainrot Merge, drop creatures like Tun-Tun-Tun Sahur, Chimpanzini-Bananini, and Spioniro-Golubiro. Watch them bounce, roll, and merge into even stranger beings!
A mix of physics and pure absurdity — perfect for when your brain needs a break.

title: Magic Flow
description: Magci Flow are puzzle series solved by transferring liquids. Players must strategically use container capacities to sort liquids in the fewest moves. Tasks include merging same-colored liquids or precise sequencing, rigorously testing judgment skills.

title: Bubble it jam
description: Bubble it jam is a vibrant, fast-paced puzzle-shooter game where players aim and shoot colored balls to match and pop clusters of the same color.the goal is to collect color bubble, free the ropes, and complete each level. Every stage presents a new and exciting challenge, keeping gameplay fresh and engaging, combining strategy, quick reflexes, and a bit of luck for high scores.

title: Ultimate Brainrot Clicker
description:
Tap into chaos. Click your way to the final meme singularity.

Ultimate Brainrot Clicker is a chaotic, high-speed clicker-incremental game set in a futuristic memeverse where AI-generated absurdity and Italian brainrot collide. Your mission? Click endlessly to generate Neural Coins, unlock absurd characters, and witness the full meltdown of meme logic.

title: Gym Simulator - Tycoon
description: Welcome to Gym Simulator - Tycoon, where your business dreams take shape in the world of fitness. In this engaging online game, you'll manage and grow a network of gyms—upgrade your facilities, invest in top-notch equipment, and fine-tune every detail to run smoothly. Whether you're playing on your phone or computer, dive into a game where strategy meets a passion for health. With dynamic gameplay, you'll turn a small operation into a booming fitness brand.

title: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games
description: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games challenges your problem-solving skills in a captivating pin puzzle adventure. Strategically tap to unlock screw holes on products, guiding metal plates to fall in the correct sequence. Navigate through intricate mazes of nuts, bolts, and plates. With each level presenting new challenges, immerse yourself in over 100 brain-teasing stages.

title: Papa Buzja
description:
Papa Buzja brings good things home! He feeds the children, brings them books, makes supplies and builds a house. The path will pass through wide fields, dense forest, squelching swamp and high mountains.
Difficultes and adventures await Papa Buzja along the way. 
Whatever happens on the way, remember: the kids are waiting for you!

title: Grandma with machine-gun: Apocalypsis
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones.
But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka.
Help Granny get home, roast them all!

title: Brainrot Evolution Game
description: Brainrot Evolution Game is a chaotic meme clicker incremental game where you tap your way through the viral Italian Brainrot universe, unlocking all the brainrot characters and upgrades as you progress! You will get the chance to collect Italian Brainrot characters such as: Bombardino Crocodilo, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Tralalero Tralala, Bombombini Gussini, Cappuccino Assasino, Lirili Larila, Brr Brr Patapim, Burbaloni Luliloli, Bobritto Bandito, Trippi Troppi, Chimpanzini Bananini and more!

title: Labubu Adventure
description:
Dive into a world of Labubu characters. If you are looking for an amazing adventure, help the little Labubu to complete all the levels and collect coins through the fantasy world.
Whether you want to elevate your gaming skills or just look for simple fun, you can always find something that fits your type.

title: Little Hero Knight
description: In Little Hero Knight, you'll play the role of a brave little hero. Travel through a world full of monsters and keep fighting with your weapon. Build your defense towers and engage in a battle of wits and courage! Strategically manage your battlegrounds, build walls, barracks, houses and more! Build your base and towers using collected coins. Unlock powerful weapons and defense towers, and customize your battle setup!

title: Shiny Jewels
description: Conquer each level with your logic, unleash powerful boosters and claim victory! Complete missions to earn unique rewards or join special events: break the chest, collect as many coins as possible within limited moves or race against time to complete the level.

title: Press "A" to Party
description: Press A to Party is a casual arcade game collection designed for players of all ages. Gather your friends and family, settle onto the couch, and dive into the action with simple one-button controls and fast-paced gameplay. Compete against up to 4 players on the same screen, vying for the coveted title of the ultimate arcade champion. Get ready for a blast of fun and excitement at your next gathering!

title: Dark Academia Wedding
description: Step into a world of moody elegance in Dark Academia Wedding! Help the bride and groom prepare for their enchanting, gothic-inspired celebration. Choose vintage dresses, romantic accessories, and rich color palettes that capture the essence of dark academia. From candlelit ceremonies to mysterious venues, every detail matters. Create the perfect blend of classic romance and intellectual charm in this stylish wedding dress up game!

title: Mind Gambit
description: Mind Gambit is a relaxing puzzle game inspired by the classic Peg Solitaire. Plan your moves carefully to jump and remove pegs until only one remains. There’s no timer, just pure strategy and thoughtful gameplay. With unlimited levels, the challenge never ends.

title: LABUBU MERGE CLICKER
description:
Enter the wacky world of Labubu and the Monster Crew — merge mischievous Labubus, unlock rare forms, and climb your way to the top!
Boom! Crash! Roar! The gang’s all here — how far can you go before the box overflows?

title: Woody Hexa
description: Woody Hexa is a visually engaging puzzle game that challenges players to complete 250 levels by strategically arranging hexagonal blocks by color. With simple drag-and-drop controls and increasingly complex layouts, each level tests your logic and spatial awareness. Combining relaxing gameplay with clever merging mechanics, Woody Hexa offers a satisfying brain workout perfect for all ages.

title: Yummy Trails
description: Can you help the hungry snake navigate the tastiest trail of all? The path may be tricky, but the reward is delicious. Test your brain and relax.

title: Screamals
description:
Change the shape of the characters with simple up-and-down manipulations
Even if obstacles get in the way, they can change their shape and pass through.
Break through the obstacle, collect the notes and fire them at the boss!

title: Solitaire Farm Seasons 4
description: Solitaire Farm: Seasons 4 is here with over 3,800+ levels and fresh adventures! Explore beautiful new maps like Greenland, South Korea, Sumatra, and Nepal while growing unique crops such as Mountain Avens, Ginkgo, Durian, Flax, and Orchids. With new level packs, seasonal events, and charming visuals, this relaxing solitaire journey is more exciting than ever. Ready to train your brain and enjoy country life? Dive into the adventure now!

title: Wednesday Light Academia
description: Join the trend in Wednesday Light Academia - a fun, immersive makeover game for girls! Today you're becoming a super-talented stylist and your job is to transform Wednesday Addams from a dark e-girl look to a stunning girly-girl fashionista. Explore the fun realms of makeup, hairstyling, and fashion-forward wardrobe choices with this addictive game. Have fun!

title: Number Merge 10
description: Number Merge 10 is a very innovative math puzzle game.Select a rectangular area, and if the sum of the numbers within that area equals 10, all the numbers in that area will be eliminated!

title: Car Paint
description: Carpaint is a free, family-friendly HTML5 logic puzzle game and casual brain teaser featuring 30 vibrant color grid challenges. Guide colorful cars across a 3×3 board, leaving paint trails to match reference patterns. This addictive, cross-platform online puzzle works in any browser or on mobile - play now!

title: Quiz Master
description:
